Peter,

While Democrats fail to prioritize security on our Southern border. Mike has introduced a series of bills that will strengthen our immigration courts and combat the Biden border crisis:

**Empowering Immigration Courts Act** –– America’s immigration courts are toothless. They don’t have the authority to impose criminal fines on anyone in contempt of their court, and this bill would finally give them the power to fully enforce the law.

**Illicit Arms Trafficking Security Enforcement Act** –– 70% of all weapons seized from cartels are smuggled across the border. This bill would create a specialized unit within the Department of Homeland Security to crack down on this illicit arms trafficking to keep Americans safe.

**Supporting Mexico Against Corruption Act** –– Cartels thrive under the support of corrupt Mexican government officials. This act would require the President to impose sanctions on any Mexican government official involved in supporting cartels and their illegal activities.

**These common-sense reforms are desperately needed on our southern border right now.**

**_[Donate NOW to stand with Mike in the fight to make our borders secure again!](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=66061576a52d4aac89e1c1830e6d95ee&_e=U5FH8fpzaXcnKqTwqSCPkUyzgdRyIwJc618BJf006ep8vmh1A4kdKDvgjnc5unsyvWCjkyShlZG_brN9P6Ujjb_OIFaRITh81FlQbBerbCJoqvB39fy3xIXjlX8TzdOQW_ayahMNOqC2_Y1Lh70JsnkfEzUqovNZftR11exsHAsQwGRqM1li6B_5e1Xzta6NaQp8ZeYhkgutnwUeQVowDIC5E2YSCjWzoWbmZKJlvAp8NShkKS1RYpVlJp1hrhH6JLXrmPRVETpoGJ0p1mPMCa_UzW3DGUudEIlLs5pc60DKPlizPQPH02W8Qwms5w1n-IgTj4vPlxfYrMJ1XDrstNagn26ekiXDqE0PhfZEByxUMgr4zxLVRu7GVKiphpCmqJIiX7MNqC8bLj-mqal8j-jMPCFv1Fb_bowaBHbsr9tGZ6VlcRsbLBRNckdu_OY2)_**

Fellow patriot,

Americans resoundingly rejected the Democrats' far-left agenda and failed leadership in state and local elections around the country on November 2nd.

This was just a preview of the massive losses Democrats will suffer in 2022, **and among the top targets for Republicans to defeat is my opponent:** Democrat Congresswoman Katie Porter in California's 45th District - a swing seat.

**Porter is a self-proclaimed socialist who is to the left of Maxine Waters.**

_In fact, Katie Porter is so extreme that Maxine Waters even kicked her off of a Congressional committee!_

When Katie Porter is not going on late night talk shows, appearing in glossy magazines like _Vanity Fair_ , or grandstanding while attacking CEOs, she's voting with The Squad and pushing Medicare-For-All, the Green New Deal, trillions in wasteful spending, and tax increases.

Fellow patriot, **this race is one of the top targets that Republicans need to win to take back the House.** It's going to take nationwide grassroots support, just like it took to flip Virginia red.

[**Will you help me defeat far-left Katie Porter and flip this swing House seat with a donation of $25, $50, $100 or even more?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=820da41c6f5c4427bd5e942ad873986a&_e=I6-xAvxWvVzlXAApP7i4KiouU5TvTR0tr2DZdb9n4vbmDojCBFPhoucp_J1EF-OoodOfdRlqH7S0j3l1VnzpijaSlq_fM3VsQjBWgR38RLi6U5Dinfq8FNmIUw-_3SRBqSDawUlw34A7M6YtRnkMr27_v1oysT411CE26BbyAW1HSZ1KjQG2xYu4M6N0K5E9_6uCyQPa4qRGSIYPA3go0gX6TWvF8ylZzTPEkJGJN7fc_xbps9qZDlLKs2zaheRflW9f7FR4tEOrpQ_PM2vtoXQdgtEtQ957z9eMiRdWXF56RDsKAp3kb6ZD3q0Vop0BflOspH1BhNBeru8EuQDCGb9uGf4vcbU9sduCPEEJvo_MYFXP_I5l-ADHeQ1XsfkpDCdEHhFpkyDzzsELHQlyjIJAqYfzdjFmT1rQveHgVo5P517EoRdSSMm1aDxZqOvv3qylLLs8fTqdLU9CPfp_CQ%3D%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=820da41c6f5c4427bd5e942ad873986a&_e=I6-xAvxWvVzlXAApP7i4KiouU5TvTR0tr2DZdb9n4vbmDojCBFPhoucp_J1EF-OoodOfdRlqH7S0j3l1VnzpijaSlq_fM3VsQjBWgR38RLi6U5Dinfq8FNmIUw-_3SRBqSDawUlw34A7M6YtRnkMr27_v1oysT411CE26BbyAW1HSZ1KjQG2xYu4M6N0K5E9_6uCyQPa4qRGSIYPA3go0gX6TWvF8ylZzTPEkJGJN7fc_xbps9qZDlLKs2zaheRftnHsZExi_bUkjOOKrOmYSMM0Y4YSICP0B8Wq3IYffEV0hHOBSf4_io6e2J4J8UG7Fdr2zV5TbtjshpVD0D2cNamNg7_M4BpOal9lXuMDSAaL1Dl-m39ztPCDBC_Ml_u6hGGK_EnbR83Oex6PM_lDEm_FEhhuCyVhYnK-TdWiYH6LL4DZ7jB1rw0Q3AEBtwSZ69cIBV94PWRuoKcmiWZRCA%3D%3D)
As a black kid who grew up with divorced parents in a disadvantaged Dallas neighborhood, I had every reason to think I couldn't achieve the American Dream - **but I didn't let that stop me.**

Thanks to sports, I attended Rice University - where I played Division-1 basketball - and then Law School at the University of Texas at Austin.

I eventually enlisted in the United States Navy and **volunteered for a combat tour of duty in Afghanistan.**

While stationed in Kabul City, Afghanistan, I coordinated with Special Forces units to help them identify and capture suspected terroist suicide bombers.

_**I was even a target of two suicide bomb attacks and was blessed to survive.**_

Now, my wife - who immigrated to America as a young refugee from war-torn Lebanon - and I are raising our four kids to live out their own American Dream.

But politicians like Katie Porter are only making it harder. They're increasing government control over our lives, adding to our national debt, raising taxes, driving up the cost of living, and all while failing to fulfill government's most basic role: keeping us secure and safe.

**Removing far-left politicians and failed leaders like Katie Porter from Congress is just as important as flipping this swing seat.**

[**Will you ensure we can take advantage of the momentum from these recent victories and chip in $25, $50, $100 or even more to help me defeat Katie Porter and win back a Republican House majority?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=820da41c6f5c4427bd5e942ad873986a&_e=I6-xAvxWvVzlXAApP7i4KiouU5TvTR0tr2DZdb9n4vbmDojCBFPhoucp_J1EF-OoodOfdRlqH7S0j3l1VnzpijaSlq_fM3VsQjBWgR38RLi6U5Dinfq8FNmIUw-_3SRBqSDawUlw34A7M6YtRnkMr27_v1oysT411CE26BbyAW1HSZ1KjQG2xYu4M6N0K5E9_6uCyQPa4qRGSIYPA3go0gX6TWvF8ylZzTPEkJGJN7fc_xbps9qZDlLKs2zaheRf1-tiLZiFuFet6TB-lqQfpJc5ILWTibS5qv1ZpMznJj-BWdwmVS_5OZpl3R4JV3wBiIjfqUbPO5vGIxgHEb-0XeMAmWl16fi4toN4hNjvhhkG6jW6sFoBu2QWIHchtX61Ub1k1TS9Ie2BUDBZ_WcbhYp9AevwFAI92JD5168tJduTF0aqEvEohbEUPnwnlLmDpXFFvK4zdfxOCk86p7JOVA%3D%3D)

Thanks,

Shawn Collins

clean_body: Katie Porter is so extreme that Maxine Waters even kicked her off of a Congressional committee! | Fellow patriot, Americans resoundingly rejected the Democrats' far-left agenda and failed leadership in state and local elections around the country on November 2nd. This was just a preview of the massive losses Democrats will suffer in 2022, and among the top targets for Republicans to defeat is my opponent: Democrat Congresswoman Katie Porter in California's 45th District - a swing seat. Porter is a self-proclaimed socialist who is to the left of Maxine Waters. In fact, Katie Porter is so extreme that Maxine Waters even kicked her off of a Congressional committee! When Katie Porter is not going on late night talk shows, appearing in glossy magazines like Vanity Fair , or grandstanding while attacking CEOs, she's voting with The Squad and pushing Medicare-For-All, the Green New Deal, trillions in wasteful spending, and tax increases. Fellow patriot, this race is one of the top targets that Republicans need to win to take back the House. It's going to take nationwide grassroots support, just like it took to flip Virginia red. As a black kid who grew up with divorced parents in a disadvantaged Dallas neighborhood, I had every reason to think I couldn't achieve the American Dream - but I didn't let that stop me. Thanks to sports, I attended Rice University - where I played Division-1 basketball - and then Law School at the University of Texas at Austin. I eventually enlisted in the United States Navy and volunteered for a combat tour of duty in Afghanistan. While stationed in Kabul City, Afghanistan, I coordinated with Special Forces units to help them identify and capture suspected terroist suicide bombers. I was even a target of two suicide bomb attacks and was blessed to survive. Now, my wife - who immigrated to America as a young refugee from war-torn Lebanon - and I are raising our four kids to live out their own American Dream. But politicians like Katie Porter are only making it harder. They're increasing government control over our lives, adding to our national debt, raising taxes, driving up the cost of living, and all while failing to fulfill government's most basic role: keeping us secure and safe. Removing far-left politicians and failed leaders like Katie Porter from Congress is just as important as flipping this swing seat. Thanks, Shawn Collins U.S. Navy veteran Republican for Congress | | Shawn Collins is a conservative Navy veteran and active Navy Reservist. Having served in Afghanistan, Shawn has spent his life fighting for the Constitution he swore to uphold and defend. He will take that same fighting spirit to the halls of Congress. ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Shawn Collins is a former member of the US Navy. If you knew that $5 could change the course of political history for a generation, would you make that contribution?

If you knew $5 could guarantee we **hold our Senate majority so we can pass President Biden’s bold agenda, prevent Mitch McConnell from blocking our progress, and keep America on the right track forward** , would you take that leap?

[**Now’s your chance: we’re running behind today’s $20,000 fundraising goal, and we need support from folks like you. Will you donate $5 now to help make up the difference and defend Democrats’ Senate majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/4698?t=5&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20211109-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211109-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=1889%2E9716520%2Eq1HxHR)

Here’s what I mean when I talk about $5, friend: President Biden's critical agenda _hinges_ on our Democratic Senate, and Mitch McConnell only needs ONE seat to regain power. **That’s a single seat preventing McConnell from completely blocking President Biden’s transformative agenda -- and a single seat could be decided by a single vote.**

Democratic champions like Mark Kelly, Maggie Hassan, Raphael Warnock, and Catherine Cortez Masto are all up for re-election next year -- and we’re looking at four _extremely close_ races. _One loss_ could be _devastating._

**I’m not exaggerating when I tell you that $5 from supporters like you could decide our political future.** But right now, we’re still waiting on a contribution from you today, and I know you wouldn’t miss out on a chance like this to be a real difference-maker.

**[If everyone reading this message contributed right now, we’d hit tonight’s goal in no time. But as it stands right now, Republicans are threatening to out-raise us AGAIN. We can’t let that happen -- and it all starts with $5. Republicans _will_ outraise us again if we don’t rise up and challenge them. And they could take back the Senate -- maybe by a margin so thin that meeting today’s $20,000 goal would be enough to stop them.

But we’ll never know unless folks across the country band together and pitch in $5 to protect our Senate majority.

Friend,

The 2022 election is officially in full swing! Please join us for a meet and greet on _**November 21st at 11:00 AM**_ to hear from Lisa directly about the campaign!

Over the past several months, the radical left and their #1 ally, Susan Wild, have been hard at work trying to change the American Dream into a Socialist Nightmare. Lisa has been working nonstop to ensure that this campaign has the tools to succeed, and we would love for you to join our growing team to take back Pennsylvania's 7th District!

This District has currently rated a toss-up because Lisa is putting the pressure on Susan Wild. Make no mistake, this race is 100% winnable, but we need your help to get it done!

We hope to see you there, and be sure to share this email with friends who would like to attend!

-Team Scheller

name: Jim Jordan
subject: They're going to gerrymander me into a Democratic district.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729139:6Ck-wt2Nu:m:1:3298722022:68A205D0538C2E20D4585988B9117489:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729139:6Ck-wt2Nu:m:1:3298722022:68A205D0538C2E20D4585988B9117489:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729139:6Ck-wt2Nu:m:1:3298722022:68A205D0538C2E20D4585988B9117489:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729139:6Ck-wt2Nu:m:1:3298722022:68A205D0538C2E20D4585988B9117489:r)
**[Your donation,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729139:6Ck-wt2Nu:m:1:3298722022:68A205D0538C2E20D4585988B9117489:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729139:6Ck-wt2Nu:m:1:3298722022:68A205D0538C2E20D4585988B9117489:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729139:6Ck-wt2Nu:m:1:3298722022:68A205D0538C2E20D4585988B9117489:r)
Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729139:6Ck-wt2Nu:m:1:3298722022:68A205D0538C2E20D4585988B9117489:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729139:6Ck-wt2Nu:m:1:3298722022:68A205D0538C2E20D4585988B9117489:r)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729139:6Ck-wt2Nu:m:1:3298722022:68A205D0538C2E20D4585988B9117489:r)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

name: American Update
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8088%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=G1M2dR4A3U15pmzTkUhnvQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17117%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mYy4uqRK1fYgIrp5%2bwVb8A&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17118%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bYChMKfVzroBHynFIWL8zg&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17119%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wuBLtvZ2QH879fpAqS7NdQ&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Catalina Lauf
subject: I know I’m not alone in thinking this...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
You might've already heard the big news: cry baby Adam Kinzinger has decided he's not running for Congress anymore. I'm sure I'm
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhbk4atfo2deeuq024lfgqi8ad3s9jtvmevevrl8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgm4o32c1h2bs) | |
---
Friend,

**You might've already heard the big news: cry baby Adam Kinzinger has decided he's not running for Congress anymore.**

I'm sure I'm not the only one who's thinking this: GOOD!

Americans are sick and tired of an elitist political class that doesn't understand kitchen table issues - and we're MORE THAN HAPPY to say goodbye to RINOs like Adam.

That's what I told Fox News when they asked...
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zv4p4824bccq13t08p5ivtmkm6p983iipsg4fla8_)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5ahju6ufdfi5tp0ka1bc3vpj7vlhmskkr0jf228_)
The thing is, Kinzinger has been wasting our time for far too long.

Even in his last days...

He couldn't even be bothered to fight against the radical progressives, instead, he was fighting WITH them.

He couldn't be bothered to defend parents, teachers, or first responders against Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandates, instead, he insisted they should not have choices.

He couldn't be bothered to concern himself with the crisis on our border while millions of illegal immigrants overwhelmed our system.

_Instead, this guy was on MSNBC_ , attempting to boost his profile, because he cares more about being a part of the fake news than he cares about defending those who gave him his opportunity in Congress.

I've had enough of Adam Kinzinger and I think we're glad to see him go.

This is our chance to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE by electing REAL leaders who understand the issues affecting the average American - leaders like me.
[**I AGREE: SUPPORT CATALINA LAUF >>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrss7gfvn3q07lo7gtn57h8blumcn367svf13mqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgm4o32c1h2bs)
**Friend, trust me I know the left is already scared of what I’m bringing to the table.**
* I'm an unapologetic MAGA conservative.
* I’m the daughter of LEGAL immigrants.
* I’m a former Trump administration official.
* I’m **ACTUALLY** a Republican.

_And unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have an R by their name, I proudly stand by my conservative values. _

While RINOs like Adam Kinzinger - and the long line of fakers who want to replace him - will happily masquerade as Republicans, they will do nothing to actually fight the liberal agenda that is destroying our nation.

**_But I will._**

_I’ve had enough of the out-of-touch, Nancy Pelosi-led Congress. And unlike those who refuse to upset the status quo, I’m willing to do what it takes to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE._
[**JOIN ME: CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbncjin0c1primd25iejr23920i8eh2s9ms2254g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgm4o32c1h2bs)
_And my record proves it. _

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce.

As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress.

And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

As your member of Congress, I’ll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for a chance to sit at the table with the political elites.** **

**I’ll TAKE BACK THE HOUSE for the people - not for more power. **

And trust me - I’m in this thing to WIN. And though I may not be running against Kinzinger anymore - I'm still running FOR YOU.

I hope you'll show your support for me today by making a small donation.
[**RUSH A DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN >>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5a1o7071tgj4o6dl7h58pvh5a4baga1mk5i1k0o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgm4o32c1h2bs)
Thank you,

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpnqnu10345omc7g1re1opk9nk851qukk42jkfpg_)

Catalina Lauf
---
| |
---
| Paid for by Catalina for Congress |

name: Jim Jordan
subject: They are trying to derail my campaign, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729077:6bAgKt2Ng:m:1:3253819041:92CECE9E4E9795FC7941F76E3E0FD71E:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729077:6bAgKt2Ng:m:1:3253819041:92CECE9E4E9795FC7941F76E3E0FD71E:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729077:6bAgKt2Ng:m:1:3253819041:92CECE9E4E9795FC7941F76E3E0FD71E:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729077:6bAgKt2Ng:m:1:3253819041:92CECE9E4E9795FC7941F76E3E0FD71E:r)
**[Your donation,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729077:6bAgKt2Ng:m:1:3253819041:92CECE9E4E9795FC7941F76E3E0FD71E:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729077:6bAgKt2Ng:m:1:3253819041:92CECE9E4E9795FC7941F76E3E0FD71E:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729077:6bAgKt2Ng:m:1:3253819041:92CECE9E4E9795FC7941F76E3E0FD71E:r)
Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729077:6bAgKt2Ng:m:1:3253819041:92CECE9E4E9795FC7941F76E3E0FD71E:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729077:6bAgKt2Ng:m:1:3253819041:92CECE9E4E9795FC7941F76E3E0FD71E:r)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58729077:6bAgKt2Ng:m:1:3253819041:92CECE9E4E9795FC7941F76E3E0FD71E:r)

Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Antifa Leftists Arrested
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, bec
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs4r1cmd7oembpe3dsmkp6s6rtupote9ek2cs618_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgmapr3c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sbmm3gnfdpj6pib9ohjejie4p1k6sp7ddbk6tgn6d76c8r72plhc3i39ormchrrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbcphhmsqr8c3iepj3co5ic8r749fg)
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7r24pif9jj989rbgv8vdo15e2cft6v4piqjkb5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgmapr3c3h2bs) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony—a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university —**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsj2q3ka1p0rvoadgpdasfan6dcb4in7tdt6gkvg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgmapr3c3h2bs)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation._ _That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zphsri4ob6pu6o37p79fo5qkgubffhmbrkv92euo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgmapr3c3h2bs) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlabt7sfjvq50ag7sfep6l0ms7ninlsd3ue18ja0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgmapr3c3h2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0d77hqs78vo03hbgqrurieamaig4onr3c8sclgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgmapr3c3h2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znuvd0ls5sbfktfmpt6k5u6tj0an0lae14vtpt3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgmapr3c3h2bs) | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztapa29l3fsmic12r0llrm3j5ui5bn07qpqtati8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgmapr3c3h2bs) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpr1u1haqokkjs6jfqknb14kh2cmgmlhogt2ien0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgmapr3c3h2bs) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfde2enpreh9dlfmp7gge2ca60isk5nvm4mnf8no_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgmapr3c3h2bs)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqcap0b4490qgnogvlifkkk7mi66pitihltn63p8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgmapr3c3h2bs)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfr4hc879avtg4cvhcbuo642tv8tumctajav20no_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clgmapr3c3h2bs) **
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2z3kp2kfp69hm1dt6vlsmt550c7hnjhlh7e5h0ofg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2lem9mkc7vm4obo27f9g8joh30orra5i1mv1ih8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cdim2pb7cdge49fg)

body:
Nearly everyone on this list said they're on Trump's team, not with the Liberals.
Hi again,
I wasn't planning on doing this but I'm really hoping you'll respond if I try one last time...
**Nearly everyone on this list said they 're on Trump's team, not with the Liberals.** Now I have the task of contacting the last remaining hold outs -- _including you._
[**I was able to extend your deadline to respond for just 10 more minutes. Can you take a moment to answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58730534:6FX0Ht2Nk:m:1:3253819041:5B1291087FA3359BD346F73028127FE8:r)
_\-- Sarah_

_\---------- Forwarded message \---------
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58730534:6FX0Ht2Nk:m:1:3253819041:5B1291087FA3359BD346F73028127FE8:r)
From: Sarah
Subject: quick question for you_
Hey there,
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58730534:6FX0Ht2Nk:m:1:3253819041:5B1291087FA3359BD346F73028127FE8:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58730534:6FX0Ht2Nk:m:1:3253819041:5B1291087FA3359BD346F73028127FE8:r)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58730534:6FX0Ht2Nk:m:1:3253819041:5B1291087FA3359BD346F73028127FE8:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah

| It seems we have triggered the radical Left by standing up for our American values and for being willing to actually fight for what we believe in.

When I launched **[CAVPAC](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731077:6Wkwht2FN:m:1:3298722022:ECBB6EA85E4264018A3F87C4A7F10D4F:r "CAVPAC
")** ,** ** we called on all patriotic Americans who care about our core values to join as Pipehitters in our Conservative Cavalry. This clearly spooked the Democrats because they started mocking me and our dedicated supporters.
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731077:6Wkwht2FN:m:1:3298722022:ECBB6EA85E4264018A3F87C4A7F10D4F:r)
---
But we don't back down in the face of attacks. Pipehitters are unapologetically American and will never give an inch in the fight for our future. _**Pipehitters are the radical Left 's worst nightmare because we won't let them destroy our country.**_

Working in the Trump Administration, I am used to being attacked by the "woke" mob for doing what is right. Thankfully, my parents raised me to not let bullies push me around. That's why I'm doubling down my efforts to recruit more proud Americans to join us in the battle for the future of our country.
**Show the Radical Left They Can 't Bully Us**
---
| | [CHIP IN TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731077:6Wkwht2FN:m:1:3298722022:ECBB6EA85E4264018A3F87C4A7F10D4F:r "Join CAVPAC")
---
Nothing will bother Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and AOC more than seeing a list of thousands and thousands of patriots who refuse to back down from our American values.

**[So, I'm encouraging every single principled conservative to join the CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry to send a clear message to the Left: we aren't giving an inch.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731077:6Wkwht2FN:m:1:3298722022:ECBB6EA85E4264018A3F87C4A7F10D4F:r "So, I’m
encouraging every single principled conservative to join the CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry to send a clear message to the Left: we aren’t giving
an inch.")**

The battle for the future of our country is a worthy one. **_The momentum is on our side, and we MUST act now._ **I know we will be victorious if grassroot conservatives from all across the country join me in championing American values.

Never Give An Inch,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731077:6Wkwht2FN:m:1:3298722022:ECBB6EA85E4264018A3F87C4A7F10D4F:r)

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

name: EddieGeller.com
subject: Reality check
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38479038/315643430/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211110frreality_EGweb_full_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGZjM2YyYy0yNjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThKyMlUY4-E_9HE9ZRhqxcd2nJGF8Qs8-3WtuM-VyOg=)
---
It’s us again, friends, Team Eddie reaching out about a fundraising situation...
(This is absolutely not a “the-sky-is-falling-and-you’re-the-worst-person-in-the-world-if-you-don’t-donate-right-now" email. **What it _is_ is a reality check.**)
The reality is our fundraising numbers have taken a major dip since the end of our first quarter. And even though we’ve outpaced Scott Franklin in total dollars raised since we launched this campaign, with the way things unfolded in Virginia, we’re getting a little worried.
But hand-wringing won’t get us anywhere. We don’t need more think pieces or hot takes, and we definitely don’t need to despair, because _we _can_ win this race_.
**We just need a little... momentum!**
[**Can you pitch in just $5 to Eddie’s Momentum Fund?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38479042/315643433/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211110frreality_EGweb_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGZjM2YyYy0yNjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThKyMlUY4-E_9HE9ZRhqxcd2nJGF8Qs8-3WtuM-VyOg=)
[Chip in to Eddie’s Momentum Fund ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38479045/315643436/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211110frreality_EGweb_full_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGZjM2YyYy0yNjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ThKyMlUY4-E_9HE9ZRhqxcd2nJGF8Qs8-3WtuM-VyOg=)
---
Thanks for anything you can do to help us get back on track!
— Team Eddie

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
| | | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122523:sQVqcmHTN:m:1:2365227053:4C2EB05725E1DEC6296586C25EA520DB:r)
---
Peter,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

Just the other day, FBI surveillance video which had been kept from Kyle's defense team for months was finally attained, and it clearly shows Kyle was the victim of a planned and violent ambush.

**The good news is this - Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122523:sQVqcmHTN:m:1:2365227053:4C2EB05725E1DEC6296586C25EA520DB:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122523:sQVqcmHTN:m:1:2365227053:4C2EB05725E1DEC6296586C25EA520DB:r)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122523:sQVqcmHTN:m:1:2365227053:4C2EB05725E1DEC6296586C25EA520DB:r)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122523:sQVqcmHTN:m:1:2365227053:4C2EB05725E1DEC6296586C25EA520DB:r)

name: Mike Lee
subject: Here's how we can wipe socialism out of our schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731994:6nr7it2Nr:m:1:3298722022:81D4CBD6692F1A45D83237A4B93DA396:r)

Peter,

Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide and our children are being influenced to adopt radical beliefs that could destroy our culture and our Republic.

Fortunately, I believe there is a solution that could help turn the tide, educate our country's youth against the dangers of socialism, and teach young people about the ideas of liberty.

My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of the Tuttle Twins, a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. _He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books into the hands of homeschool families, public schools, and libraries_.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731994:6nr7it2Nr:m:1:3298722022:81D4CBD6692F1A45D83237A4B93DA396:r)
Connor helped me get elected back in 2010\. Since then, he founded the Libertas Institute, a free market think tank headquartered in our home state, Utah. Connor was inspired to write the Tuttle Twins series when he was unable to find a way to teach his own kids about the ideas of freedom.

So far, Connor has distributed over 2 million copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and children across the country. **Connor is leading the fight against socialist indoctrination in our schools creating a new generation of young people who love the ideas of liberty and our country. **

[**Here is how Connor and the Libertas Institute plan to distribute 1,000,000 new copies of the Tuttle Twins:**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731994:6nr7it2Nr:m:1:3298722022:81D4CBD6692F1A45D83237A4B93DA396:r)
1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history will receive copies for education at home.
2. The Libertas Institute then plans to place tens of thousands of copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.
3. In order to do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. [**It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731994:6nr7it2Nr:m:1:3298722022:81D4CBD6692F1A45D83237A4B93DA396:r)

**The reality is neither Rand Paul, Ted Cruz, nor myself can defeat socialism alone ... we need a new generation of young conservatives willing to stand up for the Constitution and our freedoms.**

You and I can help save the younger generation from socialism by supplying these children and their families the Tuttle Twins books!

**I spoke with Connor Boyack, the President of the Libertas Institute and author of the books, and gave him my word I would help him raise $20,000 to fund distribution of the Tuttle Twins books to homeschool children, parents, and kids in public schools.[_Please consider donating the most generous amount you can to help put a Tuttle Twins book in the hands of a young child_! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731994:6nr7it2Nr:m:1:3298722022:81D4CBD6692F1A45D83237A4B93DA396:r)**

***PLEASE NOTE: All online donations are being matched by one of the Libertas Institute 's biggest supporters, John Pestana. This means your donation is DOUBLED! If you donate $100, John Pestana. will personally match it with another $100 gift.***

[**Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 Here >>>
Donate 2 Tuttle Twins book for $20 Here >>>
Donate 5 Tuttle Twins book for $50 Here >>>
Donate 10 Tuttle Twins book for $100 Here >>>
Donate 25 Tuttle Twins book for $250 Here >>>
Donate 50 Tuttle Twins book for $500 Here >>>
Donate 100 Tuttle Twins book for $1,000 Here >>>
Donate Any Amount Here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731994:6nr7it2Nr:m:1:3298722022:81D4CBD6692F1A45D83237A4B93DA396:r)

The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them.

Parents aren't forcing their kids to read them. They are written for children to enjoy and learn at the same time.

**This is the most promising path to save our kids from indoctrination and the dangers of socialism. You and I can create a new generation of young conservatives to preserve our Republic. **

As I said, Connor is a great friend of mine and I believe in what he is doing. The Libertas Institute and the Tuttle Twins are transforming this country and one our most promising ways to fight back against socialism in schools.

[**Please help me raise $20,000 in the next 48 hours by clicking here to make a donation and distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins to thousands of kids across the country! **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731994:6nr7it2Nr:m:1:3298722022:81D4CBD6692F1A45D83237A4B93DA396:r)

Peter, I suspect you get a dozen emails asking you to donate every week.

This is much different.

This isn't for some campaign or candidate that needs money.

This is a cause I am passionate about and believe can reverse the influence of socialism in our society. We just need to distribute these books and begin teaching our nation's youth about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history.

It seems like you love our country, the ideas of liberty, and the Constitution as much as I do.

Which is why I am emailing you.

Please consider making the most generous donation you can and help me restore our Republic.

Please consider this a personal and urgent request from me.

[**Here is the link to donate again.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731994:6nr7it2Nr:m:1:3298722022:81D4CBD6692F1A45D83237A4B93DA396:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731994:6nr7it2Nr:m:1:3298722022:81D4CBD6692F1A45D83237A4B93DA396:r)
Senator Mike Lee

Paid for by Libertas Institute

| It seems we have triggered the radical Left by standing up for our American values and for being willing to actually fight for what we believe in.

When I launched **[CAVPAC](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731538:64FYWt2XN:m:1:3253819041:0FEEF6C50D2B6CC69DAE3393EF5E38D5:r "CAVPAC
")** ,** ** we called on all patriotic Americans who care about our core values to join as Pipehitters in our Conservative Cavalry. This clearly spooked the Democrats because they started mocking me and our dedicated supporters.
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731538:64FYWt2XN:m:1:3253819041:0FEEF6C50D2B6CC69DAE3393EF5E38D5:r)
---
But we don't back down in the face of attacks. Pipehitters are unapologetically American and will never give an inch in the fight for our future. _**Pipehitters are the radical Left 's worst nightmare because we won't let them destroy our country.**_

Working in the Trump Administration, I am used to being attacked by the "woke" mob for doing what is right. Thankfully, my parents raised me to not let bullies push me around. That's why I'm doubling down my efforts to recruit more proud Americans to join us in the battle for the future of our country.
**Show the Radical Left They Can 't Bully Us******************

CAVPAC")
---
Nothing will bother Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and AOC more than seeing a list of thousands and thousands of patriots who refuse to back down from our American values.

**[So, I'm encouraging every single principled conservative to join the CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry to send a clear message to the Left: we aren't giving an inch.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731538:64FYWt2XN:m:1:3253819041:0FEEF6C50D2B6CC69DAE3393EF5E38D5:r "So, I’m encouraging every single principled conservative to join the CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry to send a clear message to the Left: we
aren’t giving an inch.")**

The battle for the future of our country is a worthy one. **_The momentum is on our side, and we MUST act now._ **I know we will be victorious if grassroot conservatives from all across the country join me in championing American values.

Never Give An Inch,

name: Adam Laxalt
subject: BREAKING NEWS: GOP Nevada Senate race moves to "Toss-up" as momentum shifts toward us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAXALT FOR SENATE
body:
Republicans are ready to FLIP the Senate!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58732156:J4jHWt2Nh:m:1:3299561967:43CF4D9F98AAFD24C871619D31EDE769:r)
Patriot,

In the wake of historic victories in formerly deep-blue Virginia, Nevada Republicans are ready to flip the Senate as momentum shifts toward our movement.

The University of Virginia's Center for Politics - one of the most well-known political analysis organizations in the nation - has moved Nevada's Senate race from "Leans Democrat" to "Toss-up." Because I represent the biggest threat to their majority, Democrats are already focusing their false attacks on me.

This is a major sign of momentum and a clear recognition by the national media that Catherine Cortez Masto is on the ropes. [**Whatever you can give -- even just $1 -- we need your help to keep this huge momentum going.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58732156:J4jHWt2Nh:m:1:3299561967:43CF4D9F98AAFD24C871619D31EDE769:r) [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58732156:J4jHWt2Nh:m:1:3299561967:43CF4D9F98AAFD24C871619D31EDE769:r)
---

Virginia showed what we've known for a long time - especially here in Nevada - that parents are stepping up to fight for their children's education. They won't stand for critical race theory indoctrinations or efforts by radical liberals to get between them and their kids.

The results last night are no surprise to those of us but if we want change, we must continue the fight and make sure our voices are heard loud and clear next November, just as Virginians made their voices heard last night.

I am thankful for your continued support as we fight to protect Nevada. With your help - along with leaders like President Trump and Governor DeSantis who have endorsed my candidacy - we will be victorious.

Best,
Adam Laxalt

\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58732157:J4jHWt2Nh:m:1:3299561967:43CF4D9F98AAFD24C871619D31EDE769:r) A note for Patriot, from Adam Laxalt:

Patriot, thank you for your support as I take on the Democrat establishment to FLIP Nevada and the U.S. Senate. Our movement is off to a great start, but the battle has just begun.

Even CNN has rated my race one of the MOST LIKELY blue to red flips for 2022. It's clear, the road to the Senate majority runs through Nevada, but I need your immediate help to fight back against the Democrats' fundraising machine.

[**Help restore a Republican majority**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58732157:J4jHWt2Nh:m:1:3299561967:43CF4D9F98AAFD24C871619D31EDE769:r)
Thank you for all your support,
Adam Laxalt
Candidate for U.S. Senate

Hi there --
This is Jordan from Republican Headquarters. I heard my colleague, Sarah, reached out to you a few times. President Trump is building a platform for proud American Patriots like you and me. He promised: ✖️ No Conservative censorship ✖️<< No shadow bans ✖️ No blacklists. It's incredible!

Courage, Strength and Valor
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zoOtlNKC8FeHUYKTzKygU88xP9J-FQ6yU214Q3ngP7ga9i6QAXpoUkoJbRTpi_bQvDOP7_Qf3SCgRxT0Ax6NU29qinUoVr3XoHmXjqDy9sHgfYo9Ckq0AW31t-XumJRjY1Mt-YSH1BYM8a4RdklAh0_KqJrRGg-a&c=_ShO20tlqlL2beoVaj3ePWmRRTwQcVIiKrSW7zo36SW0cP_h6m4Kiw==&ch=eiFTC33_lveF6gwkAsARZ-oYly28Y9uY-noHgGjka-Lcv4Yg8vI0Tg==)

|
# Courage, Strength and Valor
---
There is something special about the American continent which was embodied in the indigenous peoples who lived here before us. The American Spirit was alive in the freedom-loving Native Americans, and with courage, strength and valor they fought to preserve their freedom and way of life against British, French and Spanish colonists. Over time, the American Spirit took root in the settlers themselves when they fought against overwhelming odds to defeat the British Empire in the American Revolution. The breath of this Spirit inspired the US Constitution and a government "of the people, by the people, for the people" and nothing has matched the freedom of this continent in history. Native Americans exemplified the will to freedom, and many gave everything to resist encroachment upon their way of life. In their own way, they resisted the will of Empire, recognizing that dying Free was greater than living enchained. Now, the threat of Empire is once again encroaching upon the citizens of this great land. Regardless of race, color or creed, the threat of tyranny looms, embodied in a government that has embraced a Radical Left Socialist future, seeking to destroy the founding principles of this country and to remake it in a wholly different vision than that of the First Nations or our Founders. Now is the time to embrace the courage, strength, dignity and resilience of our Native American predecessors by resisting the tyrannical dictates of Empire. This is the new Civil Rights movement. It is no longer about skin color or gender. It is about our unalienable rights as human beings. I will stand with you against unconstitutional mandates and government destruction of your civil liberties. Together we will restore our government to one "of the people, by the people, for the people."
---

We have our fundraising needs broken down into quarterly, monthly, and even weekly goals, with targets for each geographic area too. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I got another fine from Nancy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731671:6Gaw3t2NW:m:1:3253819041:848143E56040739D572BF5D4D1400136:r "Headline") Peter: I will never allow Nancy Pelosi to tell me what to do. I don't care how many times she threatens me, and I don't care how many times she fines me. I will not wear a face diaper - they do nothing to protect anyone. This, of course, forces Nancy to retire to her fainting couch in horror. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731671:6Gaw3t2NW:m:1:3253819041:848143E56040739D572BF5D4D1400136:r "Nancy")**_Good. Angering Nancy Pelosi is the surest sign I know how to show I am on the right track.[If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to take actions that make her FURIOUS.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731671:6Gaw3t2NW:m:1:3253819041:848143E56040739D572BF5D4D1400136:r "If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to
take actions that make her FURIOUS.")_** I was born in America, and I am free - my freedom is my birthright. That birthright is behind every vote I take in Congress, and I will never stop fighting for freedom. Sadly, for our nation, my commitment to our freedom makes me a target for so many powerful entities. **[I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731671:6Gaw3t2NW:m:1:3253819041:848143E56040739D572BF5D4D1400136:r "I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict
your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.")** They HATE our freedom and our unwillingness to accept their socialist takeover. They HATED President Trump for fighting to protect it. They HATE me for continuing that work. And that HATE colors every decision they make, just as my love for America colors every decision I make to uphold our Constitution. I will not wear a mask simply because Nancy Pelosi and Anthony Fauci decreed it, and I won't stop fighting for this nation. We will make decisions about our "public safety," and we'll never allow the radical left to force their demands on us. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731671:6Gaw3t2NW:m:1:3253819041:848143E56040739D572BF5D4D1400136:r "Not when I have patriots like you on my team.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731671:6Gaw3t2NW:m:1:3253819041:848143E56040739D572BF5D4D1400136:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)
---

name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: 8,765 Hours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58733582:JR1a3t2N3:m:1:3103520637:11692DD0B73D4011D7A7806FB69A3193:r "Headline") Peter, It's not just the socialists that are not on our side. Time isn't on our side either. In one year, the future direction of our country will be determined. That's it...one year. 12 Months 52 Weeks 365 Days 8,765 Hours 25,949 Minutes **That is all the time we have left to save America from forces inside the halls of Congress that are seeking to turn this nation into a socialist nightmare.** **[I will work nonstop to win my race on November 8, 2022, to continue fighting for your freedom, but I need your help with an early donation of $36.50, $365, or any amount you afford.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58733583:JR1a3t2N3:m:1:3103520637:11692DD0B73D4011D7A7806FB69A3193:r "I will work nonstop to win my race on November 8, 2022, to continue
fighting for your freedom, but I need your help with an early donation of $36.50, $365, or any amount you afford.")** I'm Andy Biggs, Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus and a Congressman from the border state of Arizona. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58733582:JR1a3t2N3:m:1:3103520637:11692DD0B73D4011D7A7806FB69A3193:r "Andy Biggs")As a leader in the fight for freedom, I know better than anyone what's at stake next November if we don't pull out all the stops and start preparing TODAY. President Trump's fight to drain the swamp scared them - liberals had no idea we saw through their lies. They are done biding their time - now, they will move quickly.
* **_THEY WILL_** bankrupt the nation.
* **_THEY WILL_** open the borders indefinitely.
* **_THEY WILL_** put the Government in charge of ALL your healthcare decisions.
* **_THEY WILL_** make abortion available on demand.
* **_THEY WILL_** confiscate your guns.
* **_THEY WILL_** _defund the police and make us all live under fear._

All in the name of **" public safety" and "social justice."** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58733582:JR1a3t2N3:m:1:3103520637:11692DD0B73D4011D7A7806FB69A3193:r "Counter") We've seen the damage the socialists have done in just over a year. **As just one example, imagine the millions of illegal immigrants who could flood our borders in the next year alone.** If we don't stop the socialists now, they will transform America into something unrecognizable. **_We must defeat them at the ballot box in 2022. They are aiming for a permanent majority in both houses. They even want to stack the decks by adding more justices to the Supreme Court._** That way, even if a Republican does get into the White House, they will simply impeach him. **[We saw them do it before, and if we don't stop them, they will do it again.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58733582:JR1a3t2N3:m:1:3103520637:11692DD0B73D4011D7A7806FB69A3193:r "We saw them do it before, and if we don’t stop them, they
will do it again.")** A year may sound like a long time - but I promise you, it will be gone before you know it. **[So when Election Day comes, will you be able to say you did all you could to fight the radical leftists who hate this nation?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58733582:JR1a3t2N3:m:1:3103520637:11692DD0B73D4011D7A7806FB69A3193:r "So when Election Day comes, will you be able to say you did all
you could to fight the radical leftists who hate this nation?")** America has woken up to the woke policies of Joe Biden and the destruction it is causing our families. The wind is at our sails. The time to strike is NOW. If we wait, we will lose this moment in history to take our country back. God Bless America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58733582:JR1a3t2N3:m:1:3103520637:11692DD0B73D4011D7A7806FB69A3193:r "Andy
Biggs") Rep. Andy Biggs (AZ-5) **P.S. The only way to undo the damage done by the socialists is to WIN IN 2022![If you cherish this nation, then you need to join me.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58733582:JR1a3t2N3:m:1:3103520637:11692DD0B73D4011D7A7806FB69A3193:r "If you cherish this nation, then you need to join me.")**
---

name: Elaine Luria
subject: 2022 is a different story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Qcer5brm1cgA_OmXe8-eMtqit-uZ2jwze9fOo0F-O3I=/tqN4zJGPzKXJaAYvr2V8_D6m9WLKd-CtLYfNARHqw_8=?refcode=20211110_RN_EL)
---
Friend, In 2018, I was the underdog candidate. Poll after poll had me down in the run up to Election Day. But we didn't give up -- and thanks to the hard work of this team to organize in every corner of the district, we beat the odds and WON by just over two points. But it's one thing to run as a first-time candidate who's under the radar -- it's a completely different story when you're a Democratic congresswoman defending an R+1 district when Republicans are just five seats away from winning a House majority. [**We 'll need to fight even harder to defend this seat in 2022 -- so if you're able to, I'm asking you to split a contribution of $25 between my campaign and The Way Ahead today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Qcer5brm1cgA_OmXe8-eMtqit-uZ2jwze9fOo0F-O3I=/tqN4zJGPzKXJaAYvr2V8_D6m9WLKd-CtLYfNARHqw_8=?refcode=20211110_RN_EL) Your contribution will be critical to ensuring we have the resources to counter GOP misinformation and set the record straight about my work in Congress fighting on behalf of Coastal Virginians. Thank you for stepping up, Elaine

I want to make sure you saw this important email from Barbara Bollier about my campaign for Senate.

With less than a year until the midterms **we have to quickly build momentum if we are going to defeat Jerry Moran — _this seat could decide who controls the Senate._**

[Please support my campaign by clicking on this link now — any amount makes a big difference. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38484958/315670025/1159943518?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_3MO_211110_1_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDVkNWViMC0zNTQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L9IJRELZWzEgMrJNVozEPPoGUpjk7rLXLauNgCUDwJ0=)

**_\-- Begin forwarded message from Barbara Bollier --_**
Hi friends,

Thank you again for making me your 2020 Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate here in Kansas. With your help, we ran a ground-breaking campaign. To continue that momentum, I am writing to tell you about my friend, Reverend Mark Holland. Mark is a fourth generation Kansan, a father, a former mayor, and a pastor, and he is now running for US Senate. [Please join me in supporting his campaign »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38484963/315670031/1159943518?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_3MO_211110_1_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDVkNWViMC0zNTQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L9IJRELZWzEgMrJNVozEPPoGUpjk7rLXLauNgCUDwJ0=)

Friends, you helped me build an amazing foundation that changed the way people think about US Senate races in Kansas. This is the kind of foundation that red states like Arizona, Georgia, and Texas have built upon for Democratic wins. These wins were considered impossible just a few years ago. This is the direction we are taking Kansas when you help Mark the way you helped me. Let’s keep the momentum going!

But I won’t sugar-coat this, folks; It is an uphill battle. I know firsthand that the Republican Party will stop at nothing to ensure Jerry Moran stays in the Senate. Millions of dollars of dark money will pour into our state and the national GOP arm will do everything they can to smear Mark. **We have to be ready to fight back.**

[I know that with your support, Mark can stand strong against the GOP attacks that will come. Any amount helps. **Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Fox News says "THANK YOU"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, The Proud Boys — a violent militia group that takes orders from Donald Trump and stormed the Capitol on January 6 — have repeatedly made credible threats on Senator Raphael Warnock's life. Now they're being hailed as heroes by the right-wing media. This week Tucker Carlson launched what he calls a “documentary series” about the insurrection. In reality, the series glorifies Proud Boys, Oath Keepers, and all violent extremists who tried to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election. Republicans are openly thanking The Proud Boys for handling their dirty work. Meanwhile, members of the Proud Boys have stockpiled over 1,000 rounds of ammunition and threatened Raphael Warnock's life online, writing “Dead men can't pass laws,” and that they will “keep watching for the signal” from Donald Trump. Look, these people aren't playing games. Donald Trump — who urged his Proud Boys supporters to storm the Capitol on January 6 and then delayed calling in the National Guard to give the Proud Boys time and cover — tapped Herschel Walker to oust Warnock. Walker just won endorsements from Mitch McConnell and the entire GOP establishment. Now he's surging in the polls just after raising an unbelievable $3.7 million in the first weeks of his campaign. If Herschel Walker successfully steals Warnock's Senate seat, Mitch McConnell will regain control of the Senate overnight. That means: Goodbye, gun reform. Goodbye, voting rights. Hello, emboldened Proud Boys. Hello, Trump 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, but up against the right-wing media's propaganda blitz and Trump & Co's millions, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives, and we're still down $1,250 on our daily fundraising goal. That means Raphael Warnock is in serious trouble. Listen, YOU sent Raphael Warnock to the Senate in the first place, Peter. So it's thanks to you that we have a 50/50 Senate Majority to protect right now. Don't let all your hard work go to waste— step up right now to help us protect Warnock, expand our majority, and end the extremist vein running through the Party of Trump straight into our political system. **[Take a stand, Peter: Please take a moment to donate right now and help us hit tonight's fundraising deadline. The Republican establishment's collusion with domestic terrorists must end today— that means we must protect Raphael Warnock and expand our razor-thin 50/50 Senate Majority at all costs. Please, Peter, rush in $5, $10, $25, or even more right now and help us get this country back on the right track.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38486113/315675317/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20211110_GEN_FDR_A&refcode2=NG211110&refcode3=ASC2ww8wLq9zz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhYTE4ZmVlLTM2NDItZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w3JC3_A_ZLOYUpwTI6Ul7XBBnSp2KUEcdVH5aURSd10=)** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
