name: Tyler Harper for Georgia
subject: STATE SCHOOL SUPERINTENDENT RICHARD WOODS ENDORSES TYLER HARPER
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 10, 2021
---
| SCHOOL SUPERINTENDENT RICHARD WOODS ENDORSES TYLER HARPER FOR AGRICULTURE COMMISSIONER
---
| OCILLA - Today, Georgia Superintendent of Schools Richard Woods announced his endorsement of Tyler Harper to be the state's next Commissioner of Agriculture. Woods, a 25-year public educator, was first elected as head of the Department of Education in 2014 and under his leadership, Georgia's K-12 education system has seen significant success.
---
|
---
| "I'm proud to endorse my good friend Tyler Harper for Commissioner of Agriculture," State Superintendent Woods said. "I've had the pleasure of knowing Tyler for many years, going back to his time as one of my students at Irwin County High School--and from a young age his passion and understanding of the agriculture industry was readily apparent. I can tell you without a doubt Tyler has the experience, work ethic, plan and vision to fight for our state's farmers, producers, and consumers. Tyler will also continue to strengthen the partnerships between the Department of Agriculture and the Department of Education so that we can invest in the next generation of agriculture and set our ag students up for success. I hope you'll join me in voting for Tyler Harper to be our state's next Commissioner of Agriculture and help advance our state's number one industry!"
---
|
---
| Tyler Harper said, "I'm honored to have the endorsement of State School Superintendent Richard Woods. Having been a student in Mr. Woods class at Irwin County High School, I know that his dedication and passion for our education system is second to none. As your next Agriculture Commissioner, I'll make investing in the next generation of agricultural leaders a priority and ensure that our number one industry has the talent, resources, and expertise to be successful for generations to come. I look forward to working with Superintendent Woods to build on our partnerships and help our state continue to grow."
---
| | |
---
| About Richard Woods
Richard Woods was born in Pensacola, Florida and while growing up in a military family, lived in California, Hawaii and Virginia before moving to Georgia. He graduated from Fitzgerald High School, and went on to receive a Bachelor's Degree from Kennesaw State University and a Master's Degree from Valdosta State University.
Woods has over 25 years of pre-k through 12th grade experience in public education. Woods was a high school teacher for 14 years, serving as department chair and teacher mentor. During his tenure, he was also selected as Teacher of the Year. For eight years Woods served in various administrative roles such as assistant principal, principal, curriculum director, testing coordinator, pre-k director, and alternative school director.
Woods also brings a business background to the superintendent's position, having been a purchasing agent for a national/multi-national laser company and a former small business owner. He and his wife Lisha, a retired 30-year educator, are long-time residents of Tifton and have been married for 27 years.
About Tyler Harper
As a 7th generation farmer and small businessman who still uses his grandfather's tractor in the fields tending the same land that his family has had for over 100 years, Tyler Harper has a deep, personal appreciation for Georgia's agricultural industry - and the millions of local growers it supports. Since 2013, he has worked to defend Georgia's largest sector as a State Senator - where he currently serves in leadership on the Natural Resources, Public Safety, and Agriculture Committees. Additionally, Tyler currently serves as the Agriculture & Rural Development Vice-Chair of the Southern Legislative Conference. Over the years, he has championed our farms and farmers, worked to make them more competitive at home and abroad, and help cultivate the next generation of Georgia agriculture. As your next Agriculture Commissioner, Tyler will ensure our food supplies are kept safe, making sure that our families are fed. He will always put Georgia agriculture first and fight the overreach of Washington, D.C.
In addition to his work to protect agribusiness, Tyler Harper has also been a champion for conservative values. He supports President Trump's America First policies. He worked with Secretary Sonny Perdue to deliver results for Georgia. Tyler strongly supports secure borders, fully funding our law enforcement, strengthening election integrity, the sanctity of life, and our God-given 2nd Amendment rights. For his efforts, Tyler has earned an "A+" rating from the NRA, has been rated 100% pro-business by NFIB, and was deemed a "Defender of Liberty" by the American Conservative Union.
Tyler Harper lives in Ocilla and is a lifelong resident of South Georgia. He graduated from the University of Georgia with a bachelor's degree in Agricultural Engineering and holds an associate's degree from Abraham Baldwin Agricultural College. He is an active member in his local community and has helped lead organizations across the state - from his local rotary club, to the Georgia Young Farmers Association, to the UGA College of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences. When he is not serving the state at the Gold Dome or working on the family farm, Tyler can be found enjoying the outdoors - or at Satilla Baptist Church, where he plays in the band every Sunday.
---
| | |
---
| Visit www.tylerharperga.com to stay up to date with the campaign, sign up to volunteer, and donate. Follow along on Tyler's campaign for Agriculture Commissioner on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010p1btvVHD0OlI37IdkYwl9ygNmRTa18azGsSq90NcN4EWIxTrd029W7Cb4KB-fjSoqmJcaI_q92NapRVDvaX1RdFXF-ZKjinJ_KfF5KhCxRkEQjXVjpBKfQbYaf1vMd0w8qgf6Ytl_XoX55wbjAUe3SRFVMF_tVDCNvY5F7E9OA=&c=J5N06wPR2Utak921L-z6F816am2_i0f4tgdlwiybWexYmP6e2HfXzA==&ch=iiGThW04E_KPhUTcPL2HEIbN4VaY2L17t06zGvU2paMsdhXVmwVqrg==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010p1btvVHD0OlI37IdkYwl9ygNmRTa18azGsSq90NcN4EWIxTrd029W7Cb4KB-fjS1bEKKsqQ-gNI7zeDhQv6hCsRcmSF5EJQuQKrE8MUaunnKeNXtRnfH0F9lEtyhEhewPwlILeV1G2LLT7a-JhLRdElJud8PY82&c=J5N06wPR2Utak921L-z6F816am2_i0f4tgdlwiybWexYmP6e2HfXzA==&ch=iiGThW04E_KPhUTcPL2HEIbN4VaY2L17t06zGvU2paMsdhXVmwVqrg==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010p1btvVHD0OlI37IdkYwl9ygNmRTa18azGsSq90NcN4EWIxTrd029W7Cb4KB-fjSJoo9PmpZnawBf8lrawOiw8h72qiHsBgRtNFxm7_lVZksjZEvimKag7s23xW3N2a7jIrkQ3Rz81hgX85BAU8Te_2Fzdp3c6GI&c=J5N06wPR2Utak921L-z6F816am2_i0f4tgdlwiybWexYmP6e2HfXzA==&ch=iiGThW04E_KPhUTcPL2HEIbN4VaY2L17t06zGvU2paMsdhXVmwVqrg==).

name: Ammon Bundy for Governor
subject: Dr. Ron Paul Endorsed Ammon Bundy / Watch the Virtual TownHall on Eduaction - History, Challeges & Solutions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Peter,Last night during the Virtual TownHall we announced Dr. Ron Paul's endorsement and posted a video he made expressing his support for me as Governor. I am humbled that he would publicly give me his endorsement and support. There is no other national figure that I would rather have an endorsement from. Dr. Paul has united more people under the cause of liberty than any other person in recent history. He has always stood strong upon correct principles and not cowered from calling a spade a spade. Dr. Paul has educated millions of people in ways that very few people would or can. He is a humble man that loves God, family and country. I could not be more pleased that he has put his name in support of mine. Last night during the Virtual Townhall we had a lot of fun, especially in the beginning. We had a troll who was expressing himself, well, should we say, in a very colorful way. Somehow he was not muted and let everyone in the Virtual Townhall know it. I'm sure moms were covering their children's ears. It is no secret that wicked people hate me. I stand against everything they love and they are going to keep attacking me until I stop expressing truth and exposing their ways. Attack and hate from the wicked is something I have become accustomed to, but I apologize that you had to experience it for yourselves last night. We will do a better job next time in making sure people like him are not allowed to express themselves in that way. After the Virtual Townhall we did some editing and made a PG version so your family and friends can watch it. Here is the link to share with all your contacts. <https://www.votebundy.com/campaign-events/virtual-townhall/november-2021-replay/>. Our discussion on education during the Virtual Townhall was productive. The history of education in this country is very important to understand. The first cycle of education (1640 - 1887) was so effective that America was propelled into the most productive, most free, and most prosperous country ever known. In 1905 the people in the United States made up only 6% of the world population, but were producing over 50% of the world's goods. Then we entered into the second education cycle, where the state began to dominate classrooms, allowing unproven theories to be taught and influence children. This has lead us to where we are now. Watch this Virtual Townhall for much more detail. Here is the link again to share and watch: <https://www.votebundy.com/campaign-events/virtual-townhall/november-2021-replay/>.
Thank you, Ammon Bundy
* * *

* * *

You received this email because your email address was submitted to us through [our website](https://www.votebundy.com). If you did not authorize use of this email address, or no longer wish to receive such messages, please simply [unsubscribe](https://team.votebundy.com/unsubscribe?id=8d545fe0-6532-4b1e-8220-7189428a1194) to immediately have your address removed from our mailing list.

name: Team Mondaire
subject: Health care is a human right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Hi team,
Health care is a human right, but millions of Americans are currently uninsured or underinsured.
It is disgraceful that millions of Americans are forced to work after retirement or crowdfund just to afford medical procedures or see a doctor.
COVID-19 has underscored how vital high-quality, affordable health care is and why it should not be contingent on income or employment status.
Since early 2020, over 46 million Americans have contracted COVID-19, and many have faced significant barriers to testing and treatment as a result of being uninsured or underinsured.
Mondaire is fed up with his colleagues dragging their feet at taking meaningful action to address health care access for all Americans. He’s also a leading advocate for Medicare for All.
He has co-sponsored the _Medicare for All Act of 2021_ , and recently he successfully fought to include provisions in the _Build Back Better Act_ that make health care affordable for millions more Americans.
Medicare for All is supported by 87 percent of Democratic voters — and if we fight hard enough, we can make passing this bill a reality.
**[Team, we cannot continue to let our friends, family, and neighbors suffer financial hardship or go without medical care because they cannot afford the cost of being sick in our country. Please add your name next to Mondaire’s to urge Congress to pass Medicare for All legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38489977/315692949/1747752821?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211110_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzRjY2U3My0zZjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=psNb1w8lEeHdPPNcL191Ngaf6rGzyOlKxSJWnaCzmVo=&emci=9dcfd91d-a540-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=5c4cce73-3f42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24719896)**

clean_body: Hi team, Health care is a human right, but millions of Americans are currently uninsured or underinsured. It is disgraceful that millions of Americans are forced to work after retirement or crowdfund just to afford medical procedures or see a doctor. COVID-19 has underscored how vital high-quality, affordable health care is and why it should not be contingent on income or employment status. Since early 2020, over 46 million Americans have contracted COVID-19, and many have faced significant barriers to testing and treatment as a result of being uninsured or underinsured. Mondaire is fed up with his colleagues dragging their feet at taking meaningful action to address health care access for all Americans. He’s also a leading advocate for Medicare for All. He has co-sponsored the Medicare for All Act of 2021 , and recently he successfully fought to include provisions in the Build Back Better Act that make health care affordable for millions more Americans. Medicare for All is supported by 87 percent of Democratic voters — and if we fight hard enough, we can make passing this bill a reality. This is our moment to pass life-improving policy and deliver for working families in NY-17 and our country. Thank you for standing with Mondaire, Team Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. name: Marco Rubio
subject: I want to thank Grassroots Patriots like you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Peter, I hope you're doing well since the last time I checked in.
|
---
| | |
Peter, I hope you're doing well since the last time I checked in.

First of all, I just want to thank you for your dedication to the conservative cause. It is because of grassroots patriots like you that Republicans are able to fight for conservative values. You understand what's at stake and you don't shy away from taking a stand when it's needed. That's why I wanted to come to you first with this offer.

**[I'm opening up my 2022 GOP Membership to top supporters only until midnight. Tomorrow morning, I'll be checking the first 50 names who responded, I hope I can count on seeing your name there!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58731169:JHvLnt27N:m:1:3253819041:BA098920C23156233FB65AE2573917EE:r "I’m opening

name: MartinForTN.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
| We wanted to make sure you saw Dr. Martin’s reflections at the one-year mark, Peter. It’s going to be a long, hard-fought race over the next year, but with Tennesseans like you and your neighbors on our side against Bill Lee’s dark money machine, __we can win this__ , and finally deliver honest, compassionate leadership to our state. [**Will you step up and help us show the grassroots, small-dollar power behind this campaign with a donation of just $3.63, one cent for every day left in the race?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38491946/315702138/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211110oneyear2_MFTweb_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNiYzhiYS00MzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_fOK_O6FCjH-tJMyyrsQCQdyL5gkhhEwArcC978r8A=) | [Give $3.63 ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38491947/315702139/-1311083504?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211110oneyear2_MFTweb_full_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNiYzhiYS00MzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_fOK_O6FCjH-tJMyyrsQCQdyL5gkhhEwArcC978r8A=)
---
That’s how we’re going to win this — one campaign stop, conversation, phone call, and small dollar donation at a time.
Thanks for being a part of our movement.
\--------Forwarded message--------
From: Dr. Jason Martin
Date: November 8, 2021
Subject: One year from today
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38491948/315702140/-1311083504?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211110oneyear2_MFTweb_full_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNiYzhiYS00MzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_fOK_O6FCjH-tJMyyrsQCQdyL5gkhhEwArcC978r8A=)
---
**One year from today, Peter, Tennesseans will go to the polls to choose their next governor.**
At this milestone, I wanted to take a minute to step back and reflect on how far we’ve come in just a few months.
When we launched this campaign, I said in my announcement speech that this would be a campaign for ALL Tennesseans. No matter what you look like, where you were raised, or who you’ve voted for in the past, this campaign is for anyone who believes in those core Tennessee values of hospitality, volunteerism, and caring for our neighbors — the same values that our corrupt leaders have abandoned for lies, conspiracy theories, and divisiveness.
At every stop on our campaign’s 95 County Tour (83 down, 12 to go!), I’ve met with Tennesseans who are desperate for change. People like you and me with families, who want to be able to afford good healthcare, be paid fairly for a hard day’s work, and be able to provide their children with a strong education.
These conversations — one individual, lunch, event, or gathering at a time — are the highlight of my experience on the campaign trail so far:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38491949/315702141/-1311083504?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211110oneyear2_MFTweb_full_SLA_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNiYzhiYS00MzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_fOK_O6FCjH-tJMyyrsQCQdyL5gkhhEwArcC978r8A=)
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38491950/315702142/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211110oneyear2_MFTweb_full_SLA_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNiYzhiYS00MzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_fOK_O6FCjH-tJMyyrsQCQdyL5gkhhEwArcC978r8A=)
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38491951/315702143/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211110oneyear2_MFTweb_full_SLA_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODNiYzhiYS00MzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_fOK_O6FCjH-tJMyyrsQCQdyL5gkhhEwArcC978r8A=)
---
I am not a career politician. I am not “the establishment” candidate — but I am a fighter. I am a respected physician, a concerned dad and husband, and a dedicated Tennessean.
I’m also a truth-teller, like it or not. **And here’s what I know to be true:**
We can thrive with improved education for ALL Tennesseans.
We can thrive with better healthcare.
We can thrive by growing businesses that strengthen families.
And we can thrive by fortifying rural Tennessee and modernizing our infrastructure.
**Together, Tennessee thrives.**
Thank you for joining us as we work to restore real leadership for the people of our great state.
— Dr. Martin

clean_body: | We wanted to make sure you saw Dr. Martin’s reflections at the one-year mark, Peter. It’s going to be a long, hard-fought race over the next year, but with Tennesseans like you and your neighbors on our side against Bill Lee’s dark money machine, we can win this , and finally deliver honest, compassionate leadership to our state. = | = That’s how we’re going to win this — one campaign stop, conversation, phone call, and small dollar donation at a time. Thanks for being a part of our movement. \--------Forwarded message-------- From: Dr. Jason Martin Date: November 8, 2021 Subject: One year from today = One year from today, Peter, Tennesseans will go to the polls to choose their next governor. At this milestone, I wanted to take a minute to step back and reflect on how far we’ve come in just a few months. When we launched this campaign, I said in my announcement speech that this would be a campaign for ALL Tennesseans. No matter what you look like, where you were raised, or who you’ve voted for in the past, this campaign is for anyone who believes in those core Tennessee values of hospitality, volunteerism, and caring for our neighbors — the same values that our corrupt leaders have abandoned for lies, conspiracy theories, and divisiveness. At every stop on our campaign’s 95 County Tour (83 down, 12 to go!), I’ve met with Tennesseans who are desperate for change. People like you and me with families, who want to be able to afford good healthcare, be paid fairly for a hard day’s work, and be able to provide their children with a strong education. These conversations — one individual, lunch, event, or gathering at a time — are the highlight of my experience on the campaign trail so far: = = = I am not a career politician. I am not “the establishment” candidate — but I am a fighter. I am a respected physician, a concerned dad and husband, and a dedicated Tennessean. I’m also a truth-teller, like it or not. And here’s what I know to be true: We can thrive with improved education for ALL Tennesseans. We can thrive with better healthcare. We can thrive by growing businesses that strengthen families. And we can thrive by fortifying rural Tennessee and modernizing our infrastructure. Together, Tennessee thrives. Thank you for joining us as we work to restore real leadership for the people of our great state. — Dr. Martin P.S. One of the best ways you can help our campaign sustain momentum over the next year is by making a recurring donation.= goes a long way towards fueling our operations and efforts to reach Tennesseans where they are. = | Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee 1831 12th Avenue S #175 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision,
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735275:6fR_nt2Nc:m:1:3299561967:5E81C00270602250904E59F43A649821:r)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I 'm 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That's why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I'm traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

_**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**_

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I'm staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735275:6fR_nt2Nc:m:1:3299561967:5E81C00270602250904E59F43A649821:r "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735275:6fR_nt2Nc:m:1:3299561967:5E81C00270602250904E59F43A649821:r)
---

My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, _I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again._ That's made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

_**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **_

That's why I am hoping you will _**[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735275:6fR_nt2Nc:m:1:3299561967:5E81C00270602250904E59F43A649821:r "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First
conservatives.")**_ The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735275:6fR_nt2Nc:m:1:3299561967:5E81C00270602250904E59F43A649821:r)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735275:6fR_nt2Nc:m:1:3299561967:5E81C00270602250904E59F43A649821:r)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to _**WIN BIG**_ for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. _**[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735275:6fR_nt2Nc:m:1:3299561967:5E81C00270602250904E59F43A649821:r "Will you chip in to
help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**_

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735297:JtQABt2eN:m:1:3298722022:0E88E922150802D575D3485639811E39:r)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I 'm 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That's why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I'm traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

_**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**_

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I'm staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735297:JtQABt2eN:m:1:3298722022:0E88E922150802D575D3485639811E39:r "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735297:JtQABt2eN:m:1:3298722022:0E88E922150802D575D3485639811E39:r)
---

My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, _I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again._ That's made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

_**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **_

That's why I am hoping you will _**[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735297:JtQABt2eN:m:1:3298722022:0E88E922150802D575D3485639811E39:r "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First
conservatives.")**_ The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735297:JtQABt2eN:m:1:3298722022:0E88E922150802D575D3485639811E39:r)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735297:JtQABt2eN:m:1:3298722022:0E88E922150802D575D3485639811E39:r)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION **to **29910**
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735297:JtQABt2eN:m:1:3298722022:0E88E922150802D575D3485639811E39:r "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to _**WIN BIG**_ for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. _**[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735297:JtQABt2eN:m:1:3298722022:0E88E922150802D575D3485639811E39:r "Will you chip in to
help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**_

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Paul Gosar does not belong in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
| | Rep. Paul Gosar posted an animated video that depicted him murdering Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and violently attacking President Biden. It’s currently racking up millions of views online from the far-right. We cannot tolerate threats of violence. Ever. Paul Gosar is another blight on the Congress. He should resign. [**Demand Paul Gosar’s resignation from Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38492575/315705106/734710283?contactdata=mI0lnA3u1ntZev8Jv3d7pl1uzvGvVbCXpaYwNPiIF3eaJxHYe2KNG8C%2B1AZwnsUVL26XtBzM3gAW%2By4kwzdvrkwogxAcKx1OsLsHiCc0dhszbX%2FAV51YBJNcW03Ilq18%2FRHuUFmNt8I9a0pD7nOYIbJT7Lgn7qNzGQHp%2B33DrLI%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211110_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211110_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmRmNWI1Yi00NjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j9ovI1mqOgtVGQg3xS8xIbDVGYs4cOuvJVf_zYKRMaM=&emci=a6df5b5b-4642-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=afdf5b5b-4642-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=33917617) | | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38492576/315705108/734710283?contactdata=mI0lnA3u1ntZev8Jv3d7pl1uzvGvVbCXpaYwNPiIF3eaJxHYe2KNG8C%2B1AZwnsUVL26XtBzM3gAW%2By4kwzdvrkwogxAcKx1OsLsHiCc0dhszbX%2FAV51YBJNcW03Ilq18%2FRHuUFmNt8I9a0pD7nOYIbJT7Lgn7qNzGQHp%2B33DrLI%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211110_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211110_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmRmNWI1Yi00NjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j9ovI1mqOgtVGQg3xS8xIbDVGYs4cOuvJVf_zYKRMaM=&emci=a6df5b5b-4642-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=afdf5b5b-4642-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=33917617)
---
Derek,
Paul Gosar should have resigned yesterday.
He should have been stripped of his committee assignments. Universally repudiated by every self-respecting Republican who dares to call themselves a public servant.
But Republican Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy isn’t that kind of politician. And Republicans aren’t that type of responsible actor.
While Gosar glorifies violence against a fellow member of Congress who is already the subject of death threats, and against the President, McCarthy and the GOP won’t do a damn thing about it.
Attacking and singling out progressive women of color in Congress is the new calling card of the House GOP Caucus – led by kooks and dangerous cranks like Gosar, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz, Lauren Boebert, and Jim Jordan.
It feeds a cancerous growth of bigotry, racism, and xenophobia that Donald Trump used to take over leadership of today’s Republican Party.
Gosar, a man who rubs elbows with the Proud Boys, Oath Keepers, and other white nationalists, and who was a keynote speaker at the white nationalist America First Political Action Conference, has no business being in Congress. He should have never been elected. He just doesn’t belong there.
**[Add your name if you agree: Paul Gosar must resign from Congress. Period. End of story.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38492577/315705109/734710283?contactdata=mI0lnA3u1ntZev8Jv3d7pl1uzvGvVbCXpaYwNPiIF3eaJxHYe2KNG8C%2B1AZwnsUVL26XtBzM3gAW%2By4kwzdvrkwogxAcKx1OsLsHiCc0dhszbX%2FAV51YBJNcW03Ilq18%2FRHuUFmNt8I9a0pD7nOYIbJT7Lgn7qNzGQHp%2B33DrLI%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211110_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211110_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmRmNWI1Yi00NjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j9ovI1mqOgtVGQg3xS8xIbDVGYs4cOuvJVf_zYKRMaM=&emci=a6df5b5b-4642-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=afdf5b5b-4642-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=33917617)**
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38492578/315705110/734710283?contactdata=mI0lnA3u1ntZev8Jv3d7pl1uzvGvVbCXpaYwNPiIF3eaJxHYe2KNG8C%2B1AZwnsUVL26XtBzM3gAW%2By4kwzdvrkwogxAcKx1OsLsHiCc0dhszbX%2FAV51YBJNcW03Ilq18%2FRHuUFmNt8I9a0pD7nOYIbJT7Lgn7qNzGQHp%2B33DrLI%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211110_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211110_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmRmNWI1Yi00NjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j9ovI1mqOgtVGQg3xS8xIbDVGYs4cOuvJVf_zYKRMaM=&emci=a6df5b5b-4642-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=afdf5b5b-4642-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=33917617)

We cannot — and will not — ignore this incitement to violence.
Thank you for standing with me, and demanding an end to the glorification of political violence.
— Adam

Thank you for standing with me, and demanding an end to the glorification of political violence. — Adam Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

name: Team Abby
subject: FWD: We need Abby Finkenauer in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Did you see this email from Rep. Adam Schiff, Peter?
He understands the urgency of defeating Sen. Grassley (R-IA) and knows that Abby's campaign is our best opportunity to flip Iowa blue. **With our Senate majority on the line, it's crucial that Abby has what she needs to compete with GOP spending – and the Senate Republican campaign arm is currently sitting on more than $27 million in the bank.**
But right now, we still need to raise $10,000 to stay on track with our fundraising. Rep. Schiff believes in Abby's campaign – and we know that you do too. **[So please, can you stand with Abby and Rep. Schiff by splitting a contribution of $5 between their campaigns? Whatever you can give will ensure we have the resources to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Democratic majorities in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38493569/315709879/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk295-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ5MTY2YS00ODQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mC1Yukuiuk0EoxFH_OtslhLmwpQYa7fDBfIMbvB0XY0=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38493571/315709887/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk295-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ5MTY2YS00ODQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mC1Yukuiuk0EoxFH_OtslhLmwpQYa7fDBfIMbvB0XY0=)
---

\---------- Forwarded message \----------
From: **Adam Schiff** Date: Sat, Nov 6, 2021 Subject: We need Abby Finkenauer in the Senate
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38493573/315709896/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk295-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ5MTY2YS00ODQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mC1Yukuiuk0EoxFH_OtslhLmwpQYa7fDBfIMbvB0XY0=)
Hey Peter, it’s Adam Schiff. My friend Abby asked me to reach out because this moment is critical: Donald Trump just rallied with and endorsed Abby’s opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). I want to be respectful of your time, so I’ll cut right to the chase – we need Abby Finkenauer in the U.S. Senate.
Over the past few years, we’ve learned that our democracy is fragile. In the aftermath of Donald Trump and his Big Lie, it’s more important now than ever to protect it. We need champions for our democracy in the Senate – **and with Abby Finkenauer, Iowans would gain a true public servant in the U.S. Senate. I saw firsthand just how hard she fought for Iowa's working families and our democracy during her time in Congress. And in the U.S. Senate, she’ll continue that fight.**
**[Abby’s Senate campaign is gaining momentum, and she needs to make a big statement before her next big fundraising deadline. I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation between our campaigns right now? We must elect Abby to the Senate and hold on to our Democratic majorities in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38493575/315709902/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk295-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ5MTY2YS00ODQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mC1Yukuiuk0EoxFH_OtslhLmwpQYa7fDBfIMbvB0XY0=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38493577/315709904/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk295-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ5MTY2YS00ODQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mC1Yukuiuk0EoxFH_OtslhLmwpQYa7fDBfIMbvB0XY0=)
---
When I served with Abby in the House, I knew from the very start she was there for the right reasons: To do the hard work. The critical work. The kind of work that makes a difference.
It may not earn headlines – but it improves the lives of the people we represent. It has become rarer and rarer to see these days, but for Abby, public service is personal. She was raised in a working-class family. The fight is in her blood. And she would do anything and everything to better the lives of her community.
As for the current Iowa Senator, Chuck Grassley, it’s a different story. He's held this seat in the Senate for more than 40 years. And showing up for Iowa's working families seems to be a thing of his past. He's actively working against affordable health care and empowering unions – the sort of things that would improve the lives of so many in Iowa and across the country. Worse still, he's helped propagate Donald Trump's lies and encouraged dangerous voter suppression laws, and he has done Mitch McConnell’s bidding for much of his career.
**Our best hope for a better Iowa, and for a Democratic Senate, is Abby Finkenauer.** But it won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell doesn’t want to lose Grassley. His super PACs have nearly limitless resources to keep this seat red. And their work to take down Abby has already begun. **That's why I need you to make a critical donation right now.**
**[Peter, will you split a contribution of $5 or more right now to our campaigns? We must ensure Abby can defeat Sen. Grassley and keep our razor-thin majority in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38493579/315709906/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk295-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ5MTY2YS00ODQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mC1Yukuiuk0EoxFH_OtslhLmwpQYa7fDBfIMbvB0XY0=)**
I’m grateful for your support. Your continued fight for the truth. And for our democracy. Let's win in Iowa. Let’s elect Abby.

– Adam Schiff
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38493581/315709908/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk295-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ5MTY2YS00ODQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mC1Yukuiuk0EoxFH_OtslhLmwpQYa7fDBfIMbvB0XY0=)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re trying to draw me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztui9i3ao0063oslg2qb59qi47ji7hfpoofvvjm0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1d3gelom2tlkelp70thi61o67cth6dqe8orjmkombdj4m1jbcc36eiqefdbgm1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0ear6ccdgmmr3fchgcppb1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cphmaor6c5ge9oh5u)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7orb1scu8jka1a7idl043emeb681l5r89s3ld6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clhmcob0sjh2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zptcq9824dg8qls74a7epr1r21pidnabupcugoj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clhmcob0sjh2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znjub09tk0k0qq43ngin1mqkac1ap4cvqlv292d0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clhmcob0sjh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo56jn5gd3d0ndfi4lo8rg01ff3n973kqk5mu3dg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clhmcob0sjh2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zavcroqrbl3ljr19uj2i517cecdltdm45nfd6vco_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clhmcob0sjh2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0eovstje422c0f96jlbi71e3slb2cchnkmibbqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clhmcob0sjh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsdhf5d8k32g9jk561babd5qcpjnkeieu0reppo0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clhmcob0sjh2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqf1nov8u1usnnt2a66613ja6o7t072fhu0kfkjg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clhmcob0sjh2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuql9ou8bjf6vp930ptbqfhd28ako9f2g9d1p1c0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clhmcob0sjh2bs)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS

The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties. whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years. My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job. I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic. Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down. No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built. Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by: Forcing critical race theory into our schools. Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts. Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY. That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that ** You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country. I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people! For Liberty, Jim | | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Josh Riley
subject: I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
I’m proud to announce that I’m running for Congress in New York’s 22nd District.

| _Josh Riley is a Democrat running for Congress to bring Upstate New York Square Deal values to Washington.**If you do not wish to receive important updates about John’s campaign, please[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/08dae2d3-4542-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/fdd49e45-4a42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGQ0OWU0NS00YTQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lI3L7pHJa5bZF2ikB9vB9r4lvBUNF-xeR_yMPmvCMZA=&id=106311268).**_

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38494016/315711898/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-Launch-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGQ0OWU0NS00YTQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lI3L7pHJa5bZF2ikB9vB9r4lvBUNF-xeR_yMPmvCMZA=)
---
| Peter,

I’m proud to announce that I’m running for Congress in New York’s 22nd District.

[_**Will you help get our campaign off to a strong start by contributing today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38494017/315711899/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-Launch-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGQ0OWU0NS00YTQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lI3L7pHJa5bZF2ikB9vB9r4lvBUNF-xeR_yMPmvCMZA=)

My great-grandfather came to the United States in the late 1800s, and like so many immigrants of his generation, he came to Upstate New York in search of opportunity.

And he found it.

The whole family got jobs in the Endicott-Johnson shoe factory. My great-great-grandpa was a dyer, my great-great grandma was a repairer, and their son, my great-grandpa, was a heel scourer and a tanner. Now, I’m not sure what all of those jobs entailed, and I cannot imagine it was a glamorous life -- but I know it was a good one.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38494018/315711900/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-Launch-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGQ0OWU0NS00YTQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lI3L7pHJa5bZF2ikB9vB9r4lvBUNF-xeR_yMPmvCMZA=)
**My great-grandparents lived down the street from me when I was growing up, and they instilled in me an appreciation for the Square Deal--the simple promise that if you work hard and play by the rules and you’re decent to others, then you could earn a spot in the Middle Class.** It’s not about what clothes you wear, what car you drive, how you pray, or how you vote--it’s about whether you work hard, and if you do, you get a fair shot.

By the time my generation came of age, the promise of a Square Deal was broken for too many families across Upstate New York. In high school, I delivered the local newspaper to my neighbors every morning, and it seemed like there were always headlines about the latest round of plant closings or layoffs. I’ll never forget my parents sitting at the kitchen table trying to plan for an uncertain future while the economy was declining around us. It’s a conversation that a lot of families have had around a lot of kitchen tables across Upstate New York over the years.

For too many working families, it often feels like the American Dream is slipping away. If you’re in the Middle Class, your place there might not feel so secure. And if you’re trying to get into the Middle Class, it can feel like it’s getting further away, not closer.

**I’m running for Congress, as a new voice, because I believe we need to get past the dysfunction and the division in Washington and start working together to meet today’s challenges with the urgency and common purpose they deserve.**

I’m not a politician, and I’ve never run for office before. But I’m doing it now because I believe the purpose of public service is to improve the lives of others, not enrich oneself, and Upstate New Yorkers deserve a representative who will work for them, not the special interests that line politicians’ pockets and fund their campaigns. I’m not accepting any corporate PAC money in this campaign, instead relying on grassroots supporters like you.

[_**We’re facing big challenges, but also great opportunities--and I’m ready to deliver. But this campaign is not going to be easy, and we have a long road ahead. I’m asking you to join me in this fight by chipping in $5 or more today →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38494019/315711901/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-Launch-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGQ0OWU0NS00YTQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lI3L7pHJa5bZF2ikB9vB9r4lvBUNF-xeR_yMPmvCMZA=)

With gratitude and high hopes,

Josh Riley

name: Kat Cammack
subject: ACTION NEEDED: Stop vaccine mandates!
body:
Last year, the Far-Left praised our healthcare workers as heroes.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PxqmzF6PAumtrZnWgDnPRtKeEaLdJtFvDUpFs8qOR-qqOwaiqJBVTzerx_K6o9-gWm_tp3s5TsoiA9h572ntmgPyCKhoDK3cZooENcTsnzcR8izqdjWOi0Ll0XF-TKXtdhv6yi-l3dD_5EHmP4VVpeOA8fN2BiTUNaWL-VhhzJG1m9vsNfok7NkcHn5TKWZKAS_ItfYi6ek=&c=Mt4wWNiv7VkUM1b9YJlD0eXqGZs_z5EXmFUBty1UACHWf6Rxsz2Hlw==&ch=QfI84JpV7ig7ciI_r9krkpww_7ItdRmExoIoO_VmvXu2hnod30yDjg==)
---
| Friend,
Last year, the Far-Left praised our healthcare workers as heroes. But now, they are labeling those same healthcare workers as "villains" because they are taking a stand against vaccine mandates.
The Socialist Left has proven, yet again, that they only support those who keep quiet about their radical anti-American agenda. Our first responders and healthcare workers are heroes, plain and simple.
NO ONE should be forced to take a vaccine they do not feel comfortable with. Would you sign my petition demanding an end to vaccine mandates in America?

subject: Everything hinges on the Georgia Senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our Democrat opponent is cultivating a voting record that Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders would be proud to claim. |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58734980:J1i6tt2KN:m:1:3253819041:4613924855C900168063C6B889A8ED84:r)

---
**" Experts at POLITICO say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue."**
_(line from a recent Democrat email)_

Peter,

Democrats know that their Senate majority rests with their ability to "keep Georgia blue."

First off - Georgia isn't a blue state. However, our Democrat opponent is cultivating a voting record that Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders would be proud to claim.

The Democrats are pulling out all the stops to win in Georgia. Our opponent is **sending fundraising solicitations from national Democrats, Georgia Democrats, and Democrat Senators from New Hampshire, Minnesota, Nevada, and Arizona!**

Each of these emails raises tens of thousands of dollars - which tells us a few things:
1. National Democrats know our opponent is in trouble.
2. Our Democrat opponent knows he's in trouble.
3. But he's going to have a whole lot of money to attack us.

Our campaign must be prepared, so today we're asking you to help us catch up. **[Will you help by chipping in a few dollars to offset the money that's pouring in from blue states around the country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58734980:J1i6tt2KN:m:1:3253819041:4613924855C900168063C6B889A8ED84:r)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

name: Donna Imam
subject: Here’s how we take back power from the GOP in Texas.
body:
I'm running a campaign focused on working families in Austin. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38494482/315713699/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjJlNGM1OC00YzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UCA1q9kZPNVPKKZcpptSzLd1zXkRtEjWVit8JeSaT2A=)
Here's an incredible statistic, friend:

**The 2020 Census showed that Texans of color -- Hispanic, Black and Asian -- drove 95% of Texas' population growth.** But the GOP still holds the levers of power in our state and they're bent on locking in their control of state politics through redistricting. They just drew new maps that further entrench GOP power across this state.

The maps are so outrageous that a coalition of Latino organizations filed a lawsuit challenging Texas redistricting maps saying that the new maps "violate their civil rights because the plans unlawfully dilute the voting strength of Latinos."

The good news is that [**supporting our campaign with a contribution**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38494483/315713700/1898666321?refcode=em-111021-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjJlNGM1OC00YzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UCA1q9kZPNVPKKZcpptSzLd1zXkRtEjWVit8JeSaT2A=) is one of the best ways to 1) support this growth in population, AND 2) chip away at the GOP's power. Here's why: • The way to take back power in Texas is to win statewide races where gerrymandering can’t decide the outcome, but voter turnout amongst Democrats can make all the difference. Since Austin, Texas is a highly Democratic city, our campaign can make a significant impact where it actually counts.

• We drove record voter turnout in 2020 in my district last year, and we're building the grassroots operation to do it again this year.

• We're not taking anyone, their community, or their issues for granted. We're talking about the issues that matter to communities -- especially a strong economic message that prioritizes healthcare, education, high-wage jobs and increased opportunity for everyone through initiatives like debt-free college and trade school, ending the student loan scam, and health care coverage for every single Texan that's not tied to employment. If we're going head-to-head with the GOP to prevent them from locking in their control of Texas politics, we can't run a conventional campaign or candidates. We need to run a campaign that reaches out to the communities we want to connect with and turn out. That's why I'm running and why I'm asking you today:

[**Will you chip in $5, $15, or even $50 today to help us reach more Democrats and undecided voters? We're coming up $6,188 short of where we need to be to stay on track for our weekly fundraising goal. Any amount from you will help close the gap. Thank you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38494484/315713701/1898666321?refcode=em-111021-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjJlNGM1OC00YzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UCA1q9kZPNVPKKZcpptSzLd1zXkRtEjWVit8JeSaT2A=)

I'm not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you who see the value of investing in our campaign and the state of Texas.

I know we can turn Texas blue, but it's going to take a ton of people chipping in on emails just like this one if we're going to go up against conventional politics and the GOP machine.

[**Chip in $5, $15, or even $50 today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38494485/315713702/1898666321?refcode=em-111021-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjJlNGM1OC00YzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UCA1q9kZPNVPKKZcpptSzLd1zXkRtEjWVit8JeSaT2A=)

\- Donna

clean_body: I'm running a campaign focused on working families in Austin. | = Here's an incredible statistic, friend: The 2020 Census showed that Texans of color -- Hispanic, Black and Asian -- drove 95% of Texas' population growth. But the GOP still holds the levers of power in our state and they're bent on locking in their control of state politics through redistricting. They just drew new maps that further entrench GOP power across this state. The maps are so outrageous that a coalition of Latino organizations filed a lawsuit challenging Texas redistricting maps saying that the new maps "violate their civil rights because the plans unlawfully dilute the voting strength of Latinos." The good news is that = is one of the best ways to 1) support this growth in population, AND 2) chip away at the GOP's power. Here's why: • The way to take back power in Texas is to win statewide races where gerrymandering can’t decide the outcome, but voter turnout amongst Democrats can make all the difference. Since Austin, Texas is a highly Democratic city, our campaign can make a significant impact where it actually counts. • We drove record voter turnout in 2020 in my district last year, and we're building the grassroots operation to do it again this year. • We're not taking anyone, their community, or their issues for granted. We're talking about the issues that matter to communities -- especially a strong economic message that prioritizes healthcare, education, high-wage jobs and increased opportunity for everyone through initiatives like debt-free college and trade school, ending the student loan scam, and health care coverage for every single Texan that's not tied to employment. If we're going head-to-head with the GOP to prevent them from locking in their control of Texas politics, we can't run a conventional campaign or candidates. We need to run a campaign that reaches out to the communities we want to connect with and turn out. That's why I'm running and why I'm asking you today: = I'm not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you who see the value of investing in our campaign and the state of Texas. I know we can turn Texas blue, but it's going to take a ton of people chipping in on emails just like this one if we're going to go up against conventional politics and the GOP machine. = \- Donna | = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717. Please make the check payable to Donna Imam for Congress. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Donna Imam For Congress PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717 United States

name: Team Franchot
subject: Our inclusive people-powered movement
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
With 2022 just a few short months away, we want to make sure that you have an opportunity to place yourself right in the center of our people-powered movement by volunteering with our campaign. [https://www.franchot.com/action]
https://www.franchot.com/action [https://www.franchot.com/action]Peter Franchot has an exciting, transformative agenda that will change the way that government does business. From building statewide, world-class public transit, to making Maryland the first net zero state in the nation, to achieving statewide 5G and more, Peter will focus his brand of proven, honest leadership towards delivering results that Marylanders can see and feel.
But in order to get there, we’re going to need your help. Every weekend from now to Election Day, we’ll be doing the critical work to build our growing coalition of support, and grassroots volunteers like you are vital to our efforts. From knocking on doors, to placing phone calls, to joining us at an event, to sharing updates on social media and more, there are many ways for you to get involved.
Together, we’re going to lift our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve. 2022 is just around the corner, so now is an excellent time to get involved. Click here to sign up to volunteer with Team Franchot! [https://www.franchot.com/action]
We hope to see you soon,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?amount=20.22&refcode=em110821]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

name: Jim Jordan
subject: They're trying to gerrymander me out of Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122311:WWwynmHN5:m:1:2247059263:B22E3C75820DE25A9D957A77E96D2327:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122311:WWwynmHN5:m:1:2247059263:B22E3C75820DE25A9D957A77E96D2327:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122311:WWwynmHN5:m:1:2247059263:B22E3C75820DE25A9D957A77E96D2327:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122311:WWwynmHN5:m:1:2247059263:B22E3C75820DE25A9D957A77E96D2327:r)

**[Your donation,](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122311:WWwynmHN5:m:1:2247059263:B22E3C75820DE25A9D957A77E96D2327:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122311:WWwynmHN5:m:1:2247059263:B22E3C75820DE25A9D957A77E96D2327:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122311:WWwynmHN5:m:1:2247059263:B22E3C75820DE25A9D957A77E96D2327:r)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122311:WWwynmHN5:m:1:2247059263:B22E3C75820DE25A9D957A77E96D2327:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122311:WWwynmHN5:m:1:2247059263:B22E3C75820DE25A9D957A77E96D2327:r)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59122311:WWwynmHN5:m:1:2247059263:B22E3C75820DE25A9D957A77E96D2327:r)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

subject: We need Medicare For All. Join us →

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38499485/315722526/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211110M4A_TM_full_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTI2MGIwMS01MjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2pwF2Tcq3L3PHMZD-zzgpQtCfe-YR4cB7P5-uX0gyI=)

Amiguis, The United States is the only industrialized country in the world that **does not** have universal healthcare. You’ve probably heard that before, right? But did you know that, even after the Affordable Care Act has been in effect for six years, 28 million people didn’t have health insurance in 2020? During the pandemic no less. And nearly 50% of Americans have their insurance tied to their employment. That leaves too many people stuck in bad, low-paying jobs because they can’t afford to lose their insurance, or scared of speaking out at work for fear of losing their jobs and their healthcare. That’s the reality we live in. **But it doesn’t have to be this way.** [**Mike vows to join the fight for progressive legislation like Medicare For All and Medicaid expansion. And we’re asking for your support — will you sign our petition to let us know you’re all in for Medicare for All?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38499486/315722527/522986027?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211110M4A_TM_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTI2MGIwMS01MjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2pwF2Tcq3L3PHMZD-zzgpQtCfe-YR4cB7P5-uX0gyI=&emci=ae260b01-5242-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=b9260b01-5242-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12523946) | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38499487/315722528/522986027?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211110M4A_TM_full_SLA_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTI2MGIwMS01MjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2pwF2Tcq3L3PHMZD-zzgpQtCfe-YR4cB7P5-uX0gyI=&emci=ae260b01-5242-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=b9260b01-5242-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12523946)

Mike is all too familiar with the heavy weight of lack of insurance, high costs, and medical trauma that Black and brown people have to deal with every single day.
As a teenager, Mike suffered a sports-related knee injury. Because he was the son of a migrant worker and a stay-at-home mom — both immigrants — healthcare wasn’t accessible.
With time, he learned to live with the injury, never getting surgery to repair his knee because of the exuberant costs.**Too many people in America have a story like Mike’s.**
[**Join Mike, who will fight tooth and nail for Medicare For All. People, no matter their zip code or socioeconomic status, shouldn’t have to make a choice between basic care for their families, or going bankrupt.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38499488/315722529/522986027?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211110M4A_TM_full_SLA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTI2MGIwMS01MjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2pwF2Tcq3L3PHMZD-zzgpQtCfe-YR4cB7P5-uX0gyI=&emci=ae260b01-5242-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=b9260b01-5242-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12523946)

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Holiday Food Baskets 💙
body:
https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/427173/[https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/427173/]

Peter,

We are not just Democrats on Election Day. This Holiday Season, we are organizing a Holiday Food Basket drive to help out our our neighbors in need — we'd love for you to join us. County Democratic Parties will be taking nonperishable food donations, but you can also send donations straight to Tennessee Democratic Party HQ. We'll be delivering the food baskets on November 23rd and December 21st.

Our mission is to make sure the everyday needs of all Tennesseans are met — we have a long way to go, but we have the chance to help make a difference right now. Sign up below to take part and for more information on how to donate 👇

SIGN UP [https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/427173/]

Thanks for everything you do,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]
https://www.facebook.com/tndem [https://www.facebook.com/tndem]
https://twitter.com/tndp [https://twitter.com/tndp]
https://www.instagram.com/tndems [https://www.instagram.com/tndems]

CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision, Peter ✅
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735797:6VDPxt2cN:m:1:3253819041:9F681AA9650346693C63EBBA190E9241:r)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I 'm 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That's why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I'm traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

_**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**_

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I'm staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735797:6VDPxt2cN:m:1:3253819041:9F681AA9650346693C63EBBA190E9241:r "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735797:6VDPxt2cN:m:1:3253819041:9F681AA9650346693C63EBBA190E9241:r)
---

My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, _I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again._ That's made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

_**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **_

That's why I am hoping you will _**[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735797:6VDPxt2cN:m:1:3253819041:9F681AA9650346693C63EBBA190E9241:r "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First
conservatives.")**_ The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735797:6VDPxt2cN:m:1:3253819041:9F681AA9650346693C63EBBA190E9241:r)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735797:6VDPxt2cN:m:1:3253819041:9F681AA9650346693C63EBBA190E9241:r)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION to **29910****
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735797:6VDPxt2cN:m:1:3253819041:9F681AA9650346693C63EBBA190E9241:r "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to _**WIN BIG**_ for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. _**[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735797:6VDPxt2cN:m:1:3253819041:9F681AA9650346693C63EBBA190E9241:r "Will you chip in to
help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**_

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58735797:6VDPxt2cN:m:1:3253819041:9F681AA9650346693C63EBBA190E9241:r "DONATE NOW")
---

Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC!
Add **[info@email.cavpac.com](mailto:info@email.cavpac.com) to your address book!

body:
