name: Murray HQ
subject: Patty Murray doesn’t back down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Are you with her in the fight?
#
Peter,
**Patty Murray has never been one to back down from fighting a good fight.**
She didn’t back down when a legislator dismissed her as “just a mom in tennis shoes” -- she laced up those sneakers and got to work to save her childrens’ preschool program.
She didn’t back down when a pundit told her, “the lady from Washington doesn’t do budgets.” She wrote one as the first woman to chair the Budget Committee and got it passed.
And she never backed down from the fight for affordable child care -- her proposals have now provided the framework for historic child care policies in President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda.
**[Here’s another fight Patty won’t back down from: the fight to keep the Senate blue. Can she count on your support? The countdown to Election Day is on and we need to show the strength of our movement. Donate $5 and be a 2022 Team Patty Founding Donor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38502244/315724710/677971007?refcode=pm_em_211110_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGMxMWViMy01NDQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=utFmcUWNdbg1P1lFnKSrX4BAW74cm_tSUAFXXJIzai4=)**

Team Patty

Running in a new, significantly more Democratic NC-14, where our chances of defeating Madison Cawthorn have grown significantly. Having nearly the same amount of “Cash on Hand” as our incumbent Republican opponent. And leading Democratic challengers in fundraising quarter after quarter. So please, will you rush a donation of $14 to help us organize the new NC-14 and introduce our campaign to our new voters?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38502363/315725213/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211110_FR_OrganizingImagine_B1_other_U1_X1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjkxMWI3MC01NTQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hqynfxNavcofThvQcuEI_vn5Y5Vx6pmx1Y_-0USw4c=) | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38502364/315725217/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211110_FR_OrganizingImagine_B1_other_U1_X1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjkxMWI3MC01NTQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hqynfxNavcofThvQcuEI_vn5Y5Vx6pmx1Y_-0USw4c=)

name: Max Steiner
subject: I'll do more for my Republican constituents than Doug LaMalfa ever has.
body:
Farmers in the North State and their advocates are calling the infrastructure bill a "once-in-a-generation opportunity to make the investment we need to bring rural infrastructure into the 21st Century." |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38502406/315725398/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzMwMmNiZS01NTQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJ5bViQyj6xe1Mioxh_Ur1c2Jn7mm9YH5VyvKr3RyYY=)
Friend,

**[This is a long, but very important email about how the infrastructure deal will be a major boon to the North State. Please read the whole thing, then consider donating $3 to defeat Rep. Doug LaMalfa who voted against it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38502407/315725399/-209993060?refcode=em-111021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzMwMmNiZS01NTQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJ5bViQyj6xe1Mioxh_Ur1c2Jn7mm9YH5VyvKr3RyYY=)**

By now, I'm sure you heard about the Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework (BIF). This legislation invests $1.2 trillion into America's roads, bridges, mass transit, and more.

Rural communities in California like ours stand to receive millions of dollars for highways, bridges, and improved public transportation options. We’re also going to add much-needed broadband access, improved water infrastructure, and protective measures against wildfires.

The implications for the North State are huge. Farmers and their advocates are calling it a "once-in-a-generation opportunity to make the investment we need to bring rural infrastructure into the 21st Century."
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38502408/315725400/-209993060?refcode=em-111021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzMwMmNiZS01NTQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BJ5bViQyj6xe1Mioxh_Ur1c2Jn7mm9YH5VyvKr3RyYY=)
**This probably comes as no surprise, but my opponent Doug LaMalfa voted against the infrastructure deal. Apparently doing right by working families, farmers, and small business owners comes second to pleasing his party bosses Donald Trump and Kevin McCarthy.**

I'm confident, friend. In Congress, I’d get more done for everyone in the North State -- especially the Republicans LaMalfa claims to represent.

When it comes to resource management, preventing wildfires, and helping create high-wage jobs, no one here has a serious advocate with LaMalfa at the helm -- regardless of their party affiliation.

LaMalfa is going to have _a lot_ to answer for at the ballot box. We can hold him accountable by reaching more undecided voters with evidence of his continued obstruction on issues that matter to the North State. That's why we're asking:

**[Will you chip in $3 to help us reach more voters? clean_body: Farmers in the North State and their advocates are calling the infrastructure bill a "once-in-a-generation opportunity to make the investment we need to bring rural infrastructure into the 21st Century." | = Friend, = By now, I'm sure you heard about the Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework (BIF). This legislation invests $1.2 trillion into America's roads, bridges, mass transit, and more. Rural communities in California like ours stand to receive millions of dollars for highways, bridges, and improved public transportation options. We’re also going to add much-needed broadband access, improved water infrastructure, and protective measures against wildfires. The implications for the North State are huge. Farmers and their advocates are calling it a "once-in-a-generation opportunity to make the investment we need to bring rural infrastructure into the 21st Century." = This probably comes as no surprise, but my opponent Doug LaMalfa voted against the infrastructure deal. Apparently doing right by working families, farmers, and small business owners comes second to pleasing his party bosses Donald Trump and Kevin McCarthy. I'm confident, friend. In Congress, I’d get more done for everyone in the North State -- especially the Republicans LaMalfa claims to represent. When it comes to resource management, preventing wildfires, and helping create high-wage jobs, no one here has a serious advocate with LaMalfa at the helm -- regardless of their party affiliation. LaMalfa is going to have a lot to answer for at the ballot box. We can hold him accountable by reaching more undecided voters with evidence of his continued obstruction on issues that matter to the North State. subject: McCarthy's failures.
body:
This is a good taste of what a Kevin McCarthy House Majority would look like -- heavy on threats of political violence and light on any support for working families. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38502471/315725714/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzA4YmM2MS01NjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRNeP4ddsPjFKzNUnl_4FmK-YfZ1xJ6pJ0mbMbfGE70=)
This is disgusting, friend.

Republican Congressman Paul Gosar of Arizona tweeted a spoof video that depicts him killing a cartoon villain with Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez's face superimposed on it. It also shows him swinging a sword at Joe Biden. Predictably, my opponent Kevin McCarthy -- the so-called leader of the GOP -- failed to condemn or sanction his behavior whatsoever.

**This is a good taste of what a Kevin McCarthy House Majority would look like -- heavy on threats of political violence, and light on meaningful support for working families.**

Holding McCarthy accountable is one of the main reasons I decided to run against him. It's shameful that working families and children suffer in the Central Valley while he blocks good legislation and protects the most extreme members of his caucus instead.

Most people want good-paying jobs, affordable health care and housing, and to be able to put food on the table. They know McCarthy is standing in the way, but they're not sure what to do about it. In order to turn them out in the election -- we need to build a field operation that can reach every single corner of the district. Doing this takes time and resources -- that's why I'm asking:

I was raised by a single mother.
After my dad died, she worked hard to raise my sisters and me by herself.
She encouraged me and pushed me to be the best version of myself -- even when other people gave up on me.
I know I never would’ve become an army officer, Rhodes Scholar, and CEO without her.
[**That’s why I don’t take the opportunity to be your next Governor for granted, not for a single second.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38502532/315726078/-711004501?refcode=20211110_em_fr_b1_moore_30_cl_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTU3ZDgxMC01NzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KmniBkNi0TTWeGaejagSnXNGopBR4eRaa8DSJzlKw6o=)

I know where I come from and why I’m running for office --**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38502534/315726080/-711004501?refcode=20211110_em_fr_b1_moore_30_cl_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTU3ZDgxMC01NzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KmniBkNi0TTWeGaejagSnXNGopBR4eRaa8DSJzlKw6o=)_
To raise the minimum wage.
To give every student the resources they need to learn.
To make sure every Marylander has access to adequate healthcare.
To make sure no one is left behind here in Maryland.
[**_This is the Maryland I want to see, that I know you want to see too._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38502536/315726082/-711004501?refcode=20211110_em_fr_b1_moore_30_cl_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTU3ZDgxMC01NzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KmniBkNi0TTWeGaejagSnXNGopBR4eRaa8DSJzlKw6o=)
I’m fighting hard to win this Governor’s race and make sure everyone in our state has the chance to succeed, no matter their background.
But I need your help to compete in this historically expensive race.
[_**I’m asking for your $15 today to help fight for the Maryland that made my story possible. I have an ambitious agenda, but I can’t get it done without you. name: Culp for Congress
subject: Red Wave...Let's Keep It Up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BynXxo&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EwVdJRY&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/a6bf486a-607c-4678-8063-258b2126436c.png]

We all saw the Red Wave that took place on November 2nd and the message was clear. Americans reject the Democrat's radical agenda.

While the Biden administration loves to abuse their power this election proved, if "we the people" work together, we can defend our country and protect her from communism.

The America first agenda took on the Leftist communists and won because the American people--people from every party and life circumstance--showed up.

Virginia turned red, Seattle elected a Republican City Attorney, and there were many other wins across our country including Republican Judges being elected. As Americans we need to continue to stand shoulder to shoulder to take on those who want to destroy our country.

"We the people" decide America’s future.

Our work isn’t close to being done. We have so much we need to accomplish but what we have seen is the beginning of the changing tide.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/a6c23d33-2287-4ff3-812e-0f86def5ed8b.jpg]

The 2022 election is where we continue to Stand Up for America.

Because we have won a victory now is the time to work even harder. The left has seen the force of the American people working together and they'll be working hard to stop us from succeeding in putting America First candidates into office in 2022.

We can't underestimate our opponents.

We the people must keep fighting. This is a step in the right direction but the fight for America is still ahead. We need to get involved by showing up to school boards, city council meetings, becoming PCO's, and supporting candidates who will understand that running for office means being a public servant.

I will fight for America. I will follow the constitution. And I will put the power back where it belongs, into the hands of the American people.

Honored to serve.

Don't Tread on Me. [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SLznOp&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EFSbFbf&]

Loren

PS: We still need to your support to keep up with our opponents who are dumping huge amounts of special interest money and their own personal money (because he doesn't have very many supporters) into this race.

I have news for them: We the People's vote isn't for sale.

I CAN PLAY BIG LEAGUE AND DO $250! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SLznK8&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EFiLVoj&]

I WANT TO GO ALL IN FOR $2,900 TO GET RID OF NEWHOUSE [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SLznZI&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EhJxtvI&]

body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38502877/315728565/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Njc5MGQ3Yi01ODQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbXUVsilXsgGlMM7claKWz49Mupvkt5rPoRDaNEKlRU=)

| | Hello, Ahead of Veterans Day, we wanted to take a moment to highlight the legislation Elaine is working on to ensure Virginia’s veterans and their families receive the care, benefits, and resources they’ve earned through service to our nation. As a 20-year Navy veteran and member of the House Armed Services Committee, Elaine knows firsthand the unique challenges our veterans face when they transition out of service. For Elaine, taking care of our veterans, servicemembers, and their families isn’t just personal -- it’s the right thing to do. She doesn’t take that responsibility lightly as a representative of a district that includes the world’s largest Navy base and one of the largest communities of veterans and armed service members in the country. That’s why she’s advocated for the VA to streamline jobs programs and allow veterans to qualify for in-state tuition in any state they choose. She was also proud to have secured a cost-of-living increase for our veterans for the third consecutive year. [**Of course, none of this is possible without your continued support of Elaine and her work in Congress. If you want to keep Elaine fighting for veterans in Congress, please chip in $25 or whatever you can.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38502881/315728571/1017468089?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211110_FR_VeteranRecord_B1_send_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Njc5MGQ3Yi01ODQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbXUVsilXsgGlMM7claKWz49Mupvkt5rPoRDaNEKlRU=) | | | [Chip in $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38502882/315728573/1017468089?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211110_FR_VeteranRecord_B1_send_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Njc5MGQ3Yi01ODQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbXUVsilXsgGlMM7claKWz49Mupvkt5rPoRDaNEKlRU=)

clean_body: | = | | Hello, Ahead of Veterans Day, we wanted to take a moment to highlight the legislation Elaine is working on to ensure Virginia’s veterans and their families receive the care, benefits, and resources they’ve earned through service to our nation. As a 20-year Navy veteran and member of the House Armed Services Committee, Elaine knows firsthand the unique challenges our veterans face when they transition out of service. For Elaine, taking care of our veterans, servicemembers, and their families isn’t just personal -- it’s the right thing to do. She doesn’t take that responsibility lightly as a representative of a district that includes the world’s largest Navy base and one of the largest communities of veterans and armed service members in the country. That’s why she’s advocated for the VA to streamline jobs programs and allow veterans to qualify for in-state tuition in any state they choose. She was also proud to have secured a cost-of-living increase for our veterans for the third consecutive year. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Team Elaine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. | Friends, As I am sure you have all heard by now, **Chris Sununu announced this week that he is planning to once again run for re-election as New Hampshire's Governor**. This is great news for the Granite State! I have been proud to work closely with Governor Sununu for the past five years and am very proud of the tremendous success that we’ve achieved together including:
* lowering taxes
* creating jobs
* getting through the pandemic
* expanding school choice
* and protecting our freedoms.

****With Governor Sununu back in the corner office for two more years, we can expect more results to come!
I’ve been speaking a lot lately about **protecting the New Hampshire way of life from President Biden and Washington, D.C.’s overreach.** It is clear to me that small businesses, parents and working families, as well as our very values are under attack by Washington almost daily. Right now, our focus in Concord has to be on making sure that we continue helping working families and Main Street businesses that are struggling with Washington mandates and economic policies that have **resulted in soaring inflation, higher prices on everything and supply chain issues. ** ****Governor Chris Sununu and my Republican colleagues in the State Senate have made keeping Washington's harmful policies out of New Hampshire our top priority -- but we need your help! [Will you pledge $15, $25 or even $100 to my campaign to help us protect the Republican Majority in New Hampshire? (secure online donation link)](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODE1OTU4NTczMjg1MzgyNDcwJmM9dDBmNCZlPTAmYj03ODc5ODQ3MTgmZD1wNGk4eTRn.umrR_cG2oRhB4Sn0uMF-jPBE6WDjRqD0QYT0R3RmUxE) Thank you, Sen. name: Diehl for Massachusetts
subject: Reminder: Diehl Calls for Reinstatement of Nurses
body:
End Vaccine Mandates
| | | |
---
---
---
| | |
---|---
|
DIEHL: STOP FIRING NURSES, END THE VACCINE MANDATE
Diehl Urges Hospitals to Revoke Vaccine mandate for Nurses

(Whitman, MA - 11/8/21) Geoff Diehl is calling on Massachusetts hospitals to end their termination policy for un-vaccinated employees which is causing hundreds of nurses to lose their jobs right before the holidays at a time when [the healthcare industry is already short-staffed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rpm4kSVk0BW87OzFti_0uvRATpaMPOeg2M4PQXLn6UcStgXOSpSUtIR6nMQXYmdL5zPMqt_MudCrYsU_jY5vHRKzqnesIKiR8Pd7tQAeM0Pwp8X6pHZAsvUl39pIoEw_g5Uk7J993meqakzWqbQXWtm8Ucj71TmNHjECaGh9ZlbnV8MKUunvXAQ0eoJOZBhxSIV84kKqllzlIt1aYgqyd3ol7ayeSH1iDAmLiTLqxc9wm7GN3a46Pt-NyDZO3TrSreouUEo_E-w=&c=MN8KyK6eBQCkENeoRSNmKdXkrNjJuS6f9oXCzEVp39ZWGFl76ZysPA==&ch=Z3XsvVs1dXys_SgRMa6L8alAQle2TeNTIzfCnhK9sh6BlzHrS_9oOw==), and there is a question as to whether these workers can even claim unemployment benefits.

In an updated article in the [Boston Business Journal yesterday](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rpm4kSVk0BW87OzFti_0uvRATpaMPOeg2M4PQXLn6UcStgXOSpSUtIR6nMQXYmdL0XAnWOyJgxgm7NwtgDR_Yk6_9QR85u5dHLtrRMdetMCQYo442tG4aqnOV89BGbK4p000WM8qznmI3bkqejUYdJS0r9E1agyh7mcn5h4xtTRPPmUMurNFYo1X_4HKnky4T7kZYtTNQrAN4jFB5_fwx9sbXlGbCG12keA9MWNdvcItBPzk2vfwtqhmmlo-maAZppLCNX0LdvI=&c=MN8KyK6eBQCkENeoRSNmKdXkrNjJuS6f9oXCzEVp39ZWGFl76ZysPA==&ch=Z3XsvVs1dXys_SgRMa6L8alAQle2TeNTIzfCnhK9sh6BlzHrS_9oOw==), "The state's largest health systems are terminating hundreds of health care workers for failing to meet vaccine mandate deadlines. The terminations include employees who filed a lawsuit against the health system over its vaccine mandate, after the courts decided Thursday not to issue a preliminary injunction to prevent the health system from moving forward with the terminations. The broader court case is still ongoing. Dr. Eric Dickson, CEO of UMass Memorial Health, said he expects more people to be vaccinated as suspensions and terminations loom closer, "I and a bunch of others are really worried about what this winter is going to look like.""

"These brave nurses, who were on the front line and unvaccinated during the Covid outbreak, are going to be fired because they want medical freedom over their own body?" questioned Diehl. "Some of these healthcare workers have developed their own natural immunity, some may have concerns over the efficacy or safety of the vaccines, and some may have religious beliefs that conflict with what they are being forced to take. I would think that nurses, of all people, would know what's best for their body and I find it incredible that the hospitals they serve would put them in this awful position."

Nurse firings aren't just in Massachusetts: "I'm willing to lose my safety, security, my house, everything for freedom," [a nurse working for Kaiser Permanente said, in a viral video](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rpm4kSVk0BW87OzFti_0uvRATpaMPOeg2M4PQXLn6UcStgXOSpSUtIR6nMQXYmdLfrp-yYTyUpG_deptT89LzaW_fSIQKNJ0s9lehkEubmz93_oQhqgdShKoKV_IRuGOBZ6SN2KjV6DBaLVb3Soi0BEEBLyhH22OplVsqOXtQgvsvqI9sZVOo1CL0LEuVTtoupKh6K49pqq1yNLk30EXl40J2kYnImGIp4wE4O_Fl5sXmbrJWKa4ICRTLk-0e4hCNothgE_cTKw=&c=MN8KyK6eBQCkENeoRSNmKdXkrNjJuS6f9oXCzEVp39ZWGFl76ZysPA==&ch=Z3XsvVs1dXys_SgRMa6L8alAQle2TeNTIzfCnhK9sh6BlzHrS_9oOw==). "I want you to think about that." The nurse said she has been working since the beginning of COVID "when we didn't know what was going on. "They're firing nurses who are willing to work. Doesn't make sense to me. So you have got to ask yourself that question: what kind of world are we living in when we have a pandemic," she added.
Even worse, "It seems that a worker who violates their company's vaccine policy may not be eligible for unemployment benefits," states a Forbes article, entitled, "[In A Dramatic Turn, The Once-Heralded Nurses And Healthcare Workers Are Being Fired For Not Getting Their Vaccination Shots.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rpm4kSVk0BW87OzFti_0uvRATpaMPOeg2M4PQXLn6UcStgXOSpSUtIR6nMQXYmdLuTcy0f-nrUTjV7dqu-tj5ybnCpSpVp7eLeCnweS4ONQ7XuFTLNCI7BewfDV2Pn6K8NY3IQVc_WYcjSvle00ZzB6M76b70xiDsVE61_JaQ1QqKow0ues764nGqJqxZVySJBCbWs19potwPt9zhHHzu84Vfa4W7Rx7tVhJhI_vjRqDCeXGxK_Kq_pgXyPBl8EGj67B0vdOxSFHBQtLE7fAbZOjmGkkqngGWgVi9yQzRAtR5TBUgH1R11irHL_1gD8BA5TlFVtyk3Xk3ruiSv4oWbe5VYcQ5ls1XcV26mOzI9sKFXUiwU-9bciC88fIRo80&c=MN8KyK6eBQCkENeoRSNmKdXkrNjJuS6f9oXCzEVp39ZWGFl76ZysPA==&ch=Z3XsvVs1dXys_SgRMa6L8alAQle2TeNTIzfCnhK9sh6BlzHrS_9oOw==)"

clean_body: End Vaccine Mandates | | | | | | | ---|--- | DIEHL: STOP FIRING NURSES, END THE VACCINE MANDATE Diehl Urges Hospitals to Revoke Vaccine mandate for Nurses (Whitman, MA - 11/8/21) Geoff Diehl is calling on Massachusetts hospitals to end their termination policy for un-vaccinated employees which is causing hundreds of nurses to lose their jobs right before the holidays at a time when ==, and there is a question as to whether these workers can even claim unemployment benefits. In an updated article in the ==, "The state's largest health systems are terminating hundreds of health care workers for failing to meet vaccine mandate deadlines. The terminations include employees who filed a lawsuit against the health system over its vaccine mandate, after the courts decided Thursday not to issue a preliminary injunction to prevent the health system from moving forward with the terminations. The broader court case is still ongoing. Dr. Eric Dickson, CEO of UMass Memorial Health, said he expects more people to be vaccinated as suspensions and terminations loom closer, "I and a bunch of others are really worried about what this winter is going to look like."" "These brave nurses, who were on the front line and unvaccinated during the Covid outbreak, are going to be fired because they want medical freedom over their own body?" questioned Diehl. "Some of these healthcare workers have developed their own natural immunity, some may have concerns over the efficacy or safety of the vaccines, and some may have religious beliefs that conflict with what they are being forced to take. I would think that nurses, of all people, would know what's best for their body and I find it incredible that the hospitals they serve would put them in this awful position." Nurse firings aren't just in Massachusetts: "I'm willing to lose my safety, security, my house, everything for freedom," ==. "I want you to think about that." The nurse said she has been working since the beginning of COVID "when we didn't know what was going on. "They're firing nurses who are willing to work. Doesn't make sense to me. So you have got to ask yourself that question: what kind of world are we living in when we have a pandemic," she added. Even worse, "It seems that a worker who violates their company's vaccine policy may not be eligible for unemployment benefits," states a Forbes article, entitled, "==" | | | | | == | | | | | | | | Diehl for Massachusetts | 7 Cataumet Street, Worcester, MA 01606 | | Sent by mailto:info@geoffdiehl.com in collaboration with |

Regarding our work to expand Medicaid in North Carolina... |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38503926/315733134/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzRhYjQzZC01YzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dNTOQuqiH8btgAOiENEXYwgCpjsf8XMRXjoNWgVKDxY=&emci=8003cb56-3c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9c4ab43d-5c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)
Peter— It’s 2021. We’re over a year and a half into the worst pandemic in a century. **We’ve never had more proof of just how crucial access to quality health care can be.** Roy (and all of us on his team) believes there’s _never_ been a better moment to expand Medicaid and grant health care coverage to more than 500,000 of our North Carolina neighbors who need it. Roy has spent years advocating for Medicaid expansion and strongly believes we must pass it in this year’s budget. **[If you agree with Roy, please add your name right now to tell the GOP that they MUST include the Medicaid expansion in our new budget>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38503927/315733135/-1523917103?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzRhYjQzZC01YzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dNTOQuqiH8btgAOiENEXYwgCpjsf8XMRXjoNWgVKDxY=&emci=8003cb56-3c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9c4ab43d-5c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38503928/315733136/-1523917103?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzRhYjQzZC01YzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dNTOQuqiH8btgAOiENEXYwgCpjsf8XMRXjoNWgVKDxY=&emci=8003cb56-3c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9c4ab43d-5c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)
---
Peter, visiting the doctor or picking up necessary medications should _never_ break the bank, and if we’re going to prevent the _next_ pandemic, we need to make sure folks can seek medical care when they’re feeling sick.
**After everything we’ve been through in the last 20 months or so, we can’t believe expanding health care access is _still_ a controversial topic.**
We have to show the GOP that this is a priority for North Carolinians and people everywhere — and that we won’t stand for them blocking something as critical as Medicaid expansion any longer.
**[Add your name right now to DEMAND the GOP include Medicaid expansion in this year’s budget>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38503929/315733137/-1523917103?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzRhYjQzZC01YzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dNTOQuqiH8btgAOiENEXYwgCpjsf8XMRXjoNWgVKDxY=&emci=8003cb56-3c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9c4ab43d-5c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)**
Thanks for speaking out,
Team Cooper

name: Gwen Moore (personal)
subject: As a single mom, I know
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
It means a lot! My Sisters and Brothers, I am elated that Congress passed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Act! Now, we must Build Back better with women, and specifically women of color. During this pandemic, almost two million women have left the workforce because they were forced to make a choice between their careers or childcare or caring for their aging parents. Build Back Better is our nation’s solution for affordable, accessible childcare for working parents. This will also expand the Child Tax Credit for over 35 million families! As a single mom, I know just how transformative this bill will be in the homes of families across America. We delivered on the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, now we must pass the Build Back Better Act – keeping our Democratic majority depends on it! [_**Chip in to make sure our campaign has the resources we need to keep Wisconsin blue!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38504698/315736516/-231470522?refcode=111021&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTZjYmE5YS01ZjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXmWxFHDeGxufb4DxsDca3KiJTcRn7zk2jPKMo75bJ8= "Contribute") [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38504699/315736519/-231470522?refcode=110421&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTZjYmE5YS01ZjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXmWxFHDeGxufb4DxsDca3KiJTcRn7zk2jPKMo75bJ8=) Together #WeRepresent, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38504700/315736520/-1802529380?refcode=101521&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTZjYmE5YS01ZjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXmWxFHDeGxufb4DxsDca3KiJTcRn7zk2jPKMo75bJ8=)

During this pandemic, almost two million women have left the workforce because they were forced to make a choice between their careers or childcare or caring for their aging parents. Build Back Better is our nation’s solution for affordable, accessible childcare for working parents. This will also expand the Child Tax Credit for over 35 million families! As a single mom, I know just how transformative this bill will be in the homes of families across America. We delivered on the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, now we must pass the Build Back Better Act – keeping our Democratic majority depends on it! = "Contribute" = Together #WeRepresent, = Gwen Moore Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice Stay Connected! name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Mother Tucker + 1/6 Committee Digest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Future First Leadership PAC
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=digest_2_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- Tucker Carlson is dangerous -- and I don't throw that word around lightly. Here's a man who promotes the patently false claims that the FBI was behind the January 6th Capitol attacks and that those who ransacked the Capitol were only trying to defend the Constitution. His latest special is pure 1/6 Denialism and glorifies the traitorous, disgusting events of that day. Don't bother watching -- it will make you sick. These claims don't come from a deranged or foolish man. He knows _exactly_ what he's doing: manipulating and exploiting his viewers for his own enrichment. He has the drug they crave and deals it every night -- regardless of how it's tearing our families, friendships, and country apart. It's plain evil, and shouldn't be on the air. I sat down with S.E. Cupp for a _Rolling Stone_ interview that was published this week, and I think you'll enjoy it: [](https://www.country1st.com/rollingstone?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=digest_2_nd&n=2)
## Tucker Carlson Is a ‘Manipulative Son of a *****’ — and Other Thoughts from Adam Kinzinger[](https://www.country1st.com/rollingstone?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=digest_2_nd&n=3)
| [](https://www.country1st.com/rollingstone?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=digest_2_nd&n=4 "Read the Interview") [Read the Interview](https://www.country1st.com/rollingstone?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=digest_2_nd&n=4)
---
I’m also alarmed by what I heard happened last night at the Trump Doral resort. The House Republicans, led by Kevin McCarthy, hosted a large fundraising gala with the former President as guest of honor. Trump used the opportunity to push the "Big Lie" and claimed the real insurrection happened on Election Day, not January 6th. This was said to a room filled with my colleagues, who themselves were barricading the House floor on January 6th. And yet these lies were met with applause. It's just shameful.
Our country and its parties won't heal until we elect leaders who aren't afraid of **proven** , **durable** , and **bipartisan** solutions. We need leaders throughout our government who aren't afraid to put country over party. As we can see, the current path of "win at all costs" politics isn't sustainable \-- everyone loses.
Fortunately, we're already on the hunt for great primary challengers who espouse Country over Party values, and I will not rest until the existential threat to our republic has been abated.
I know I'm not alone. Our movement continues to grow and flourish, with thousands of new members and volunteers signing up every week. This growth would be impossible without YOU -- so thank you sincerely for everything you do to bring this movement to life.
Country First,

Adam
[](https://www.country1st.com/rollingstone?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=digest_2_nd&n=5 "Sign the Petition: Fire Tucker") [Sign the Petition: Fire Tucker](https://www.country1st.com/rollingstone?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=digest_2_nd&n=5)
---
* * *
* * *
* * *
## 1/6 Committee Weekly Digest
Country First presents the next edition of The Weekly Digest to highlight the important work of the January 6th Select Committee. Each week that the committee makes news, we’ll provide a recap on the its work to make sure you’re up to date. Here are the major developments from this past week:

### Federal judge denies Trump's attempt to withhold records from January 6th Committee
A federal judge will [allow](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHuGEXYZZ78LyOStfxHmQxgbmFqFwE_1j2bu87xXBEWlHpoMc5IM3GHuwAKK7r4tKNhBqe6XLpZma1obxE20gGRHiZRTLCgtVfEe1C8aMZbhAd7-WXe8pOmTZAcmDRNOzq00Q_j_gVbIVxmmmgLqLXUg&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=digest_2_nd&n=6) the US House to access hundreds of pages of documents from Donald Trump's presidency leading up to and about the January 6 attack at the US Capitol, in a forceful rejection of Trump's recent attempts to control information from his White House. The ruling Tuesday night from Judge Tanya Chutkan of the US District Court in DC is a blow to Trump's efforts to keep more than 700 pages of records from his White House secret -- though his legal team has informed the court it intends to appeal. As of now, the National Archives remains on track to turn over to the House a number of documents on Friday, including White House call logs, video logs and schedules related to January 6 as well as three pages of handwritten notes from Trump's then-chief of staff. The outcome in court also could help the House in its pursuit of more information from those around Trump, including witnesses who've been subpoenaed and haven't spoken to the committee yet.
### January 6th Committee issues 10 new subpoenas
The committee [announced](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHuGEXYZZ78LyOStfxHmQxgYFSsfbC-yplGFuaFRz5yk4mGNN8Tyi526YcjZapz4e-v7TqmiyGGG1qJ3NuGskhG6fNIpZnyiOjbvD0IJqT3yj&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=digest_2_nd&n=7) on Tuesday a new batch of 10 subpoenas to former White House officials under President Donald Trump, as the panel charges ahead in seeking testimony and documents from witnesses relevant to its probe. The subpoenas follow six others that were announced Monday. Tuesday's recipients are being asked to turn over documents to the committee on November 23, and depositions are scheduled throughout December. They are:
* Nicholas Luna, former President Donald Trump's personal assistant
* Molly Michael, Trump's special assistant to the President and Oval Office operations coordinator
* Ben Williamson, Trump's deputy assistant to the President and senior adviser to then-chief of staff Mark Meadows
* Christopher Liddell, former Trump White House deputy chief of staff
* John McEntee, Trump's White House personnel director
* Keith Kellogg, national security adviser to then-Vice President Mike Pence
* Kayleigh McEnany, former White House press secretary under Trump
* Stephen Miller, Trump senior adviser
* Cassidy Hutchinson, special assistant to the President for legislative affairs
* Kenneth Klukowski, former senior counsel to Assistant Attorney General Jeffrey Clark.

These new subpoenas build on efforts by the committee to reach more senior leadership within the Trump White House and target some former rank-and-file White House officials who had close relationships with Trump.
### Other news that may be of interest:
* The Washington Post published an [in-depth investigation](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_PA_nNH0Da_jCJ3Safw4xOseNSS5iJ1xj-XyVqpj7S-ngjEfTz9EzfQjgOwPJ_LG6xZtzV7FMfTsjc8_KbKzYw6RkMrWVi3yM082zfUu2m3J&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=digest_2_nd&n=8) of the events before, during, and after the January 6th attack.
* Seven people that attended the rally before the insurrection at the Capitol were [voted](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GUadKUZbNtXpoQtrN7XiLlDAp0T1nvsEvUIUmB084zGMYmSFj6UKzEeS_4p3A3vX2fHqEAoi5PW02zhv5wDNSfKi37fr5f24lG8KuNCjIaWGYCmbDZ9ibwrkUJAm8g_acOpj6uG-vCHcRiM8ExDA4A&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=digest_2_nd&n=9) into public office this week.
* More than 150 people have been interviewed by the January 6 committee, Rep. Liz Cheney [confirms](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GmrkqIvTVM5Gw19P8OEWnqPAtIHhAMxU89vlTUXNYDYQmyt3fftOoEcuxYqeCeVL5hchsm4Eyo6nFwLyNRK3RnaZhLrl6LPXLTjlUc3pLwc38QxxDpfGuX6LNtGHP5_CVtAZFY_sbnT38O1CEbPKxA&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=digest_2_nd&n=10).

_Country First is proud to release The Weekly Digest with important updates on the 1/6 Committee's investigation of the Capitol attack. If you would like to help contribute content to this newsletter, please e-mail[volunteer@country1st.com](mailto:volunteer@country1st.com)._

name: Team Schrier
subject: ICYMI: Congress passes infrastructure bill

body:
In case you missed it: Kim voted to pass the bipartisan Infrastructure and Jobs Act. This is a historic piece of legislation that will invest in modernizing Washington State's infrastructure. It also includes provisions championed by Kim to make our forests more resilient to wildfires, protect public trails and roads, and enhance the safety and power generating capacity of dams. In case you missed it: **Kim voted to pass the bipartisan Infrastructure and Jobs Act.**

This is a historic piece of legislation that will invest in modernizing Washington State's infrastructure. It also includes provisions championed by Kim to make our forests more resilient to wildfires, protect public trails and roads, and enhance the safety and power generating capacity of dams.

Kim has worked tirelessly in Congress to provide much-needed funding for our nation's infrastructure, create new jobs, and build a greener future. **[Will you add your name to thank Kim and Congress for passing the bipartisan Infrastructure and Jobs Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38504977/315739773/1242210801?ms=em21_211110_infra2_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em21_211110_infra2_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em21_211110_infra2_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211110_infra2_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=ZAEuzaMDNeWu3OQ3UFMpS9f%2BuqvyUlrndrAX6xapObByGcviHack7bOMtHiCNBeHgflL%2BSxYXSnTUVgtQFM%2BUkmELuMPwsgk5Uoagp41nzThesxhTSWYuG6ElVnX3HZCbwIIr54unwclmeZyrglNZgQFjWcyZjJwWv5Kk%2BRuKbI%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzczNDdkZC02MDQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rs7VP84T1KPD2zSZmOdFAwAKwOjWy2w0Ly6f5d8y1xE=&emci=d56d97da-3342-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f37347dd-6042-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15820338)**

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
From: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
Subject: Kim voted to pass the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act!
Date: Saturday, November 6, 2021
**_"House passes $1 trillion bipartisan infrastructure bill that includes transport, broadband and utility funding, sends it to Biden" - CNBC_**
Exciting news, team!

Last night, Kim voted to pass the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act!

**This landmark legislation will improve Washington State's infrastructure, build a greener future, and create good-paying jobs** by modernizing highways, roads, and bridges, ensuring clean drinking water, updating public transit systems, and more.

Kim was proud to help lead the effort to include provisions that are critical to Washington State that will:

✅ Make forests healthier, more resilient, and more resistant to catastrophic wildfires.
✅ Protect American rivers and streams, endangered fish, and community water systems.
✅ Enhance the safety, grid resilience benefits, and power generating capacity of America’s dams.

clean_body: In case you missed it: Kim voted to pass the bipartisan Infrastructure and Jobs Act. This is a historic piece of legislation that will invest in modernizing Washington State's infrastructure. It also includes provisions championed by Kim to make our forests more resilient to wildfires, protect public trails and roads, and enhance the safety and power generating capacity of dams. In case you missed it: Kim voted to pass the bipartisan Infrastructure and Jobs Act. This is a historic piece of legislation that will invest in modernizing Washington State's infrastructure. It also includes provisions championed by Kim to make our forests more resilient to wildfires, protect public trails and roads, and enhance the safety and power generating capacity of dams. Kim has worked tirelessly in Congress to provide much-needed funding for our nation's infrastructure, create new jobs, and build a greener future. \----------Begin Forwarded Message---------- From: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Subject: Kim voted to pass the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act! Date: Saturday, November 6, 2021 "House passes $1 trillion bipartisan infrastructure bill that includes transport, broadband and utility funding, sends it to Biden" - CNBC Exciting news, team! Last night, Kim voted to pass the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act! This landmark legislation will improve Washington State's infrastructure, build a greener future, and create good-paying jobs by modernizing highways, roads, and bridges, ensuring clean drinking water, updating public transit systems, and more. Kim was proud to help lead the effort to include provisions that are critical to Washington State that will: ✅ Make forests healthier, more resilient, and more resistant to catastrophic wildfires. ✅ Protect American rivers and streams, endangered fish, and community water systems. ✅ Enhance the safety, grid resilience benefits, and power generating capacity of America’s dams. | Thanks, Team Schrier National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. But today, the USPS Board of Governors will hear directly from the public at an open meeting -- and **_Democratic strategists need to know where you stand:_**

**Please, team -- we need 50,000 more responses by midnight, but we’re still missing your response!**

name: Eden at Barrier to Entry PAC
subject: WTF is happening?
body:
Ohio GOP lawmakers echo Texas abortion ban

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38505546/315743418/1300596418?refcode=211110_FR_ohioabortionban_B_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2NzQ3ZTJhLTYyNDItZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ABgMQIEefPrN1u0ixlI_Ge0e1KZzNxgkoRAK-kkzAfM=)
---
Peter, we’re scared for Ohio and our country.

_**Ohio GOP lawmakers proposed an abortion ban that echoes the ban created in Texas. But to be quite clear -- this one is worse.**_

House Bill 480 allows anyone to sue a doctor who either performs an abortion or someone who aids an abortion. This fine could be at least $10,000 per abortion. This is a huge step back for women in Ohio and as progressives, we must do everything in our power to stop HB480 from passing.

_**Ohio’s proposed bill goes a step further than the law in Texas by banning all abortions rather than ones afters a fetal heartbeat is detected.**_

Thanks to Trump, we have a conservative majority in SCOTUS and our reproduction is under more attack than ever. We knew that when Texas passed their abortion ban that states would follow suit. These bans will disproportionately impact people of color, people who are non-binary, and people who are low-income.

There are countless reasons why people get abortions. The only thing that matters is that people have a choice over their bodies. We must ensure that women are able to have access to safe, affordable, and reliable reproductive healthcare where they live.

At Barrier To Entry PAC, we know that people who are closest to the problems are closest to the solutions, which is why we support working-class candidates living everyday lives. This is also why we are asking you to split a contribution today between our organization and Planned Parenthood Advocates of Ohio. **[Would you please donate today to help our movement protect the right to choose in Ohio? We need to shut this bill in Ohio down before a domino effect takes over the US. clean_body: Ohio GOP lawmakers echo Texas abortion ban | | | = Peter, we’re scared for Ohio and our country. Ohio GOP lawmakers proposed an abortion ban that echoes the ban created in Texas. But to be quite clear -- this one is worse. House Bill 480 allows anyone to sue a doctor who either performs an abortion or someone who aids an abortion. This fine could be at least $10,000 per abortion. This is a huge step back for women in Ohio and as progressives, we must do everything in our power to stop HB480 from passing. Ohio’s proposed bill goes a step further than the law in Texas by banning all abortions rather than ones afters a fetal heartbeat is detected. Thanks to Trump, we have a conservative majority in SCOTUS and our reproduction is under more attack than ever. We knew that when Texas passed their abortion ban that states would follow suit. These bans will disproportionately impact people of color, people who are non-binary, and people who are low-income. There are countless reasons why people get abortions. The only thing that matters is that people have a choice over their bodies. We must ensure that women are able to have access to safe, affordable, and reliable reproductive healthcare where they live. At Barrier To Entry PAC, we know that people who are closest to the problems are closest to the solutions, which is why we support working-class candidates living everyday lives. This is also why we are asking you to split a contribution today between our organization and Planned Parenthood Advocates of Ohio. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your name: Brent Bozell
subject: New low for fake news - covering up a rape
body:
Why are they covering it up?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdok0sd220ldrg9b1fsauo87tm4em7lad5t8efk8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9cdheaprdcb0ckrmccpmc2pjcsbj68p76oj46phm2pbgmjiefcpgmlgrcpj6murt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0ear6ccdimmp6fchicoob1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cphmapr1c5h68oh5u)
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zre29p1gn2les8ep4ilfvh2a1jvuactjitanpel0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cljm2ob2chh2bs)
Friend,

This is a new low, even for the fake news corporations - covering up a rape in Loudoun County, Virginia schools.

Why are they covering it up?

Because it doesn't fit their narrative. **The two sexual assaults were committed by a transgendered boy. **

To make it even worse, former President Obama is now saying there's nothing for parents to be upset about with public schools. It's all "fake conservative outrage" according to Obama. And the media is standing with him in their lies to the public.

And just when you thought it wasn't already horrible, the father of one of the girls was used as an example by the National School Board calling on the FBI to investigate parents as terrorists because he was upset and angry at the Loudoun County school board.

What you see here is a coordinated effort by the media, Democrat politicians, and the Swamp to lie and manipulate Americans.

**I am asking for immediate help to expose the liberal bias in the media. **

[_**Can you send an urgent donation of $10, $35, $50, or more today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7hcdiesk15olg41g77qv0pq0celkclvc3adkr78_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cljm2ob2chh2bs)

Please let me introduce myself. I'm Brent Bozell, the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media.

Our work regularly appears on Fox News, OANN, and on viral online videos that you've likely watched already.

**Here 's my proudest accomplishment and why you should support our work today:**

_When the MRC was founded in 1987 over 75% of Americans trusted the leftwing media ... now 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media._

I do not have woke corporations behind me. I do not have George Soros billionaires. MRC relies 100% on people who want to expose the radical left agenda of the media.

Please help me DEFEAT the leftwing media and spread our message by becoming a supporter of the Media Research Center today!
[_**Donate $10 >>
Donate $35 >>
Donate $50 >>
Donate $100 >>
Donate $250 >>**_
_**Donate $500 >>**_
_**Donate $1,000 >>
Donate Other >>**_](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zv085bg9e5ivjt6935vmn5bleo3sk1hfsuc3m940_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cljm2ob2chh2bs)
Our slogan is simple. Believe in America, not the media.

More and more Americans are waking up to this message. And it all begins by revealing the liberal bias in the media.

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

clean_body: | | Team, Did you hear that only 38% of registered voters in Wisconsin said they’d vote to reelect Ron Johnson if the election was this year? There’s no surprise as to why — the people are sick and tired of politicians like him who do nothing to help working class Americans. Plain and simple, Ron Johnson doesn’t care about us. He’s too busy chalking it up to Washington elites and Wall Street to notice the struggles everyday families are dealing with. = = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = With your help, we’ll bring political power back to who it should belong to: the people. — Team Nelson | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. >From wildfires to unprecedented droughts, there has been no shortage of terrifying headlines about the climate crisis in California. In fact, Woodland Hills hit a record 121 degrees last year, the highest temperature ever recorded in Los Angeles County.

And what's even scarier is that Republicans like Mike Garcia don't seem to be paying attention, let alone care.

**We cannot afford to wait to take meaningful action on climate change. We need legislators who are ready to tackle big problems with tough solutions.**

I've seen our changing climate firsthand -- but even after last year's destruction, Mike Garcia has done _nothing_ to brace our district for the changes ahead. Not only does he refuse to stand up against climate change, he won't even try to protect our community against the disasters it causes.

**Ignoring a problem doesn't make it go away.** We're already running out of time to save our planet -- we can't afford to re-elect a representative who doesn't believe there's any work to be done. Climate action isn't just about the environment, it's also about protecting public health, bolstering our economy by expanding green energy, and strengthening our national security.

**There is plenty we can do to combat this crisis and deliver good paying jobs in the process.** The recently proposed jobs plan will help us transition to a green economy and invest in climate-resilient infrastructure that will secure our future for generations to come.

name: Gary Black
subject: SIGN NOW: Stop Biden’s mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
96
https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/biden-vax-man
date-email-petition?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021no
v10hf Friend — I want to share more with you about why I’m suing
Joe Biden to stop his vaccine mandate,
https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/biden-vax-ma
ndate-email-petition?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021n
ov10hf and to ask you to join me in this effort by signing our petition
here.

Georgia Department of Agriculture employees do contract work
with the federal government — with the work ranging from meat
inspection to pesticide safety.

If these employees fall under
Biden’s mandate as “federal contractors,” the consequences will be
disastrous.

State employees will quit, food safety will be
compromised, inspections will be curtailed, and both jobs and entire
businesses will be lost. It will hurt producers and consumers, further
increase grocery bills and make the supply chain crisis even worse.
https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/biden-vax-ma
ndate-email-petition?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021n
ov10hf Will you stand with me to stop it? SIGN your name here.
Biden’s totalitarian “let me see your papers” mandate is wrong,
un-American, and dangerous.

I won’t stand by and let Georgia
businesses become police state enforcers, not now as Agriculture
Commissioner and not next year when I’m in the U.S. Senate.
https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/biden-vax-ma
ndate-email-petition?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021n
ov10hf I hope you’ll stand with me to protect our economy and individual
liberty from this tyrannical overreach.
https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/biden-vax-ma
ndate-email-petition?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021n
ov10hf Gary Black
https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/biden-vax-ma
ndate-email-petition?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021n
ov10hf STOP BIDEN'S MANDATE »Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:
I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is
absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.

Raphael Warnock has
already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S.
Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat
will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who
can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails
are a vital part of our efforts.

With one conservative vote, we can
restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America
back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/email-donate
-here?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021nov10hffooter

you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters

Fellow Conservative, John Kovacs is the only candidate in the race for Nevada’s 3rd Congressional District with the proven experience to bring real change to Washington, D.C. As a first-generation American whose parents fled Communism in Hungary, John could not be more grateful for everything this great country has to offer. And from a young age, he was determined to make his family proud. **After earning a civil engineering degree from the Citadel in 1988, John spent decades building a successful construction company from the ground up. As a small businessman, he’s gained invaluable experience negotiating contracts with unions, states, and local municipalities**. Now he’s ready to put his business background to work for the people of NV-03 – and make our country great again (again)! As a strong America First Republican, John will fight to secure our borders, end federal vaccine mandates, and crush Joe Biden’s radical left-wing agenda. _Will you join the fight today and help John flip this district red in 2022 by making a generous grassroots donation?_

name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re gerrymandering me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn3nnekvdk9natoqp3b0atdck9kvpudlj5m75l80_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cljm1o34clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65stlcso73cbjejg6cpj0suqbbcli64qmapr3mdqb7db0m9p7acr468r7asr561jjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbcphhmaqr8ptmc5j33c5ic8r749fg)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zktt0cn4tmqom8eba8bf0phpkc4ib4tedj3ld4vo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cljm1o34clh2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zahse5egsd0rpo0aodc2il8ojf55brjqnm3s3598_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cljm1o34clh2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvcpuj37v2agc5km8sn4hqpibjcq7imqjrpf0hq8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cljm1o34clh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6tam6obrq82et4g8aosql31jqi1gf9rbn96nqv8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cljm1o34clh2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3ua8af6q7uaighg8gov8u2llgf5avneaiuu951o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cljm1o34clh2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2sso0mlrgnu8plaejcouah75874uvojecgf8n6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cljm1o34clh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze22nl8iaki8ndrf906njsp9sc6g3q3no3g0pmjg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cljm1o34clh2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuf2n2tfij39psmjk9bq6lpg3uat0j838a9o8tdg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cljm1o34clh2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr80im8occlg9448gnk6slgsk7dh6btdd60k6cgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cljm1o34clh2bs)
Jim

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people! For Liberty, Jim | | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
This is Congresswoman Elise Stefanik, House Republican Conference Chair. Last year, my political action committee, E-PAC, made history by leading t Peter, This is Congresswoman Elise Stefanik, House Republican Conference Chair. Last year, my political action committee, E-PAC, made history by leading the charge to elect a record breaking number of GOP women to Congress. Thanks to our efforts, we made 2020 the Year of the Republican Woman. But we’re not stopping there... GOP women are already on track to win the seats we need in 2022 to fire Nancy Pelosi once and for all. ** ** [**Today, I’m thrilled to announce that one of those exceptional women, Lisa Scheller, has body:
My campaign is hosting a virtual town hall about my plan to make Maryland a national leader in the fight to combat the climate crisis.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38507601/315752347/-808847795?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzYwNTE1MC02YzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K02ugNjRY-sD5K-hadNWlji3vAaNBdBtnP_1bk8Ip68=&emci=a53efb42-6142-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c3605150-6c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635484)
---
Peter,

Everyone deserves to live in a healthy and clean environment, no matter his or her income or zip code. Maryland communities are already beginning to feel the ravages of climate change, and we must act now to make them adaptable and resilient. Unfortunately, there are wide gaps between neighborhoods in the quality of air, water, and soil that Marylanders work and play in every day—we’re going to change that, and I’ve got a climate plan that lays out how to do it.

Tonight at 6PM, my campaign is hosting a virtual town hall about my plan to make Maryland a national leader in the fight to combat the climate crisis, and [_**I hope you’ll join us by clicking here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38507602/315752348/-808847795?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzYwNTE1MC02YzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K02ugNjRY-sD5K-hadNWlji3vAaNBdBtnP_1bk8Ip68=&emci=a53efb42-6142-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c3605150-6c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635484) We’ll be joined by Montgomery County Sierra Club Chair, Shruti Bhatnagar, and there will be time at the end of our conversation for a live Q&A session.
| | [RSVP YES ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38507603/315752349/-808847795?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzYwNTE1MC02YzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K02ugNjRY-sD5K-hadNWlji3vAaNBdBtnP_1bk8Ip68=&emci=a53efb42-6142-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c3605150-6c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635484)
---
| [RSVP NO ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38507604/315752350/-220837823?refcode=BLU-KING-20211110-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzYwNTE1MC02YzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K02ugNjRY-sD5K-hadNWlji3vAaNBdBtnP_1bk8Ip68=)
---
We’re already seeing the cost of inaction through floods, rising sea levels, droughts, and heat waves and we can’t afford to wait any longer to tackle the climate crisis head-on. My plan to prepare Maryland for climate impacts includes building adaptable and resilient communities by making key investments in infrastructure, stormwater management and green spaces.

We’ll invest in infrastructure resilience and planning to ensure our roads, bridges, public transportation and coastal areas, particularly in under-resourced communities most impacted by climate change, are better prepared for and can adapt to a warming planet. We’ll ensure all Marylanders can access healthy green spaces, community gardens and farmers markets, walking and bike trails, and public transit, which will improve our air quality and our community's health and wellbeing. And I’ve committed to supporting and properly implementing the Chesapeake Bay Foundation’s efforts to plant 5 million trees on the Eastern Shore and provide funds to expand those efforts statewide.

Climate change affects all of us, and it’s going to take all of us to step up to the challenge it poses. So I hope you’ll join us tonight to learn more about my climate plan and what actions we can take today to combat the climate crisis.
| [RSVP ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38507605/315752351/-808847795?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzYwNTE1MC02YzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K02ugNjRY-sD5K-hadNWlji3vAaNBdBtnP_1bk8Ip68=&emci=a53efb42-6142-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c3605150-6c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635484)
---
Thank you,

John

PS: if you can’t join us tonight but want to support our campaign, please consider making a contribution here: _**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_climate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38507606/315752352/-220837823?refcode=BLU-KING-20211110-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzYwNTE1MC02YzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K02ugNjRY-sD5K-hadNWlji3vAaNBdBtnP_1bk8Ip68=)**_

name: Giffords.org
subject: Masks or guns?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Active shooter drills. Watching school shootings play out on the news. Feeling unsafe in a place of learning.
#

The right-wing media says that wearing masks in schools is traumatizing to our children.
You want to know what’s _really_ traumatizing to kids?
Active shooter drills.
Watching school shootings play out on the news.
Feeling unsafe in a place of learning.
**So—help us set the record straight:**
[**It’s time that Congress focuses on what really is traumatizing kids—gun violence. name: Holly McCormack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, many Americans predicted another loss for the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill when controversy stirred within the Democratic Party on Friday.
But our hope was not totally lost .
We saw 215 Democrats and 13 Republicans step up for their constituents and support a bill that 66% of America wants. The Biden Administration has shown what can happen when we reach across the aisle and work together for the benefit of our Nation. That's why after decades of promises, it is finally infrastructure week .
Marjorie Taylor Greene voted against this historic legislation, one that would directly impact Northwest Georgians. This bill includes funding for essential roads and bridges as well as high speed broadband, public transit, and bold climate policy. This is the biggest economic bill to pass in our history, and GA-14 will finally have access to things we have been begging for.
We're one step closer to Building Back Better. And we're one step closer to working together for the benefit of all Americans.
Help us continue this forward progress,
Team Holly.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1109] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Calling a veteran a F***ing A****le is not acceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
My opponent was caught on a hot microphone insulting a member of Congress who lost both of his legs in Afghanistan ... The only thing I’m guilty of is making my opponent and national Democrats spend money to defend a congressional seat they think belongs to them | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=745135d3562041f5ba41f8bb6624c8b0&_e=qfXfHGynSntNNLsUptIvyayp4-LBVAsfMKZDZg4u3Nf6p9TcT4KVt4k5ziK_g9AL0IiB-yV94fOM2HUW5WpSDJOYY88aisYXKoRTlbYuKqtIrTqCn2yJw9VfuHu9DyJJBE9_NFcMmBkKazQunTk3lfoz2xds7zCmcDIcf-eVwBkLzQWMcqJ9V1S8Q2kHIstz6jr6xkpxUUe1vBS7lBRnH9eKNVfSL7F4Fw6dlVcj6EfhrcvvF8JiwpQQZ8PhjS___AplFENkT_YCXF-4juuxhaKYB9z0nRAZCUguZ680CfWp_hf-aU08xnxW8diXorgaGKYq0cXHbcudVoj7TvkmpI2IVXWmY8BD5QPCYvF39OaJtnGkyvCOPyiwsQzoZC_hB8LDw8BuA7ycTfLpPL7nPytFFquqf7O5kQCHyqWbAUoImUakP8cvo9a9iRPBrIPwVz6Rp4K8DQIb1g3xnSTRzQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

I’m writing today because I want to show you – in his truest form – the man I’m running against for Congress.

Peter DeFazio, the failed Chairman of the House Transportation Committee, refers to a fellow congressman, Brian Mast, a veteran who lost both legs in an IED explosion in Afghanistan as a **“F***ing A*****e”** simply because Rep. Mast attempted to introduce several amendments to a piece of legislation that my opponent didn’t agree with.

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=745135d3562041f5ba41f8bb6624c8b0&_e=qfXfHGynSntNNLsUptIvyayp4-LBVAsfMKZDZg4u3Nf6p9TcT4KVt4k5ziK_g9AL0IiB-yV94fOM2HUW5WpSDJOYY88aisYXKoRTlbYuKqtIrTqCn2yJw9VfuHu9DyJJBE9_NFcMmBkKazQunTk3lfoz2xds7zCmcDIcf-eVwBkLzQWMcqJ9V1S8Q2kHIstz6jr6xkpxUUe1vBS7lBRnH9eKNVfSL7F4Fw6dlVcj6EfhrcvvF8JiwpQQZ8PhjS__IPXMId0npVe78mgVzi1eqLVegwLPImrtb4hDQAachitnICsAI9zwAnwS6tSV87Bebgk1sQyryi7nUsTepH93spj8rFZPJy6cwJTu25FPKxQ_E7co2wqggmBRaHRHo218KM2OPnsrqdWfGUnS4QIdTW1-bGQrBuq0GBbXPwBy6yXg9tEREQ6HWdlNVySWSXsVekO2n_GZjFRytSKVYhZtkg%3D%3D)

So much for bipartisanship, eh?

I can tell you this: if I’m elected to Congress, whether I agree with an opponent or not, I’m certainly never going to be caught on a hot mic calling them derogatory names.

Sadly, Mr. Defazio’s treatment of a combat veteran wounded in the line of duty is emblematic of how Democrat’s feel not only about our veteran community, but Republicans in general.

**Tuesday night’s victory proved to everyone in America that Republicans have every chance to win back the House next November.**

**In fact, one prominent political prognosticator predicts that if Republicans were to outperform our 2020 numbers at the same level that we did in Virginia, we’d pick up more than 51 house seats. It’s time to retire this veteran-hating career politician.**

clean_body: My opponent was caught on a hot microphone insulting a member of Congress who lost both of his legs in Afghanistan ... The only thing I’m guilty of is making my opponent and national Democrats spend money to defend a congressional seat they think belongs to them | Peter, I’m writing today because I want to show you – in his truest form – the man I’m running against for Congress. Peter DeFazio, the failed Chairman of the House Transportation Committee, refers to a fellow congressman, Brian Mast, a veteran who lost both legs in an IED explosion in Afghanistan as a “Fing A*e” simply because Rep. Mast attempted to introduce several amendments to a piece of legislation that my opponent didn’t agree with. So much for bipartisanship, eh? I can tell you this: if I’m elected to Congress, whether I agree with an opponent or not, I’m certainly never going to be caught on a hot mic calling them derogatory names. Sadly, Mr. Defazio’s treatment of a combat veteran wounded in the line of duty is emblematic of how Democrat’s feel not only about our veteran community, but Republicans in general. Tuesday night’s victory proved to everyone in America that Republicans have every chance to win back the House next November. In fact, one prominent political prognosticator predicts that if Republicans were to outperform our 2020 numbers at the same level that we did in Virginia, we’d pick up more than 51 house seats. It’s time to retire this veteran-hating career politician. Respectfully, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan.
