To: Congressional Democrats
From: Peter

Dear Democrats in Congress,

In 2020, Democrats like me around the country stood up and demanded change. **We donated, protested, and voted.**

And the result? We ousted Trump, and gained majorities in the House and the Senate -- a trifecta!

Over the weekend, you finally got the major infrastructure bill passed -- you fought tirelessly despite Republican opposition and obstruction.

Thanks to our fight in 2020 and your hard work since, we are about to see major changes to American infrastructure from trains to bridges, roads, energy, and so much more.

**I’m so grateful that you persevered despite the conspiracy theories, terrorist attacks, and hyperpartisanship.**

And I’m so excited for the progressive reforms to come.

[**That’s why I’m chipping in $3 to Mark Takano’s campaign to keep the House blue so Democrats in Congress can keep passing legislation that our country sorely needs. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38511943/315771665/232128462?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20211110_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzY3NTA2MS04MjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gov3k1fX1UHQkT5OvzOhOgCAyv3mfv1r-2Y1LQZD5g8=) | [5,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN THE LETTER! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38511945/315771667/232128462?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20211110_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzY3NTA2MS04MjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gov3k1fX1UHQkT5OvzOhOgCAyv3mfv1r-2Y1LQZD5g8=)

Peter

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. We donated, protested, and voted. And the result? We ousted Trump, and gained majorities in the House and the Senate -- a trifecta! Over the weekend, you finally got the major infrastructure bill passed -- you fought tirelessly despite Republican opposition and obstruction. Thanks to our fight in 2020 and your hard work since, we are about to see major changes to American infrastructure from trains to bridges, roads, energy, and so much more. subject: I'm running for Congress
body:
Let's fight, together, for our American values.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001atquxouyNaKZke5JiWrRriyjQS7YXbJgKftKMj_Rw2uaH2LbfX7fJOwozcNBT0eeJM2J9ecm2YoR2aNkakpCEFzabhKoiQszxcFm6vzWCY-alJ3_iCtan4sEy_QFUE21RSG3DcaBI-qOp_sABhsOyg==&c=RzAOR828C_-ZQH5IeCPLj7Ctuu7we5lWHerkd4JnQzzDx7fGKByLiA==&ch=FG96KBvo0b01naRtTrAI_5KR5RO5qO01GFS538H0zFI1i_ezXc0geQ==)
---
| Peter,
I'm Nick De Gregorio, Marine veteran and candidate for Congress in New Jersey's 5th Congressional District.
Today, November 10th, on the 246th anniversary of the creation of the Marine Corps, [I'm announcing my candidacy](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001atquxouyNaKZke5JiWrRriyjQS7YXbJgKftKMj_Rw2uaH2LbfX7fJCpL3IBelzwXtJttxLEBudbwvyIO7IysRvaCLV4Pli1NrVls0tu8W-92TJCf_B-_ZHwYIKUcEvOj8sBwCkULIxskst_NrO_Qvq2-J3WFtZOR69m49grmZsG4Av3icI1smJLnELu_TFdq7YZ1JhGUSGtXorEWXaQwu2OTSkTsCl2dJqAshXMoyt0vBoI-wdC-YJt2kv8fcqepoe2zYdSwNms=&c=RzAOR828C_-ZQH5IeCPLj7Ctuu7we5lWHerkd4JnQzzDx7fGKByLiA==&ch=FG96KBvo0b01naRtTrAI_5KR5RO5qO01GFS538H0zFI1i_ezXc0geQ==). [I'm counting on Americans like you to support me in my push to ensure Bergen, Passaic, Sussex, and Warren Counties have a strong, proven leader fighting for them in D.C.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001atquxouyNaKZke5JiWrRriyjQS7YXbJgKftKMj_Rw2uaH2LbfX7fJCpL3IBelzwXzkK6PeLHSUu7dp5qxHOocWDF27MGBBemfNoHGBljinqc8QiRr_qko8lOklhsuZOSPSeHaZT8YnoSL-YP6CUI57b_UtlauTpwZae5Tvnrn1dbtKfIY0Lj8mUOUAugj1_WdsIP9teCO9s=&c=RzAOR828C_-ZQH5IeCPLj7Ctuu7we5lWHerkd4JnQzzDx7fGKByLiA==&ch=FG96KBvo0b01naRtTrAI_5KR5RO5qO01GFS538H0zFI1i_ezXc0geQ==)

---
| [Can I count on you to have my back?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001atquxouyNaKZke5JiWrRriyjQS7YXbJgKftKMj_Rw2uaH2LbfX7fJCpL3IBelzwXzkK6PeLHSUu7dp5qxHOocWDF27MGBBemfNoHGBljinqc8QiRr_qko8lOklhsuZOSPSeHaZT8YnoSL-YP6CUI57b_UtlauTpwZae5Tvnrn1dbtKfIY0Lj8mUOUAugj1_WdsIP9teCO9s=&c=RzAOR828C_-ZQH5IeCPLj7Ctuu7we5lWHerkd4JnQzzDx7fGKByLiA==&ch=FG96KBvo0b01naRtTrAI_5KR5RO5qO01GFS538H0zFI1i_ezXc0geQ==)
[Pitch in $100, $250, or whatever you can afford today to give us the running start we need to win this race.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001atquxouyNaKZke5JiWrRriyjQS7YXbJgKftKMj_Rw2uaH2LbfX7fJCpL3IBelzwXzkK6PeLHSUu7dp5qxHOocWDF27MGBBemfNoHGBljinqc8QiRr_qko8lOklhsuZOSPSeHaZT8YnoSL-YP6CUI57b_UtlauTpwZae5Tvnrn1dbtKfIY0Lj8mUOUAugj1_WdsIP9teCO9s=&c=RzAOR828C_-ZQH5IeCPLj7Ctuu7we5lWHerkd4JnQzzDx7fGKByLiA==&ch=FG96KBvo0b01naRtTrAI_5KR5RO5qO01GFS538H0zFI1i_ezXc0geQ==)
My opponent has been caving to the far-left socialists in D.C. He's supporting pieces of legislation that are tearing down our American values, all under the watchful guide of Nancy Pelosi.
[I NEED your support to flip this seat red.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001atquxouyNaKZke5JiWrRriyjQS7YXbJgKftKMj_Rw2uaH2LbfX7fJCpL3IBelzwXzkK6PeLHSUu7dp5qxHOocWDF27MGBBemfNoHGBljinqc8QiRr_qko8lOklhsuZOSPSeHaZT8YnoSL-YP6CUI57b_UtlauTpwZae5Tvnrn1dbtKfIY0Lj8mUOUAugj1_WdsIP9teCO9s=&c=RzAOR828C_-ZQH5IeCPLj7Ctuu7we5lWHerkd4JnQzzDx7fGKByLiA==&ch=FG96KBvo0b01naRtTrAI_5KR5RO5qO01GFS538H0zFI1i_ezXc0geQ==) [Are you with me?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001atquxouyNaKZke5JiWrRriyjQS7YXbJgKftKMj_Rw2uaH2LbfX7fJCpL3IBelzwXzkK6PeLHSUu7dp5qxHOocWDF27MGBBemfNoHGBljinqc8QiRr_qko8lOklhsuZOSPSeHaZT8YnoSL-YP6CUI57b_UtlauTpwZae5Tvnrn1dbtKfIY0Lj8mUOUAugj1_WdsIP9teCO9s=&c=RzAOR828C_-ZQH5IeCPLj7Ctuu7we5lWHerkd4JnQzzDx7fGKByLiA==&ch=FG96KBvo0b01naRtTrAI_5KR5RO5qO01GFS538H0zFI1i_ezXc0geQ==)
Thank you for your support and I look forward to sharing more with you from the campaign trail in the coming months.
Sincerely,
Nick De Gregorio Candidate for Congress New Jersey's 5th Congressional District

name: Charles Graham
subject: I’m a special education teacher, dad, high school basketball coach, and Native American running for Congress in North Carolina. Will you chip into my campaign today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charles Graham for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38512218/315775963/-325589832?refcode=gra_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWE5OWYyOS04NDQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mywxVGPB6U-to7TLhHj5BmKS4TSQOqxOtB-ROK-cc_g=)

| | Folks, Before I was elected to North Carolina’s General Assembly, I was a special education teacher and a high school basketball coach -- and when it comes down to it, my job as a legislator isn’t all that different. It’s about figuring out the problems my constituents are facing, and finding solutions to them. I felt compelled to run for office when I looked around my community and saw folks going bankrupt trying to access basic healthcare, unable to find dignified employment opportunities, and neighbors distrusting one another because of divisive lies being spread by our elected officials. There has to be a better way. That’s why I’m running to bring jobs back to the Sandhills, enshrine healthcare as a right, and help us all recognize the humanity and dignity of our neighbors. [**If you’re with me, will you chip in $25 or whatever you can to my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38512219/315775964/-1187958480?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211110_FR_MyStory_A1_subj_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWE5OWYyOS04NDQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mywxVGPB6U-to7TLhHj5BmKS4TSQOqxOtB-ROK-cc_g=) | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38512220/315775965/-1187958480?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211110_FR_MyStory_A1_subj_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWE5OWYyOS04NDQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mywxVGPB6U-to7TLhHj5BmKS4TSQOqxOtB-ROK-cc_g=)
---
I’ve represented North Carolina’s 47th district in our State House for 10 years, and I have a track record of taking bipartisan action on the issues that folks care about most, such as expanding Medicaid coverage, protecting our environment from corporate polluters, and ensuring rural folks have a seat at the table.
I’m ready to take this experience to Washington, where I can represent my community on a larger scale, and take bolder action on the issues they care about.
But, I can’t get there alone. I need your help, folks -- [**will you join my team and donate $25 or whatever you can to my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38512221/315775966/-1187958480?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211110_FR_MyStory_A1_subj_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWE5OWYyOS04NDQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mywxVGPB6U-to7TLhHj5BmKS4TSQOqxOtB-ROK-cc_g=)

clean_body: | = | | Folks, Before I was elected to North Carolina’s General Assembly, I was a special education teacher and a high school basketball coach -- and when it comes down to it, my job as a legislator isn’t all that different. It’s about figuring out the problems my constituents are facing, and finding solutions to them. I felt compelled to run for office when I looked around my community and saw folks going bankrupt trying to access basic healthcare, unable to find dignified employment opportunities, and neighbors distrusting one another because of divisive lies being spread by our elected officials. There has to be a better way. That’s why I’m running to bring jobs back to the Sandhills, enshrine healthcare as a right, and help us all recognize the humanity and dignity of our neighbors. = | | | = I’ve represented North Carolina’s 47th district in our State House for 10 years, and I have a track record of taking bipartisan action on the issues that folks care about most, such as expanding Medicaid coverage, protecting our environment from corporate polluters, and ensuring rural folks have a seat at the table. I’m ready to take this experience to Washington, where I can represent my community on a larger scale, and take bolder action on the issues they care about. But, I can’t get there alone. I need your help, folks -- = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Charles | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. President Trump is building a platform for proud American Patriots like you and me. He promised: ✖️ No Conservative censorship ✖️ No shadow bans ✖️ No blacklists. It's incredible! Thank you so much, \-- Jordan Republican Headquarters (House GOP) Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Nikki Fried
subject: We’re not going to keep drilling
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

I want to update you on an important item: last week, we successfully blocked an oil drilling permit near Big Cypress in Collier County.

Drilling in the greater Everglades poses a direct threat to our water supply. I’m proud that our department played a critical role in stopping this dangerous project.

There’s a larger problem at play here. For years, elected Republicans have said yes to projects that threaten our environment and avoided action on plenty of impending environmental crises.

That’s why I’ve urged federal and state agencies to stop ALL oil drilling in Florida. I’m looking forward to hosting the Department’s energy and climate summit next week so that we can continue fighting climate change and embracing new, renewable, and green sources of energy.

And over the course of my time in office, I’ve taken dozens of actions to ensure every Floridian has access to clean water, hold noncompliant farms accountable for damaging our environment, and set Florida on the path to a renewable energy future.

But team, we’ll never continue along that path with Ron DeSantis in charge. So I’m asking for your help. Please click here to chip in now and help me continue protecting our water, our environment, and our future in the governor’s office. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-2021?refcode=1110enviro]

I grew up in Florida and have lived here my entire life, friends. For me, this fight is about securing the future of the place I’ve always called home.

When it comes to our water, our environment, and our planet, we can’t wait to take bold action. I’ve been consistent on this point, which can’t be said for other candidates in this race.

Thanks for fighting by my side for our future,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ad430dc2-7042-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/d4a957c0-8442-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGE5NTdjMC04NDQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c7xjnhjD4CirNPVeWRCvwR9giXmqD4e5ZPTBYjUttVU=&id=116879433 .

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: You’ve been assigned Maricopa County: 2,651,539 registered voters
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
One of the reasons Mark was able to win in 2020 was because we campaigned in ALL of Arizona
#

Friends —
One of the reasons Mark was able to win in 2020 was because we campaigned in ALL of Arizona.
We campaigned in counties traditionally considered “blue” and counties considered “red.” We did it because that’s how you win, and because that’s the kind of senator Mark strives to be — one who represents everyone, in every part of the state.
We ran a 15 County campaign with one goal: winning.
Now we’re launching a new 15 County Plan for our next election, and we need your help.
We’re going to randomly assign you Maricopa County. There are about 2,651,539 registered voters there and it will cost about $.50 apiece to reach each one of them. That means we need to to raise about $1,325,770 to reach our goal in Maricopa County.
Can Mark count on you to help him win in Maricopa County?
[**Please make a $3 contribution to help Mark Kelly win in Maricopa County and win re-election in Arizona. We would not ask if this were not so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211110-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1648_6688874_XXDxtu&akid=1648%2E6688874%2EXXDxtu)

Hello,
I’ve dedicated my life to service, enlisting at the age of 20 in the U.S. Navy and serving nearly 40 years before retiring as a three-star Admiral.
Now I’m running for U.S. Senate against Chuck Grassley because elected officials in Washington need to get back to true public service – not serving their own interests and those of their campaign donors.
That’s why talking to voters and grassroots Democrats has been my favorite part of running for office. Nothing can replace hearing directly from the people who are trusting you to be a steward for them and their families in DC.
**My team created a quick survey, and I hope you’ll just take a few minutes to tell me what you’re concerned about right now and what issues are most important to you and your family:**
[**https://www.research.net/r/20211110-nd**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOp0BRtX1y_W_kG7ius1qSoSM_GV05Zf975oc2hTt9dH7qcgNXzcvcFmHINpG-PdW5x8Qbb1xessexKCGe_o8Jzk-mEKlvfOT0b1xFPRelC-XZNumkqBJu8pH-Mxp5NiB-vp5E0oX6TY6aVmEaYYlp_DHQaCvuN61fdxJSBWqZHeGumN4IbEVb5EDRebwY-cCZwkbFtbwEvjhPtd90rafXB6cuf4vbQFeRQLjnKF4-YZfYPXkADaC27GqOcqT4fDbCrxoBfvSxDjFkQ_EyNDgyo/3gw/y-XH6xnqT_eytNGMtXRsnw/h2/olb7dHH7ETqy9xeolF-MlarbU-NQ0Z-H_ZL_Mvoo2Rs)

Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

clean_body: Peter, The latest Alabama Senate poll showed me as the LEADER in my race! ONE POINT could mean everything for my fight to support growing good-paying jobs and opportunity for Alabama families. We have 72 HOURS to sustain this momentum, EXPAND this lead, and reach our $10K fundraising goal. Can I count on YOU? name: Tedra Cobb
subject: Democrats are delivering results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
The infrastructure bill signed into law by President Biden is a bold, once-in-a-generation investment in rural communities.

| | | **INFRASTRUCTURE BILL BENEFITS RURAL COMMUNITIES**

**Democrats are showing rural voters that we will put them first.**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38512457/315781627/-1273307081?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211110-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTEwODk4Zi04NjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ak0Pr-fSfJnrvMykMJUxPj4MC8n7c7zfMBKnVpjMMHA=)
---
Peter,

The losses in Virginia earlier this month were a wake-up call to Democrats that they need to chip away at rural Republican strongholds. The best way to do that is to show voters that Democrats are delivering results — and that’s exactly what the infrastructure plan does.

The infrastructure bill signed into law by President Biden is a bold, once-in-a-generation investment in rural communities — including rebuilding roads and bridges, expanding access to broadband, and ensuring clean drinking water. **And of course, hardly any Republicans supported these critical investments in rural infrastructure.** If we are going to protect the House majority next year, we need to make sure that rural voters hear our important message and know that Democrats are looking out for them — while Republicans are happy to leave them behind.

[_**Will you please contribute today so rural Democrats have the resources they need to communicate their winning message to voters?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38512458/315781628/-1273307081?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211110-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTEwODk4Zi04NjQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ak0Pr-fSfJnrvMykMJUxPj4MC8n7c7zfMBKnVpjMMHA=)

The infrastructure bill signed into law by President Biden is a bold, once-in-a-generation investment in rural communities — including rebuilding roads and bridges, expanding access to broadband, and ensuring clean drinking water. body:
A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d95aa4d028af4eddb9f1bc4bd42959e2&_e=ahnluGYiW635jl0dJeccUKB5JBqz9mxouA2AgFIyjI3vGwMkKR1EKmClnnPZ22ayAvCvE75Nqn4ItSOCRS7cxinH-GwlpmpPLJuNpZJ49u15bVy6dM_KUYEq3IFDHh7imDwor3ogIcrZByGQp09oJn6Qy8cKxJHUXfArKu3vW0Gn30vm_fHXmnzIx6oDtz-NZ8OyAWF26xo3ILMwHB8OPD7IsMEcDNX_cjWrw6Fb5bl1UACuG7A9aSR5cF66yozLCB2fFEQZt2kUb9Dzgr1SWphp8io63tOyJNWaeCZYPCie8l8F9fi_urKQR9yK2h3NoswndyIst8nCuAeAPxT96bA6wiE2kxw8huIsTYnje3ticq1FPyPEXgzUfXF0DU0G027btShLf1v1cWYpSUH6oPB4q_wi-Zx4QT5AHErYq7eH1_hC_LglBs18_y5Vej8EcVm8ViT9e0bBS-VRZDjgKQSl663QQtL-klbeVg5kXjI%3D)

Peter,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d95aa4d028af4eddb9f1bc4bd42959e2&_e=ahnluGYiW635jl0dJeccUKB5JBqz9mxouA2AgFIyjI3vGwMkKR1EKmClnnPZ22ayAvCvE75Nqn4ItSOCRS7cxinH-GwlpmpPLJuNpZJ49u15bVy6dM_KUYEq3IFDHh7imDwor3ogIcrZByGQp09oJn6Qy8cKxJHUXfArKu3vW0Gn30vm_fHXmnzIx6oDtz-NZ8OyAWF26xo3ILMwHB8OPD7IsMEcDNX_cjWrw6Fb5bl1UACuG7A9aSR5cF66yozLLcszV-9C6VdSuhNCVNOfbWiEZ_LYp3LS84ZgYH1x6uPzIp-6mLdpa1Ip0ciVw7EqxphGMi1gQ_Fw8jbgua7fj3T_6fftKz15z-MH1T4XAFlSyPBfATT5MVYELG0JzTAcucqzrmaqe7Dr17iJM1NL8RrjHsrk2aa8GCseE6ZJoNvzOQtdaz8QZVwbkdK1XpOVeEHohvJUAgyqGJBRKLoMt2wlis2-LGhTa8Hv7j_HSls%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d95aa4d028af4eddb9f1bc4bd42959e2&_e=ahnluGYiW635jl0dJeccUKB5JBqz9mxouA2AgFIyjI3vGwMkKR1EKmClnnPZ22ayAvCvE75Nqn4ItSOCRS7cxinH-GwlpmpPLJuNpZJ49u15bVy6dM_KUYEq3IFDHh7imDwor3ogIcrZByGQp09oJn6Qy8cKxJHUXfArKu3vW0Gn30vm_fHXmnzIx6oDtz-NZ8OyAWF26xo3ILMwHB8OPD7IsMEcDNX_cjWrw6Fb5bl1UACuG7A9aSR5cF66yozLIPtCnfVRnoOof8p4PiMW8ya5cNm6KhQ72s2FUBf7gHz5v3hMDG-KX4wCnATvkyxdBjJizfYC4kqobZtw8Zi7hPWVhTRTLpKhBp9Bktu5kOUbXRD5zfsIWLUI7yBJFoH9lmbpLkvCSU0JQrLzSKuRSLWhrGFXwCSPWRt-gUAbw4ji31Q31XvKs6kJ6a8XD5gjMqoKaCi-kYVaG4zBwnYBC5ac-z-kBjI2Y_DCt5QoA3c%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d95aa4d028af4eddb9f1bc4bd42959e2&_e=ahnluGYiW635jl0dJeccUKB5JBqz9mxouA2AgFIyjI3vGwMkKR1EKmClnnPZ22ayAvCvE75Nqn4ItSOCRS7cxinH-GwlpmpPLJuNpZJ49u15bVy6dM_KUYEq3IFDHh7imDwor3ogIcrZByGQp09oJn6Qy8cKxJHUXfArKu3vW0Gn30vm_fHXmnzIx6oDtz-NZ8OyAWF26xo3ILMwHB8OPD7IsMEcDNX_cjWrw6Fb5bl1UACuG7A9aSR5cF66yozL5hKMc0NLWmPaInsX2AeD9FcaXlF9l_tnc-RDUrFPFV066ahYyoJGj0Ti4Jia5sxyZGcqILY5hm_Qm-BB0w5iT7qTy_r6nsgb1QfM8lWWVLjQPdMXXfdYBpYBmhOK_28JNJ_Q_m0YZpRPJF6fk2mEDGzStJl0kS9xiLKBXAbEw8R5Gco0IfNJ8ysm3Rr-HLuYV98pcm4iCA7kNUfevswm95fVc4W-wVmtdXyirkPPKBI%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d95aa4d028af4eddb9f1bc4bd42959e2&_e=ahnluGYiW635jl0dJeccUKB5JBqz9mxouA2AgFIyjI3vGwMkKR1EKmClnnPZ22ayAvCvE75Nqn4ItSOCRS7cxinH-GwlpmpPLJuNpZJ49u15bVy6dM_KUYEq3IFDHh7imDwor3ogIcrZByGQp09oJn6Qy8cKxJHUXfArKu3vW0Gn30vm_fHXmnzIx6oDtz-NZ8OyAWF26xo3ILMwHB8OPD7IsMEcDNX_cjWrw6Fb5bl1UACuG7A9aSR5cF66yozL_XLTUxD3CUVlavNyOUlgTjz1qqD-MQtCZxbjuMKeayk07Iu3EInMcCpRmXuug2tnMC8c2mnwVtvXVS-fOv_cehiSFcYpeRrt4D1SklMu5TGfbFKmk4xmkX_9mVk_1tE9G2QqvlmWSHf-uUHjsz2y2DZi9ikxBi5lhpKli1Y8L0oBM55n1P82aY7YsMZMhZXkDJ1SvH29HPaFyCmM1iNmKVswg2WQGJjHWGzdeFmv0yc%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d95aa4d028af4eddb9f1bc4bd42959e2&_e=ahnluGYiW635jl0dJeccUKB5JBqz9mxouA2AgFIyjI3vGwMkKR1EKmClnnPZ22ayAvCvE75Nqn4ItSOCRS7cxinH-GwlpmpPLJuNpZJ49u15bVy6dM_KUYEq3IFDHh7imDwor3ogIcrZByGQp09oJn6Qy8cKxJHUXfArKu3vW0Gn30vm_fHXmnzIx6oDtz-NZ8OyAWF26xo3ILMwHB8OPD7IsMEcDNX_cjWrw6Fb5bl1UACuG7A9aSR5cF66yozLPLKhiR3v7xDKA8gI65cGRqL17EKDeju19J7ehiIWGShBRBslsVaJ9xjTNsCtW2qVcqaL1DoMKpVUDwHp-yd48WtWLHlNc5700kM_v1m2hI5HJWFmg-Sintq4O7KJTjsGyihhUL0yM6dq6LzsPzw03nOAHD69pQ3LBGYQMDH7PJaybFGmNzGe5ktWhWqBhmTJVn6ywx1lBsyogVK85u3Cq1fFChobVcntwePQWR1EAUI%3D)

Thank you very much,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

**"Experts at POLITICO say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue."**
_(line from a recent Democrat email)_

Peter,

Democrats know that their Senate majority rests with their ability to "keep Georgia blue."

First off - Georgia isn't a blue state. However, our Democrat opponent is cultivating a voting record that Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders would be proud to claim.

Each of these emails raises tens of thousands of dollars - which tells us a few things:
1. National Democrats know our opponent is in trouble.
2. Our Democrat opponent knows he's in trouble.
3. But he's going to have a whole lot of money to attack us.

But, we also noticed that you haven’t made your contribution yet. Our mid-month deadline will be here before we know it, team. There’s plenty of organizing across the state that our campaign has left to do and they’re counting on us to raise the money we need for it to happen. Don’t forget: Nevada could be the closest state for Democrats in 2022 and after winning his race by just over 4 points in 2018, Steve Sisolak needs us to build a wall of support around him ahead of this Battleground election! name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Energy policies to help us—and nature—thrive
body:
There is a better way
---
| | | | | | Volume 16 | November 10, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
No one can seriously imagine that radical Democrat plans to end U.S. energy independence by killing vital American hydrocarbon industries will have any true benefit--either in measurable climate impacts or economically. Yet, in the next week, Democrats will try to throw trillions of dollars at meager attempts to address climate change.

By doing this, they will lay a heavy burden on American taxpayers while taking away essential industries that fuel our economy and livelihoods.

Meanwhile, there's little wonder why China President Xi Jinping and Russian President Vladimir Putin didn't join Joe Biden, and more than 400 participants who jetted off to Glasgow, for an international climate conference. That's because those two leaders have no intention to sacrifice their nations' industrial programs as they watch their key economic and military adversary--America--do so.

Here at home, the rush to unreliable energy sources by the Democrats is truly hypocritical.
After cancelling the Keystone XL pipeline and halting new drilling on public lands, Biden has allowed Russia to complete its Nord Stream 2 natural gas pipeline to Europe. At the same time, he is begging OPEC to increase oil production.

Meanwhile our own nation now faces a winter heating season with global energy shortages and skyrocketing prices as China builds the equivalent of one new coal plant per week.

A Democrat rush into dependence on unreliable weather-dependent wind and solar "renewables" that currently provide, at most, about three percent of American and global energy is dangerously unrealistic and costly.

Home heating prices are predicted to soar this winter by double digit percentages. The U.S. Energy Information Administration forecasts Americans will pay:
* 54% more for propane
* 43% more for heating oil
* 30% more for natural gas
* 6% more for electric heat

Additional transportation fuel and electrical power costs resulting from current Democrat agendas will lay heavy burdens upon U.S. energy ratepayers and taxpayers, food and product consumers, and the job-critical supply chain businesses that create and deliver them to our stores and doorsteps.

None of this is necessary--nor is it "green."

Wind and solar promoters hypocritically ignore major environmental impacts from the production of their products, such as the mining of lithium and other rare earth minerals required for photovoltaic panels and storage batteries. Not only do they contaminate water supplies in the areas where they are mined, they will one day wind up in toxic landfills.

Making matters worse, we depend upon China for about 80 percent of these essential materials.

American innovation is the key to tackling world energy and environmental challenges. And yes, we can also learn from the clearly proven examples of other countries.

Nuclear power is the largest source of electricity in France. It's both clean and reliable.
Arid Israel recycles 80% of its water supply. Highly treated wastewater accounts for about half of its agricultural needs which account for about 2.5% of its gross domestic product and 4% of its exports.

Nature has taught us that innovation and adaptation are key to survival and progress. Let's put those commonsense principles to work for shared benefits of Colorado, America, and the precious environment we all wish to protect.

We must strive diligently for a balanced energy policy, while finding innovative ways to be more efficient with our natural resources. Stand with me and join our cause by sending me to Washington. A quick donation now will have an impact for years to come
|

Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
Last week, I met with those attending the sixth annual African Summit in Denver where the theme of resiliency was shared.

On Saturday morning, Randy Corporon and I discussed the upcoming election on his KNUS radio show.

Then, Saturday evening, it was good to visit with the Colorado Republican Party at the Centennial Dinner in Colorado Springs.

This week, I was the guest speaker at a gathering of the Arapahoe Tea Party.
On Thursday, I return to Colorado Springs to speak at the campaign kickoff of Steven Noblitt for Sheriff.

Friday, I will attend the Morgan County Central Gala Dinner. Saturday, it's off to Weld County for the South Weld County Breakfast, then I speak at the Celebration Congregation Church.

I sincerely hope to see you soon on the trail!

clean_body: There is a better way | | | | | | Volume 16 | November 10, 2021 | | A Word From Erik | | | ---|--- | No one can seriously imagine that radical Democrat plans to end U.S. energy independence by killing vital American hydrocarbon industries will have any true benefit--either in measurable climate impacts or economically. Yet, in the next week, Democrats will try to throw trillions of dollars at meager attempts to address climate change. By doing this, they will lay a heavy burden on American taxpayers while taking away essential industries that fuel our economy and livelihoods. Meanwhile, there's little wonder why China President Xi Jinping and Russian President Vladimir Putin didn't join Joe Biden, and more than 400 participants who jetted off to Glasgow, for an international climate conference. That's because those two leaders have no intention to sacrifice their nations' industrial programs as they watch their key economic and military adversary--America--do so. Here at home, the rush to unreliable energy sources by the Democrats is truly hypocritical. After cancelling the Keystone XL pipeline and halting new drilling on public lands, Biden has allowed Russia to complete its Nord Stream 2 natural gas pipeline to Europe. At the same time, he is begging OPEC to increase oil production. Meanwhile our own nation now faces a winter heating season with global energy shortages and skyrocketing prices as China builds the equivalent of one new coal plant per week. A Democrat rush into dependence on unreliable weather-dependent wind and solar "renewables" that currently provide, at most, about three percent of American and global energy is dangerously unrealistic and costly. Home heating prices are predicted to soar this winter by double digit percentages. The U.S. Energy Information Administration forecasts Americans will pay: 54% more for propane 43% more for heating oil 30% more for natural gas 6% more for electric heat Additional transportation fuel and electrical power costs resulting from current Democrat agendas will lay heavy burdens upon U.S. energy ratepayers and taxpayers, food and product consumers, and the job-critical supply chain businesses that create and deliver them to our stores and doorsteps. None of this is necessary--nor is it "green." Wind and solar promoters hypocritically ignore major environmental impacts from the production of their products, such as the mining of lithium and other rare earth minerals required for photovoltaic panels and storage batteries. Not only do they contaminate water supplies in the areas where they are mined, they will one day wind up in toxic landfills. Making matters worse, we depend upon China for about 80 percent of these essential materials. American innovation is the key to tackling world energy and environmental challenges. And yes, we can also learn from the clearly proven examples of other countries. Nuclear power is the largest source of electricity in France. It's both clean and reliable. Arid Israel recycles 80% of its water supply. Highly treated wastewater accounts for about half of its agricultural needs which account for about 2.5% of its gross domestic product and 4% of its exports. Nature has taught us that innovation and adaptation are key to survival and progress. Let's put those commonsense principles to work for shared benefits of Colorado, America, and the precious environment we all wish to protect. We must strive diligently for a balanced energy policy, while finding innovative ways to be more efficient with our natural resources. Stand with me and join our cause by sending me to Washington. A quick donation now will have an impact for years to come | | | | | Sebastian Gorka "America First" national radio show | | | ---|--- | Last week I discussed several issues such as getting out to vote with Tron Simpson as he filled in for Sebastian Gorka on the nationally known "America First" radio show. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem111021 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem111021] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Folks –
Starting today we’re having Wednesdays with Wade – bringing you the latest from Wade himself.
Whether it’s a fun historical fact about the district, brief lesson learned from the campaign trail, or humorous story, Wade is going to bring a short video to your inbox every week.
https://fb.watch/9c6QnKEUJL/ [https://fb.watch/9c6QnKEUJL/]
We hope you enjoy, and please share with anyone else who might like it as well. The Wade Brigade is growing!
Talk soon,
The Wade Brigade
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Support Wade [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem111021] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Wade Herring, lawyer and community volunteer, is running for Congress in Georgia’s First Congressional District. Wade grew up in Macon, Georgia. He has worked with the law firm of HunterMaclean since 1985. Among other volunteer positions, Wade has served as president of the Savannah Bar Association, chair of the trustees at Wesley Monumental United Methodist Church, and board member of Georgia Appleseed. Wade is a graduate of Dartmouth College and the University of Georgia School of Law.Wade lives in Savannah, Georgia with his wife Susan of 39 years. Wade and Susan are the parents of two children, a son who is a lawyer in Atlanta, and a daughter who is a doctor in Winston-Salem, North Carolina.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: They Stole New Jersey, Too
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
This is why audits are important! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c5b4782d15&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
Have you been watching the news?

**Then you couldn’t have missed Glenn Youngkin’s tremendous win over Terry McAuliffe in Virginia. **

_And you also couldn’t miss the nail-bitingly close contest in New Jersey._
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ee1ee45521&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **And if we have learned anything from close contests, this is where the Democrats DON’T PLAY FAIR!**

In the dead of night, once again we saw the same play out of the same playbook. Thousands of “miracle” votes procured out of thin air with already 100% of votes reporting...
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=554619a606&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| There is still time for this to play out and I am calling for all election integrity patriots to _watch this contest closely._

If we’re all watching, then they have nowhere to hide.

**_1:54 AM: When everything changed_**

As seems to be the pattern of Democrat “victories,” everything changes in the dead of night.

At 1:54, in particular.

Bergen County, New Jersey’s largest county, was claiming 100% votes reported with 219,894 votes, with Jack Ciattarelli winning 52% of the vote of that county.

**Then, a “glitch happened.”**

_Without warning, the vote switched to 261,528 votes (over 40,000 votes more), with Murphy declared winner of that county. 40,000 votes out of nowhere!_

**_Ringing any bells yet?_**

_This is exactly why I am pushing for a nationwide audit in all 50 states. We are making great progress here in Arizona. AG Brnovich has launched his investigation and we are pressing on to Pima!_

But this is not sufficient. When we see sources of blatant fraud, it is time for us to double down on our efforts and save our elections!

_If you think we need to push for a nationwide audit, especially in New Jersey, please support my efforts here!_

My name is Mark Finchem. I have been leading the vanguard of election integrity Patriots since I initially paid for election integrity hearings out of pocket.

**And this was the spark that ignited the firestorm now sweeping America of Election Integrity.**

_This is why I am the Trump endorsed candidate for Secretary of State of Arizona. He knows that I will protect elections in this key swing state and make sure that 2020 never happens again!_

**[But I cannot win this fight without your help. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=09308bad94&e=44b8c466b0) We are almost done with 2021, and 2022 is about to begin. And we need to make sure we have the war chest to continue to fight the good fight against Liberals backed by crony Silicon Valley Billionaires.**

_[Can you help us win this fight with a generous donation today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2763d69297&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9db530b45c&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=edcb35aad0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3a1ca6fed3&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---

Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=2f4d490e6c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=2f4d490e6c).

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6572%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=LFs2IxU1NU5wTjCO7h4akw&sysid=1)
| | | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67993%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MeY1Ar4PVGtDf%2bZICDwDTg&sysid=1)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this - Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67994%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tHZORkIu2RYtOus%2fqspGBw&sysid=1)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67906%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gjDiHmYMbEsKCUaNBpH7nw&sysid=1)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67907%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jPArHZh0osEJ0Gluu2oxSg&sysid=1)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67906%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gjDiHmYMbEsKCUaNBpH7nw&sysid=1)

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Sir, you cannot speak to a combat veteran this way
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
Brian Mast, a veteran who lost both legs in an IED explosion, was just called a F***ing A*****e by my Democrat opponent The only thing I’m guilty of is making my opponent and national Democrats spend money to defend a congressional seat they think belongs to them | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=87b869d717ec4a6e9693349b00b3b3ed&_e=N4Jko5mjDOjfgr3U3-mnRgMXzC3U6OOGcE_jY_jOOLSYMVUJPz-ieJRK3lENA0IQZ003RP0Jf44kgxMq4pGZFuKL1Os_NzusyRgbOG51lSnSY7fJNjwWjyrPTGXajaPlBKKUD6JeWGhbVYcVp-PsV6RsCAf0URy4tG80m5KlLXO01eKZpuNOydmibE7aedyih2JMYZE7fyJAPmwxYW7sYH-R617zivZQBTgRYZNqh8eohzPRevFw_909kipdgiIwWzgjyWJ9sBDQqLx_8w6JFbJ5m7CLWA0IEUWHU8JxlPqN0LoK9Abq52FdMv5pCWoGOiwPnXQ2kf0fnXfPVXeuztqHyn2r2Xl2NpJQ4jH4qDq48biXo-XYK-J_iKf9WY7jd7FqR4Sqpuu5JqCftew025iG5gN1ki92oxguPgfA8mRKxKDTYa1YX0A-pefEISKqJqOZUnLJRhPcjpdGIHk1SxsykSd7_y6-YsY4Y-CyegI%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

I’m writing today because I want to show you – in his truest form – the man I’m running against for Congress.

Peter DeFazio, the failed Chairman of the House Transportation Committee, refers to a fellow congressman, Brian Mast, a veteran who lost both legs in an IED explosion in Afghanistan as a **“F***ing A*****e”** simply because Rep. Mast attempted to introduce several amendments to a piece of legislation that my opponent didn’t agree with.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=87b869d717ec4a6e9693349b00b3b3ed&_e=N4Jko5mjDOjfgr3U3-mnRgMXzC3U6OOGcE_jY_jOOLSYMVUJPz-ieJRK3lENA0IQZ003RP0Jf44kgxMq4pGZFuKL1Os_NzusyRgbOG51lSnSY7fJNjwWjyrPTGXajaPlBKKUD6JeWGhbVYcVp-PsV6RsCAf0URy4tG80m5KlLXO01eKZpuNOydmibE7aedyih2JMYZE7fyJAPmwxYW7sYH-R617zivZQBTgRYZNqh8eohzPRevFw_909kipdgiIwkVZMGub5GVrZPBtYP60eOiEiAnC-x3BvRotFENvgPnS2gs_7MQnptNm584Y34AdC01iZqmafmucFFbRw_0rMQ9J2_NhXEfb_oW26AttMxUTGRwBqn6SrgKjIoyTcUBAXSAEx41TKPBZYA9WB_2gUFLW0BuGT8MnOWtKhZCVxOvh2BYxxthEO7aqFZyXrfN4s58t63G8AoZgjH1TMXrxv2uwQXzawafw9TL0BhQeY4Bk%3D)

So much for bipartisanship, eh?

I can tell you this: if I’m elected to Congress, whether I agree with an opponent or not, I’m certainly never going to be caught on a hot mic calling them derogatory names.

Sadly, Mr. Defazio’s treatment of a combat veteran wounded in the line of duty is emblematic of how Democrat’s feel not only about our veteran community, but Republicans in general.

**Tuesday night’s victory proved to everyone in America that Republicans have every chance to win back the House next November.**

**In fact, one prominent political prognosticator predicts that if Republicans were to outperform our 2020 numbers at the same level that we did in Virginia, we’d pick up more than 51 house seats. It’s time to retire this veteran-hating career politician.**

**[Will you help me get the job done?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=87b869d717ec4a6e9693349b00b3b3ed&_e=N4Jko5mjDOjfgr3U3-mnRgMXzC3U6OOGcE_jY_jOOLSYMVUJPz-ieJRK3lENA0IQZ003RP0Jf44kgxMq4pGZFuKL1Os_NzusyRgbOG51lSnSY7fJNjwWjyrPTGXajaPlBKKUD6JeWGhbVYcVp-PsV6RsCAf0URy4tG80m5KlLXO01eKZpuNOydmibE7aedyih2JMYZE7fyJAPmwxYW7sYH-R617zivZQBTgRYZNqh8eohzPRevFw_909kipdgiIwkMn9UPJyeeD2QbsI-4VGQ3Sf3e_dlLj4VX7fOe7O3nQOSlyIsUXsSn_CGLW7o3QTSnHgBt8vWaVU_Ap9b9fk06-nfymIPlNKTBuFsxD4WS_Dn0FAyq6oJIBatL26QUser6dYlxbMrOw3QQbGMLjVB9xtGS-ijYdmkhuaRcfOzf0Z2A2hiLCAfpOiw7ilM2mymbNRTacXO-jVcDu8XB6H1t0jkSYTQHP589qISbaaOxw%3D)**

Respectfully,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=87b869d717ec4a6e9693349b00b3b3ed&_e=N4Jko5mjDOjfgr3U3-mnRgMXzC3U6OOGcE_jY_jOOLSYMVUJPz-ieJRK3lENA0IQZ003RP0Jf44kgxMq4pGZFuKL1Os_NzusyRgbOG51lSnSY7fJNjwWjyrPTGXajaPlBKKUD6JeWGhbVYcVp-PsV6RsCAf0URy4tG80m5KlLXO01eKZpuNOydmibE7aedyih2JMYZE7fyJAPmwxYW7sYH-R617zivZQBTgRYZNqh8eohzPRevFw_909kipdgiIwfKl94oz6Z2TyNHN3YSn7-IvDc6DbnsJvvCG1_GVROa60sDvX2SgQgC7H1Re-o4hr3XJLPSAcIx8GAVsBldyKKY-mCH0V20c0Eldhx8KjxcxQF1qh29oo0gBzwUmdD2Zrxy-YlLQUDMc4pGOt0ZZ9UTR5fYfKsh5juIQqrTszInqTmQAlBtDqSDDz5X05BvUq8b3Oj_InQGvDysGbdTHvBUt4kO6UPeS1rzOox2m1b9U%3D)

clean_body: Brian Mast, a veteran who lost both legs in an IED explosion, was just called a F*ing A*e by my Democrat opponent The only thing I’m guilty of is making my opponent and national Democrats spend money to defend a congressional seat they think belongs to them | Fellow Conservative, I’m writing today because I want to show you – in his truest form – the man I’m running against for Congress. Peter DeFazio, the failed Chairman of the House Transportation Committee, refers to a fellow congressman, Brian Mast, a veteran who lost both legs in an IED explosion in Afghanistan as a “F*ing A*e” simply because Rep. Mast attempted to introduce several amendments to a piece of legislation that my opponent didn’t agree with. So much for bipartisanship, eh? I can tell you this: if I’m elected to Congress, whether I agree with an opponent or not, I’m certainly never going to be caught on a hot mic calling them derogatory names. Sadly, Mr. Defazio’s treatment of a combat veteran wounded in the line of duty is emblematic of how Democrat’s feel not only about our veteran community, but Republicans in general. Tuesday night’s victory proved to everyone in America that Republicans have every chance to win back the House next November. In fact, one prominent political prognosticator predicts that if Republicans were to outperform our 2020 numbers at the same level that we did in Virginia, we’d pick up more than 51 house seats. It’s time to retire this veteran-hating career politician. Respectfully, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: It's All Love
body:
My statement on yesterday's events. | | | **Taking a stand for justice.**
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e7aa94c577c7/its-all-love?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
| |
# It's All Love.
**To all the young men that are out there** , in the field, in the trenches and at war with the opposition: **I love you**. I want you to hear that loud and clear because for some you, you only hear that in the quiet. You hear those words said by people that's dead and they not with us no more, you hear it whispered by mom, sometimes dad, but you don't hear it loud enough and you don't hear it on the regular enough.

I know you think "he's just writing things to be writing things," but I'm serious. I love you and Chicago needs y'all. It's gone be y'all's chance to save the world soon, sooner than y'all think too. I love you. At the moment when you are able to hear yourself think, you always get one moment before you make a move, before you change your life and the life of an opp, search for these words in that quiet - I love you. Also, I need y'all to come up out of this "I'm in the trenches" mindset. Come up out that "I'm at war with the opposition" mindset. You're bout to be 18 and you can't be in the field forever because that field is just like the draft, each year new recruits are seeking to take your place.

* * *

As most of you know by now, I was on 53rd when the shooting started yesterday. I want to be clear that I am not sure if I was an intended target or if it was a random shooting. Regardless, this is unacceptable and the people of the First District deserve better.

This is the second time in the past month that I've been shot at. I didn't share the first incident because I wasn't ready, but I need every elected official - and every person in this city - to understand how urgent this crisis is. I'm a candidate for Congress and was just shot at in the very same district I am running to represent. I had to dive under a car and run for my life.

After the incident, I got a flood of texts checking in, making sure I was okay, and sharing that people were praying for my safety and mental health. Thank you. Dealing with this incident is going to take time, and knowing my community prays for me means so much.

I also got texts asking why I haven't moved out of the district. I've been asked this before, so I want to underscore something - I am not running away. **I care too damn much about the people on my block to leave them behind** and move to a neighborhood that hasn't been disinvested in. That's the whole reason I started My Block, My Hood, My City. I cared about the people I worked with in Cook County, I cared about our youth who had never gone beyond their block. **I still care. I will not abandon them and I will not abandon you**. **I love you.**

I'm not going to talk policy here, but I will share with you some interviews and articles below that express my plans for IL-01. Just know that I've got your back, and am going to keep fighting for justice in this district. I hope that you will [make a contribution](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=c8959eb0d5&e=339f142c50) to the campaign so we can begin to implement some extra safety measures at our events. I want you all to feel safe when you come to our campaign headquarters (aka Chatham House). I want to feel safe too and I am working with my team to ensure that everyone feels comfortable so we can keep fighting for change in IL-01.

Thank you for your continued support.
Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole

---
| | Press coverage of the incident and my thoughts via interviews:

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Hey Derek — You have been individually selected to join our official Post-Election Day Focus Group
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
When looking for feedback from supporters, a lot of Senate campaigns typically go directly to professional polling firms. But not our campaign. **Instead, we’re coming directly to you, Derek.**
John wants to hear unique opinions from real people on our campaign strategy to win PA in 2022, which is why we picked you to represent Cresco in our official Post-Election Day Focus Group.
[**Will you take a minute to answer a few questions about our campaign strategy as part of our official Post-Election Day Focus Group?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211110-3413&t=1&akid=3413%2E434096%2EbBzDP7) Your input will be a _huuuuge_ help as we carefully calculate the next phase of our campaign.
_[John Fetterman is running a true 67 County campaign strategy across the Commonwealth to reach every voter in every county — no matter how red or blue.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211110-3413&t=2&akid=3413%2E434096%2EbBzDP7)_
[Do you agree with John’s campaign strategy?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211110-3413&t=3&akid=3413%2E434096%2EbBzDP7)
Select your answer: Yes No Unsure
**[Enter the focus group →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211110-3413&t=4&akid=3413%2E434096%2EbBzDP7)**
Look, if we learned anything from Election Day last Tuesday, it’s just how hard the 2022 midterm elections could be for Democrats.
The more qualitative feedback we get from genuine Team Fetterman supporters in our Focus Group, the more insight we'll have from the ground about how we can best defeat the GOP and flip this seat.
**_That’s why it’s so important that we get your input_**** _, Derek!_**
So, will you please take a few minutes (or less!!) of your time to participate in our Post-Election Day Focus Group? **[You can click here or use your own custom link to begin!](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211110-3413&t=5&akid=3413%2E434096%2EbBzDP7)**
[https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211110-3413&t=6&akid=3413%2E434096%2EbBzDP7)
**[Enter the focus group →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211110-3413&t=7&akid=3413%2E434096%2EbBzDP7)**
Thank you for taking the time to answer our Post-Election Day Focus Group questions today, Derek. We’ll loop back soon with the results!
Thank you,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211110-3413-footer&t=8&refcode2=3413_434096_bBzDP7&akid=3413%2E434096%2EbBzDP7)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=9&akid=3413%2E434096%2EbBzDP7)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=3413%2E434096%2EbBzDP7)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Jim Renacci for Governor
subject: DeWine Can’t Fix the Supply Chain Shortages
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Renacci for Ohio
body:
| | Friend,

Got milk? Probably not thanks to supply chain disruptions.

Empty shelves at the grocery store are becoming the new normal. If an item is in stock, you then become aware of another growing problem: inflation.

The labor shortage is making things worse. It’s slowing down deliveries and backing up checkout lanes.
---
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJyNUMFygyAU_Bpyw8Gnoh48JDU5dKaX_gCDgJFWkEFsa7--mJoceirDMMPusstb2dCulvSgGyCQxkWA5BmQJE1IfSxOJalo3ran9nJBOTHJmzZeWS6ETsRkDkNDsyKty6rgXZd1RNCS5j2ktAeh6opU-WFshhDcjLIjgkvcsxKLV8mntl7JzSRiuyXuJ4-v04fydvKbdHFuXLEYuLZ4HiYf-FWh7LIEw4ySejEoa5XhekRAN3CeFi-iorViZNy4UffrTol45fpqI3mfFG8Hkyp-RUXeBtbrLxYGxX6D2S2Y3YPnu9Nkg7LhNwW_h293dIE_f0Sa2VHLSPwB5xsoJCdc0BpL2gucV2WF606muOAVqJRUpCDy4BvpPvU46pmWsfDrNtyt6X2aBpUnBLAs0RLgVir8x3gTw1M8By3nx8t8Pb68DsXqCtyeAXNrzg9hWJ16CPf0ZC8bUNn-AJyVsj4)
---
| | It just keeps getting worse. Our children are now suffering in school, as missing food deliveries are making it hard to fill lunch trays.

Instead of acting like a leader, DeWine has been busy following in President Biden’s footsteps. These two career politicians lack the skills and competence to solve the problems.

Ohio needs an experienced businessman. That’s why I’m asking for your support. For over 30 years I’ve been an entrepreneur. I’ve employed more than 3,000 people and managed over 60 businesses. Ohio is broken but I know how to fix it.

**Ohioans literally can’t afford another 4 years of DeWine.** Please consider donating to my campaign today so together we can make Ohio great again.
---

clean_body: | | Friend, Got milk? Probably not thanks to supply chain disruptions. Empty shelves at the grocery store are becoming the new normal. If an item is in stock, you then become aware of another growing problem: inflation. The labor shortage is making things worse. It’s slowing down deliveries and backing up checkout lanes. | | | | | It just keeps getting worse. Our children are now suffering in school, as missing food deliveries are making it hard to fill lunch trays. Instead of acting like a leader, DeWine has been busy following in President Biden’s footsteps. These two career politicians lack the skills and competence to solve the problems. Ohio needs an experienced businessman. That’s why I’m asking for your support. For over 30 years I’ve been an entrepreneur. I’ve employed more than 3,000 people and managed over 60 businesses. Ohio is broken but I know how to fix it. Ohioans literally can’t afford another 4 years of DeWine. Please consider donating to my campaign today so together we can make Ohio great again. | | | Sincerely, Jim Renacci Candidate for Governor of Ohio | | Paid for by Renacci for Ohio |

name: Charles Booker
subject: Kentucky Bourbon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, right now,
there is a historic wave of labor strikes happening across the country.

From the folks who make Heaven Hill bourbon here in Kentucky to the
workers at John Deere, workers are claiming their power. And winning.

Just a couple of weeks ago, UFCW 23D voted to ratify a new contract with
Heaven Hill after weeks of walking the picket line. So we’re celebrating
and raising a glass to the workers who fought hard for this victory with
some brand new merch — Booker for Kentucky Bourbon glasses.

Here they are, straight off the etching machine:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12324?refcode=em20211110-1216&t=1001&akid=1216%2E346206%2E6TujuV ]Photo of Charles Booker for U.S. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12324?refcode=em20211110-1216&t=1002&akid=1216%2E346206%2E6TujuV ]Back of glass, which reads 'This
Senate bourbon glass - front bourbon is union made'

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12324?refcode=em20211110-1216&t=1003&akid=1216%2E346206%2E6TujuV ]If you’re ready, you can get yourself a glass now by making a donation
of $20 or more. A percentage of the proceeds will go toward supporting the
workers from the United Food and Commercial Workers Union who took
significant risks and fought hard for the benefits and protections they
deserve at Heaven Hill.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12324?refcode=em20211110-1216&t=1004&akid=1216%2E346206%2E6TujuV ]Contribute $20 →

Over the years, I’ve been proud to stand on the picket lines with
teachers, on the railroad tracks with coal miners, and with workers at
Churchill Downs. Together, we held the line for fair wages, the right to
unionize, sick days and paid family leave, and for a shot at bettering our
children’s future.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12324?refcode=em20211110-1216&t=1005&akid=1216%2E346206%2E6TujuV ]Charles with Heaven Hill Distillery union workers at picket line

So when unionized workers at Heaven Hill Distillery demanded a fair
contract from their management, I understood how important it was to
support the workers as they went on strike to demand that executives
support the people who make this industry the bedrock of Kentucky’s
economy.

Because that’s what we do in Kentucky,
Peter. It’s part of who we are.

The workers I’ve met are the very reason why I’m running this election to
replace Rand Paul. Earlier this year, Rand introduced legislation that
would nationalize anti-union policies. Legislation that has proven to
reduce worker pay and put more money in the pockets of the rich. Together,
we must stand up to politicians like Rand and the companies who are
benefiting from his anti-union agenda.

Peter, our
work isn’t over yet, and there’s a long way to go when it comes to
transforming the future of our Commonwealth and to deliver the policies
that working families in Kentucky need.

So in honor of our Commonwealth’s proud tradition in labor movements — and
in honor of the fights to come — we created a Booker for Kentucky Bourbon
glass.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12324?refcode=em20211110-1216&t=1006&akid=1216%2E346206%2E6TujuV ]We’re excited to be able to share this glass with you, and we hope
you’ll consider making a $20 donation to get your very own. Part of your
contribution will go toward the United Food and Commercial Workers Union
so that they can continue taking on big fights.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12324?refcode=em20211110-1216&t=1007&akid=1216%2E346206%2E6TujuV ]Get your Charles Booker bourbon glass

Cheers,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211110-1216-footer&t=1008&refcode2=1216_346206_6TujuV&akid=1216%2E346206%2E6TujuV

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1216%2E346206%2E6TujuV

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpt1lgmm8jogj3g9t0euf2o2ccrtth1nrmt8t5cg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clieap34c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sphc5hn6tr2cdjb8t9gctj37cbjciqrcc5gm9o7as376gqmctjhe9hn4cj4currfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbcphhmiqj8c3mc5j38o5ic8r749fg)
| | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztfe0s4l61rb5ltodrse62304vj3tjeuq9os95to_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clieap34c1h2bs)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv2k6j92ujk10ts6bgkro19gsge3o5p6ebtbttso_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clieap34c1h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeo0k2nreofl05043dh9g0rnr0b87u3rrourqcj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clieap34c1h2bs)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znu79amljr5tl2j7hl6stgbnrd8udnk8nvda1jog_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clieap34c1h2bs)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)

clean_body: From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies. | | | | Friend, From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies. And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece. The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American. But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats. I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be. | | For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well. What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it. But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out. Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it. And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help. We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves. Thank you. Steadfast, Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.) | | | | Copyright © 2021 Free Kyle USA, All rights reserved. name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: President Trump Endorses McGeachin for Governor!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign to be the next Governor of Idaho, and I am delighted and honored to receive this endorsement. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/campaign-update-11-10-21?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=35b47eead2&e=823fa8e224)
---
| |
## President Trump Endorses McGeachin for Governor!
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign to be the next Governor of Idaho, and I am delighted and honored to receive this endorsement. President Trump continues to represent the energy and enthusiasm of conservative Republican politics, and his emphatic acknowledgment of our diligent efforts to advance the conservative agenda in Idaho will only help us to expand and grow our campaign based on individual liberty, state sovereignty, and traditional conservative values. I welcome President Trump's help in restoring these principles that have Made Idaho and America Great. President Trump's full endorsement is below: _Lt. Governor Janice McGeachin has been a true supporter of MAGA since the very beginning. She is brave and not afraid to stand up for the issues that matter most to the people of Idaho, a beautiful state that I won by 30.8%. Janice is great on Election Integrity, will always fight for strong Borders, our cherished Second Amendment, American Manufacturing, School Choice, and our wonderful and hardworking FARMERS. I am giving Janice McGeachin my Complete and Total Endorsement to be the next Governor of Idaho. She will make a fantastic Governor, and will never let you down!_ President Trump is completely on board! Will you donate now to become part of our campaign?
---
| [Donate Now!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=de225132c3&e=823fa8e224 "Donate Now!")
---
|
---
|
---
|
## The USMC Celebrates 246 years of Service
---
| The Marine Corps was established on November 10, 1775, by the Second Continental Congress. Today, we celebrate the 246th anniversary of their founding, and we thank them for their continued service to our nation.
---
|
---
|
## Biden's "Infrastructure" Bill
---
| Late Friday night, the House passed a massive 2,702-page bill, which will cost Americans at least $1.2 trillion for a grab bag of leftist policy goals such as pouring billions into public transit, electric buses, and electric-vehicle chargers. The vote was 228-206, with 13 Republicans joining 215 Democrats in support of it. Had these Republicans not defected, the vote would have been 219-215 against, and Biden's socialist wish list would have failed. Instead, liberal Republicans handed radical leftists a major policy victory that will leave our children and grandchildren in debt for generations to come. The bill includes many concerning and unnecessary items including [a new mandate requiring carmakers to implement invasive surveillance systems](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=fa23ed69f2&e=823fa8e224) to monitor drivers under the pretext of preventing intoxicated driving. Billions of dollars are allocated to climate change mitigation, environmental remediation, and other nebulous concepts designed to prioritize leftist beliefs about the environment over constructing more traffic lanes for drivers. In some cases, the bill actually calls for destroying existing infrastructure in the name of "reconnecting communities," a leftist agenda driven by the "Congress for New Urbanism," a think tank devoted to "walkable urban environments." These radical activists are trying to tie their campaign to destroy America's highways to "racial justice." In Detroit, for example, commuters are set to have their lives disrupted and their commutes lengthened by the planned destruction of the fully functional Interstate 375, set to be replaced eventually by surface streets, bike lanes, pedestrian paths, and green spaces. While there are real infrastructure needs across our country — bridges to repair and highways to widen — the significant majority of the 1.2 trillion in debt-financed federal spending this bill authorizes won't be spent on those priorities. Instead, it will be spent on radical environmentalism, socialist priorities such as subsidized internet, and quixotic endeavors such as buying thousands of electric school buses. Once again, we see that it's not enough to elect Republicans. We must elect true conservatives who will steadfastly refuse to compromise with the radical left and its malevolent agenda to fundamentally transform America into something God-fearing patriots won't even recognize. Instead of giving the left what it wanted and allowing hundreds of billions in new debt to be piled onto future generations of Americans, those 13 congressional Republicans could have said NO and shut down this leftist takeover. They failed you and they failed our country. Elections have consequences, and right now, we are suffering the consequences of voters choosing Republicans who weren't real conservatives. We've seen it here in Idaho too. Let's not make these same mistakes again.
---
|
---
|
## Campaign Update
---
| I have had a busy couple of weeks on the campaign trail. I've spent a lot of time in North Idaho, and it has been truly amazing. Every week out on the campaign trail, I am reminded how fortunate I am to be campaigning in a state with the most amazing people in the country. The genuine spirit of Idahoans is unmatched. There is a feeling of resilience out there that's almost indescribable. We are all fighting together to keep Idaho the greatest state in the union. Freedom is at the center of what we are fighting for, and I couldn't be more grateful to have you all beside me as we fight to preserve Idaho's conservative way of life.
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| Thank you to North Idaho for hosting me this week, and I'm excited for the events to come over the next few days!
---
|
---
|
## Make Idaho Free Again!
---
| I am happy to report that we have out-raised all challenging candidates. **We broke the $200,000 mark a few weeks ago** and it’s from grassroots supporters in the state of Idaho that have made this possible. This is a race for the soul of our country and the soul of this great state. I’m here to give the power back to the people and would love your support to make this happen! We are blessed with a once-in-a-generation opportunity to Make Idaho Free Again! We have the ability to push back against the good ol' boy network of cronies and special interests that have been pulling the strings here in Idaho for far too long. With your help and commitment, we can replace leftists and fake Republicans with True Conservatives who are dedicated to the fundamental principles and individual liberty we hold dear. I'm running for Idaho Governor as a consistent, principled, Trump-endorsed conservative because I want to Make Idaho Free Again! We must restore the principles of individual liberty, state sovereignty, and traditional conservative values. I strongly believe in these foundational principles and I know that you believe in them too.
---
| [Make Idaho Free Again!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=d76326546a&e=823fa8e224 "Make Idaho Free Again!")
---
| Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=835fc19ee3&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=da2304309e&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=d4d67bdac6&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=c4d88d8fa5&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=29cd46a399&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.
---
| Sincerely,
Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| | | | | | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=58eed0b5b5&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=6d47e9f2af&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=5b02eb2dfe&e=823fa8e224)
---
| [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=3fad37b4f9&e=823fa8e224)
