name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Can I get your opinion on this?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
It’s important to me to hear your perspective.
#

Friends -
Right now, we’re working hard to lay the groundwork to turn North Carolina blue in 2022.
We cannot deny that flipping this Senate seat will be a tremendous undertaking, but if we work together to build a diverse grassroots coalition across the state, I know we can win.
That’s why I want your thoughts on this race and what it will take to flip North Carolina blue.
**[Will you take a moment to fill out our strategy survey about the North Carolina Senate race? It’s important to me to hear your perspective.](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/strategy-survey/?source=em211110-wu&refcode2=13.357359.5mDyZv&t=1&akid=13%2E357359%2E5mDyZv)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/strategy-survey/?source=em211110-wu&refcode2=13.357359.5mDyZv&t=2&akid=13%2E357359%2E5mDyZv)**
The truth is North Carolina is expected to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country.
With incumbent Richard Burr retiring, we have an open seat — making this a real pick-up opportunity. Plus, Republicans are on track to nominate an extreme far-right candidate in either Trump acolyte Ted Budd or failed former Governor Pat McCrory.
**[If you can spare a minute, please take our survey about the North Carolina Senate race. It’d mean a lot to hear your thoughts today, and your feedback will help inform our strategy to ensure we win!](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/strategy-survey/?source=em211110-wu&refcode2=13.357359.5mDyZv&t=3&akid=13%2E357359%2E5mDyZv)**
We’ll review the results soon, so thank you in advance for taking our survey.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/strategy-survey/?source=em211110-wu&refcode2=13.357359.5mDyZv&t=4&akid=13%2E357359%2E5mDyZv)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=13%2E357359%2E5mDyZv). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=13%2E357359%2E5mDyZv). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=13_357359_5mDyZv&akid=13%2E357359%2E5mDyZv) today to help us make history.

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Reminder: Can you volunteer?
body:
Erik's campaign needs all kinds of folks across Colorado to help out.
| | | |
---
| Hello Peter,
You're receiving this message because you recently contacted the Aadland for U.S. Senate campaign.
We are in need of volunteers right away; if you might be interested, please click the button below and have a look at our Volunteer Survey.
There are a number of activities you can participate in - some for which you don't even have to leave your house.

Thanks for your consideration and I look forward to working with you!
Best regards,
Kel Koop Volunteer Coordinator

---
Team,

Facebook and Twitter BANNED Trump from their platforms for spreading dangerous misinformation, and after multiple failed attempts to get his accounts back, **he’s resorted to creating his own platform instead.**

But the platform hasn’t even launched yet, and it’s already a TOTAL DISASTER:
* It **bans** criticism of the platform itself.
* It was **hacked** within hours of being announced.
* AND it’s even been accused of **stealing** intellectual property!

Worst of all, if Trump's new platform gets off the ground, it's sure to become a haven for scammers, disinformation peddlers, QAnon conspiracy theorists, and more. **A platform like that would cause SERIOUS damage to our democracy, so we need to know right now:**

name: Team AOC
subject: Someone who will speak up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211110-2637-header&t=1&akid=2637%2E2526796%2E9DfbYc)
Alexandria is in Glasgow, Scotland at the UN climate summit, COP26.
Having Alexandria in this space is extremely significant. **Because here’s the thing:**
Too often, places like COP and other decision making rooms are dominated by one perspective.
But when you have someone at the table like Alexandria – someone who comes from an organizing background, who was inspired to run for office by the Indigenous communities at Standing Rock, who refuses to take a dime from fossil fuel executives and lobbyists, and who now represents a frontline community – it _actually_ can change outcomes.
**Alexandria has and will always speak up for us in the halls of power** – it’s what she’s doing right now at COP26. It doesn’t matter if she’s the youngest in the room or who she’s surrounded by.
Already at COP, she’s elevated the link between new fossil fossil construction and missing and murdered Indigenous women and put pressure on Big Oil to take accountability. She’s advocating for centering Indigenous people in negotiations, not just in speeches, and holding the U.S. accountable to “walk the walk” and actually pass emissions drawdowns through the Build Back Better Act.
Having a voice like Alexandria in meetings with Former Secretary of State and Special Envoy for the Climate, John Kerry, and other top officials is a big deal – **and we need to make sure she can continue advocating for our climate and communities in the places where decisions are happening.**
[If you’re like us, it gives us comfort knowing that AOC is in the room, and we want to keep her there. If you’re able to, will you chip in $3 or whatever you can to Alexandria’s 2022 re-election fund?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211110?refcode=em20211110-2637-P_FND_RES_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2637_2526796_9DfbYc&akid=2637%2E2526796%2E9DfbYc)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211110?refcode=em20211110-2637-P_FND_RES_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2637_2526796_9DfbYc&akid=2637%2E2526796%2E9DfbYc)**
There are powerful interests from the GOP to the fossil fuel lobby who want nothing more than to see Alexandria lose next year so they can continue polluting and profiting from climate destruction.
We can’t let that happen, which is why we rely on lots of small-dollar grassroots donations to fight back and run a winning campaign.
[Our fundraising is off to a slow start this month and every dollar you give helps us get back on track to keep Alexandria in Congress fighting for all of us. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211110?refcode=em20211110-2637-P_FND_RES_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2637_2526796_9DfbYc&akid=2637%2E2526796%2E9DfbYc)
Thank you and stay tuned for more updates and reflections from COP26.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211110?refcode=em20211110-2637-P_FND_RES_GFM&t=23&refcode2=2637_2526796_9DfbYc&akid=2637%2E2526796%2E9DfbYc)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211110-2637-P_FND_RES_GFM&t=24&akid=2637%2E2526796%2E9DfbYc)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2637%2E2526796%2E9DfbYc) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2637%2E2526796%2E9DfbYc) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2637%2E2526796%2E9DfbYc)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2637%2E2526796%2E9DfbYc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2637%2E2526796%2E9DfbYc)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Fellow American - the red wave is here.

Before we know it, Q4 will be coming to a close. My team and I got together to plan for 2022, but I have to ask your opinion.

[**Will you take a few moments to let me know your top priorities for Congress in 2022?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7953ea5302a3425191691c2cb77ed482&_e=0b98IzLS7T_UHo7OxelA6SuJrNNLQXzbD8dCxrk-Uv_ISf9VzRIR5UDJ-njX4Mkq4-5p7ZzhG4e4_U5rlQfEGa328Zh_QyXSMkdxGDLQgn_AeQMWwK0_tClKS69onJ7eFtsmCpaEq1wmDy6BG79RybbNi1oki0T3AMmuFrWzu9yWGnjmfagYoJjA42OWInWPbIEbrFON18MYTj0AxbWI7IYJmnjrxmk6-9Eza1qi16Dx9AJ7hpyGwXq1ly5HbFqW7PD28ZICJ-IIR4wex_7aAoWnU9M80CPsD0cbLVAbE4vysO29lQJEVdY7i-18hvevqM2L1TgwnTIAesSXlf16haKWLTbfvw6HIPkl-8PzIOl6Ktq57DLTfgBHE3xuVQAE68euOyRUNZxNcTAW0seo1dL2k5yiIm1yGST8A65nCVTrv0RSwVN8-1ppRk_ep8EsB4tD0n-pQ2RXuHtHuD9KWHeGHHHKS2500-67cj0KcEBKIzlDM9eziqG_HYX79qSwyBnWZKhgXCC3D7JretMEzEBF2eTmdLGLIQV8-hwVuPe5ggVSUWObxxFqi1Kq2COJphTZYz2EMzXNmRKD4NzfucwIljkWrjUuqZB1A-vX36c%3D)

[** Official 2022 Congressional Survey ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7953ea5302a3425191691c2cb77ed482&_e=0b98IzLS7T_UHo7OxelA6SuJrNNLQXzbD8dCxrk-Uv_ISf9VzRIR5UDJ-njX4Mkq4-5p7ZzhG4e4_U5rlQfEGa328Zh_QyXSMkdxGDLQgn_AeQMWwK0_tClKS69onJ7eFtsmCpaEq1wmDy6BG79RybbNi1oki0T3AMmuFrWzu9yWGnjmfagYoJjA42OWInWPbIEbrFON18MYTj0AxbWI7IYJmnjrxmk6-9Eza1qi16Dx9AJ7hpyGwXq1ly5HbFqW7PD28ZICJ-IIR4wex_7aAoWnU9M80CPsD0cbLVAbE4vysO29lQJEVdY7i-18hvevqM2L1TgwnTIAesSXlf16haKWLTbfvw6HIPkl-8PzIOl6Ktq57DLTfgBHE3xuVQAErz-qcbijCueGIXdfkUki-KV3oTdN7GPj1QT6y_X7aSFFMcsr3pSo1FhZ9u0u_UivZshhvldHAZZXSmhwy326aaaKd60I-iTTxEL0HcOsrEuHz--S1M-RGRL0qUbDjdbLTkfK-sLx6IH0uDLmHMFQ_2GcFruo-41dIOWoSKEHYG_m38xqljIimB9AAOKrUxFj_LKmpiDqUEWCjO8De4-RmijPdobHv_5EquXUbjfTTl0%3D)
We can’t afford to have another year of Democrats ramming their socialist policies through Congress and putting America LAST. This year alone, they:
* Forced a massive spending bill on Americans
* Granted amnesty for illegal immigrants
* Defunded the police
* Killed off thousands of energy jobs
* Raised taxes for hard-working Americans

It’s time to deploy a new strategy - which is why I’m coming to you, Fellow American. [**Will you let me know what you think are the main priorities for Congress in 2022?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7953ea5302a3425191691c2cb77ed482&_e=0b98IzLS7T_UHo7OxelA6SuJrNNLQXzbD8dCxrk-Uv_ISf9VzRIR5UDJ-njX4Mkq4-5p7ZzhG4e4_U5rlQfEGa328Zh_QyXSMkdxGDLQgn_AeQMWwK0_tClKS69onJ7eFtsmCpaEq1wmDy6BG79RybbNi1oki0T3AMmuFrWzu9yWGnjmfagYoJjA42OWInWPbIEbrFON18MYTj0AxbWI7IYJmnjrxmk6-9Eza1qi16Dx9AJ7hpyGwXq1ly5HbFqW7PD28ZICJ-IIR4wex_7aAoWnU9M80CPsD0cbLVAbE4vysO29lQJEVdY7i-18hvevqM2L1TgwnTIAesSXlf16haKWLTbfvw6HIPkl-8PzIOl6Ktq57DLTfgBHE3xuVQAEmjiVLdWiNXvBNY78Ri0Akrg2KgI9SB3RscksvAjOKz0STZDHOiXk7Sva53MsiN_al4K2ZpsZ7ZkJXBZgY7GGhImo8hAckHvlkSVQovJ3jH5X5oQqLgfEiCG0CcOdydLMJYFLchr3Tgjh4E3VD0EmsxEUfrOAaoQUckiYOk-11qmtPahyJSDA2RKIhRGe_fvgZlEnDE_IRxIFd1Qh8ZYcTV9-TzL8vIpB6ZDlh7FVAB8%3D)

Your feedback will directly help shape my strategy for next year. [**Thank you for your quick response.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7953ea5302a3425191691c2cb77ed482&_e=0b98IzLS7T_UHo7OxelA6SuJrNNLQXzbD8dCxrk-Uv_ISf9VzRIR5UDJ-njX4Mkq4-5p7ZzhG4e4_U5rlQfEGa328Zh_QyXSMkdxGDLQgn_AeQMWwK0_tClKS69onJ7eFtsmCpaEq1wmDy6BG79RybbNi1oki0T3AMmuFrWzu9yWGnjmfagYoJjA42OWInWPbIEbrFON18MYTj0AxbWI7IYJmnjrxmk6-9Eza1qi16Dx9AJ7hpyGwXq1ly5HbFqW7PD28ZICJ-IIR4wex_7aAoWnU9M80CPsD0cbLVAbE4vysO29lQJEVdY7i-18hvevqM2L1TgwnTIAesSXlf16haKWLTbfvw6HIPkl-8PzIOl6Ktq57DLTfgBHE3xuVQAEnk7qR4Dae0dPrsdBUaH0Eqc3kQV4XH1WlFJAIIVBW8rtxp7-DvLSfSON4wZPKdhctTeX41PA_9WwEMCVCPRzrAmQZJ1wYoQizLKQaf5a09_uioYlmZ2mje4XmlhO5P7sKGbzaK7fdCIUN-A1xIQHBIPUuYv4ouzqKcefKvHxnC7OJDo8LME1u_RahVzm4TRZ2kF6ON2WfPl9FzVsjKh1GmutE-scf6teZDPYDeHNx0w%3D)

For Freedom,
Andy Barr

| **MEET ANDY**
* * *
Andy Barr ran for Congress for a cause - to save America from bankruptcy, restore the American Dream and keep the American people safe and secure. Andy has never stopped fighting for these principles. Now more than ever, it is critical for central and eastern Kentuckians to have a strong, proven, and accountable leader representing them in Congress.

Before we know it, Q4 will be coming to a close. My team and I got together to plan for 2022, but I have to ask your opinion. We can’t afford to have another year of Democrats ramming their socialist policies through Congress and putting America LAST. This year alone, they: Forced a massive spending bill on Americans Granted amnesty for illegal immigrants Defunded the police Killed off thousands of energy jobs Raised taxes for hard-working Americans It’s time to deploy a new strategy - which is why I’m coming to you, Fellow American. Your feedback will directly help shape my strategy for next year. For Freedom, Andy Barr | MEET ANDY Andy Barr ran for Congress for a cause - to save America from bankruptcy, restore the American Dream and keep the American people safe and secure. Andy has never stopped fighting for these principles. name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies.
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbe1npk0bhsldsu6vu31sejigjfn43h45nf8tifo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clie6o32c1h2bs)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq02pckren9ppil2ghvh251u3jm75ftrp2ppvdio_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clie6o32c1h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zebeqo2p6sb019jv683ioihnrgfhcbi06cuhnbso_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clie6o32c1h2bs)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgeprkpb1f75qc20br10oc5459jtaehg26v9uut8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3clie6o32c1h2bs)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|

clean_body: From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies. | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- | | | | Friend, From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies. And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece. The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American. But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats. I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be. | | For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well. What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it. But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out. Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it. And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help. We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves. Thank you. Steadfast, Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.) | | | | Copyright © 2021 Free Kyle USA, All rights reserved. Free Kyle USAPO Box 5322Reno, NV 89513 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: REQUESTING YOUR URGENT RESPONSE (via DCCC)
subject: Calling on grassroots Democrats >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Please do not ignore this incredibly important (but very brief) survey!
| | | **Please do not ignore this incredibly important (but very brief) survey!**

According to our records you're one of our top grassroots supporters.

[**That 's why we're requesting that you be one of our supporters representing your community in our brief November House Strategy Survey ahead of next year's monumental elections.**](https://links.e.dccc.)
| | [**START MY SURVEY >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)
---

**Experts are waving red flags that our Democratic House Majority is at risk of falling to the Republicans.**

As we gear up for a tough fight to defend our House Democrats, we need to build a winning strategy informed by our best grassroots supporters all across the country.

That's why we're asking for your URGENT response to our November House Strategy Survey.

[**Our survey is just seven questions long and takes 30 seconds to complete. Our DCCC team is calling for a 25% response rate -- so can we count on your immediate input?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-jv-)
| [**START MY SURVEY >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs3GE3LS_)
---

Thank you,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45920545&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMTE2NzYyNwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45920545&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMTE2NzYyNwS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). And we’re marking the occasion by releasing a **[_new announcement video_](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3759ada7be0e4c7e9a108a454194d6b4&_e=5st64MPQfmQhhOBUgOlVHzNY0PIGqker6LLjfqBjDgHZl0ukHo1kKl0VyCV3FqO3Wv2CLjUttFX-8Fb62K0bMrqI0YHGvEgcr_LXmkUwUhHq5v8bEFzf2Hh1U5r9S_oeFRjsmPH-A7BTqDjWreUnM89VQWRdRc99xdItWd6oWgIGjUSMeQc0XvnOB8fEzQa3EVD3Sk-fI2B3gmMQeX3YcOfbpdEJ_e8-0qBf5ZDSWp069gWPo5CnnxkKBDNvBv8aR5pFvjOb9PiZdCeZrhVLiGGZklPwKsR4bWekexDzfpVGjHppJ6dh73i4EZP68GDEONCxqgdoGwDf980i6P-fG3cSGLRyEfYIU_3uIrhcd6GUIM5IbwEn4RXfG5I2d_SRrT5C008NFRcVCGyJ_vEfVTbRhTeD2mJrHIyxtD7GFMkiyCYibuvr36Rwnp8c5uxmQMCxjTy5ie-thj0vx10zpQ%3D%3D).** [**CHECK OUT MY NEW ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3759ada7be0e4c7e9a108a454194d6b4&_e=5st64MPQfmQhhOBUgOlVHzNY0PIGqker6LLjfqBjDgHZl0ukHo1kKl0VyCV3FqO3Wv2CLjUttFX-8Fb62K0bMrqI0YHGvEgcr_LXmkUwUhHq5v8bEFzf2Hh1U5r9S_oeFRjsmPH-A7BTqDjWreUnM89VQWRdRc99xdItWd6oWgIGjUSMeQc0XvnOB8fEzQa3EVD3Sk-fI2B3gmMQeX3YcOfbpdEJ_e8-0qBf5ZDSWp069gWPo5CnnxkKBDNvBv8a3xLKFLRJTJnOzDbblU5clnWpnf2U9qTSoB0_9WekJxJeVYmKSSWDYUCXlSkzGzkWSWprH0XNovrY8hCoaE5cIPflCmLBi3IUHU5n3YYTolKNn-guQix7WniauzeaOcXzQO6UQ8S3wz4v-o94_SWjMA_atTACmWfJiZoNnKMyz0ZBC1y2HwZEk_wAuf3V6QgbY41OmCDgXf9gGjfmmAns0w%3D%3D) As a federal prosecutor, I spent my career prosecuting America’s worst enemies. Now I’m fighting to defend the American Dream. It’s a Dream my family has lived. My grandfather, the WWII veteran. And my other grandparents, Holocaust survivors who came to this country as refugees. Today, that Dream is under assault. By a growing number of radical politicians who don’t understand our country or our ideals. [**HELP ME DEFEND THE AMERICAN DREAM**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3759ada7be0e4c7e9a108a454194d6b4&_e=5st64MPQfmQhhOBUgOlVHzNY0PIGqker6LLjfqBjDgHZl0ukHo1kKl0VyCV3FqO3Wv2CLjUttFX-8Fb62K0bMrqI0YHGvEgcr_LXmkUwUhHq5v8bEFzf2Hh1U5r9S_oeFRjsmPH-A7BTqDjWreUnM89VQWRdRc99xdItWd6oWgIGjUSMeQc0XvnOB8fEzQa3EVD3Sk-fI2B3gmMQeX3YcOfbpdEJ_e8-0qBf5ZDSWp069gWPo5CnnxkKBDNvBv8agk1Uhx_kF9U_JJyCyrVOrpWtCRaXHCpEPuPCRVt3rkigjab9cpIqt9PaiXvdRlo4m5iUqtFsvKzxo_21V3LhAwsdcoo44PSPvpmSEbWw8Jhs6O4IBS9eszFmS2kCKdSmh7EEulxmqATdy6lH3gGYgFGA6B0kBXjZuEJCXOHQ0tRtMIla8RqoRxy1DHSfocXmw7SAEIe0mbbHYFcRDbVK_A%3D%3D) **_Yes, there’s a fight now raging in America. But it’s not between Republicans and Democrats. It’s between the quiet majority of Americans who believe in the fundamental goodness of our country and the vocal minority of radicals who don’t._** ** ** I’m running for Congress to help win that fight. To make sure America remains, in President Reagan's words, that “shining city upon a hill.” To make sure our schools teach kids _how_ to think, not _what_ to think. To make sure our neighborhoods are as safe as possible, and our economy is as strong as possible. ** ** **We are happy warriors. subject: Good News and Bad News, Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Help us keep our campaign ad up on TV. | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=40b93377ad&e=fe4b890356)
---
| Peter,

**GOOD NEWS:** Our new Television Ad is being aired on FOX News, introducing our movement to millions of Michigan conservatives. TV allows us to break through the non-stop censorship from Big Tech and the corporate media.

**BAD NEWS:**_**TV is EXPENSIVE!**_**** But in this dirty business of politics it's the name of the game, and it will help us combat the efforts of party insiders to rig the nomination in favor of their preferred RINO candidate.

Peter, we stunned the establishment and the pundits when we announced last month that our 100% citizen-driven campaign had raised over **_$1.1 million._**

**That incredible financial support allowed us to be the first Governor candidate up on TV.** But to keep our ad running and continue building the name ID needed to win statewide, _**I need your help.**_
---
| | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=4fae3e988b&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=a246f8d84b&e=fe4b890356 "DONATE TODAY")
---
| **The momentum behind this movement is real, Peter. **We packed the Montcalm Township Hall with over 300 grassroots patriots last night, and that same energy is being felt everywhere we go.

Believe me, the pundits and politicians are taking notice of our campaign, and our TV ad has secured us as a 'Tier 1' Republican candidate.

However, to continue hammering down, _I'm asking you to do two things: _
* [Pitch in $10, $25, $50](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=344cf08cdd&e=fe4b890356) or whatever you can to help keep our ad up and running through the end of the year.
* [Share our ad on Facebook](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=29d24c495e&e=fe4b890356) to grow our following on social media

(If you don't have Facebook, no problem. [Here is a link](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7819cec2ba&e=fe4b890356) to the YouTube video)

---
| [Pitch in $10](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=c5417b8181&e=fe4b890356 "Pitch in $10")
---
| [Pitch in $25](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=f126b50eeb&e=fe4b890356 "Pitch in $25")
---
| [Pitch in $50](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=8ba3e449f5&e=fe4b890356 "Pitch in $50")
---
| [Share Our Ad on Facebook](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=3509920f96&e=fe4b890356 "Share Our Ad on Facebook")
---
| Every single donation and every single dollar gets us one step closer to finally taking back our state and **returning our government to WE THE PEOPLE!**

Thank you for being a part of our movement.
---
| | **God Bless Michigan and God Bless America,
[](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=5b2f11383a&e=fe4b890356)**
**Garrett Soldano**
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=48e303dc7d&e=fe4b890356)

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Corporate lobbying intensifies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Working families are counting on us to do this next week.
#
Peter,
The popular Build Back Better Act is finally slated for a vote next week — _but only if we keep up the pressure to make it happen._
Corporations, Big Pharma, Wall Street, and their special interest lobbyists have been doing everything they can to halt the progressive policies in the Build Back Better Act — like unprecedented investments in fighting climate change, Medicare expansion, paid leave, childcare, universal pre-K, and affordable housing.
Pramila is 100% determined to deliver for working people, families, and our communities. But she’s up against A LOT: Corporations are trying to influence Congress to avoid paying their fair share in taxes; Big Pharma doesn’t want Medicare to negotiate lower prescription drug prices; fossil fuel executives don’t want investments in clean energy; and McDonald’s and Walmart don’t want to pay a cent more in taxes.
Corporations have one thing in mind: Their bottom line. Not their workers, not families, not the communities surrounding their stores or headquarters — just their corporate profits.
**We need to pass the Build Back Better Act next week, no matter what corporate lobbyists continue to throw our way. Are you with us?**
**[**We need to show the strength of our movement right now during this fight to pass President Biden’s entire agenda. Can you chip in $3 to fuel Pramila’s fight for the progressive policies in the popular Build Back Better Act?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8657?refcode=em20211110-792&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=792%2E420207%2Eef8BTs)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8657?refcode=em20211110-792&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=792%2E420207%2Eef8BTs)**
Here’s what’s on the line:
* Universal preschool for all 3-year-olds and 4-year-olds
* Affordable, high-quality childcare
* Paid family and medical leave
* Home and community-based care
* Historic climate action
* Health care, Medicare expansion, and lowering the cost of prescription drugs
* Affordable housing
* An extension of the monthly Child Tax Credit
* Humane immigration reform
* Higher education and workforce development
* And MORE!

If we want to win these policies, we need to keep up the fight. This process has been so long and drawn out because of the corporations fighting it. The people want these popular policies, but big corporate lobbyists in D.C. don’t want to see this win for the people and our planet.
**[That’s why we need to continue standing together to pass our progressive priorities. Peter, can you stand with Pramila right now and contribute to this fight today? Let’s get this over the finish line.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8657?refcode=em20211110-792&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=792%2E420207%2Eef8BTs)**
Thanks as always for having Pramila’s back.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211110-792-footer&t=22&refcode2=792_420207_ef8BTs&akid=792%2E420207%2Eef8BTs)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: | | | | Gives crumbs to Alaska Friend, This is UNBELIEVABLE. The Far-Left just passed a TRILLION-plus dollar “infrastructure” bill that gives crumbs to Alaska. We are over TWICE the size of Texas, with much more treacherous conditions, and yet we get next to nothing! But, it’s not really about infrastructure. It’s about a radical environmentalist agenda. If anything they should have called it the Anti-Alaska Bill. Instead of supporting the infrastructure we desperately need like new roads, bridges, highways, ferries, and railroads, this bill is actually the Green New Deal! It will kill more jobs, cripple businesses, and hurt homeowners by penalizing us for using oil, gas, and coal--critical resources in Alaska. Most of this bill goes towards “climate resiliency,” corporate bailouts for green companies, and government agencies like the Federal Communications Commission, DHS, and Environmental Protection Agency. Doesn’t sound like infrastructure to me! Unfortunately, because Liberal Lisa Murkowski refuses to stand up for us and has folded to Biden, our grandchildren tomorrow will be bearing the cost of government today. We need to fight back now more than ever! Thanks, Kelly | | | | ==

name: Travis Bull Johnson for Congress
subject: Exciting campaign updates and a special request.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Travis "Bull" Johnson for Congress Committee_
body:
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | |
---
**Less than ONE YEAR until the election! ** I am really getting excited about the opportunity to make a difference. Right now, we are in a good place. Election-wise, many seem to be fed up with their current party here in Western Minnesota. Those who follow the DFL and the GOP are no longer feeling represented. As a matter of fact, I have been invited to 4 GOP/Conservative meetings to be introduced as an independent candidate. The candidate who was projected to be the favorite for the DFL has pulled out and the DFL is now considering their options. **DFL BPOU members have confided in me that, as far as they are concerned, we are the candidate to beat. **Tell me... when have you ever heard _that_ regarding an independent/third party candidate? When chatting with former Representative Collin Peterson about farm issues recently, he joked that he didn't know how we would cover the entire district... it took a plane for him to reach all the corners! I do expect to spend considerable time on the road in the foreseeable future. I am working with Rocks and Cows of Minnesota and will be attending a couple of their events. I will also be making appearances in Fosston, Bemidji, and likely Moorhead in the coming weeks. **If you have any events you'd like me to attend, or are interested in organizing an event, please let me know!**

| |
---
|
---
| | | |
---
**PLEASE NOTE: **For those of you who graciously signed up to make recurring donations to the campaign, **we noticed that your donations came in as one-time donations, not recurring**. We have since resolved this issue.
If you would kindly sign up for your intended recurring donation amount again, it would be greatly appreciated. This error shorted us close to $1000 last month and, as you know, running isn't cheap. Running as an Independent provides us with even greater hills to climb.
**If, together, we want to make a difference I will continue to need your help. ** Sustaining the campaign on the most modest level costs us $2500-$3000 a month. This includes, software costs, Facebook ads, gas, and limited marketing. To maintain our momentum, that will need to grow exponentially. Your support to the campaign and our mission to fix this country is very much appreciated.

One of the most critical values we can instill in the next generation of Montana leaders is the importance of voting, participating in your government, and making sure all voices are heard. Last week, Jack met with a group of bright Bridger High School students and helped them make sure they all got registered to vote at A Pizza Pie restaurant. The event was planned by the 18-year-old who strongly believes in democracy and getting youth engaged in the voting process. Young folks are excited about Jack’s candidacy, and that’s important to us. **[Young people are the future of this country. So will you make a donation to Jack’s campaign today to make sure he can continue to attend events like this and that young people know the importance of taking part in our great clean_body: Hey Folks, As an educator, Jack understands the power that teaching young people holds. One of the most critical values we can instill in our next ge | | | Hey folks, As an educator, Jack understands the power that teaching young people holds. One of the most critical values we can instill in the next generation of Montana leaders is the importance of voting, participating in your government, and making sure all voices are heard. Last week, Jack met with a group of bright Bridger High School students and helped them make sure they all got registered to vote at A Pizza Pie restaurant. The event was planned by the 18-year-old who strongly believes in democracy and getting youth engaged in the voting process. Young folks are excited about Jack’s candidacy, and that’s important to us. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Thank you so much, Ballard for Montana HQ Jack Ballard grew up on a ranch west of Three Forks homesteaded by his grandfather in 1907. I know you’re tired of Governor Lujan Grisham’s “leadersh Peter, I was hoping I could grab your attention for just a few moments, I need to hear from you. I know you’re tired of Governor Lujan Grisham’s “leadership...” It’s such a shame to see a state as beautiful as ours so consistently let down by someone who does not represent our values, respect our wishes, and silences our voices. As the next governor of New Mexico, I’ll put the YOU and your family FIRST. But, in order to do that, I need to hear directly from you. My team and I are planning out what to focus on this month, and we want to get YOUR input. Your answers to our November Agenda Survey will help shape our campaign’s goals and priorities. Governor Lujan Grisham has sided with left wing, defund-the-police activists. She’s squeezed her heavy hand around our children’s education and she’s failed to secure our border and stop crime. She’s failed in every effort to help small businesses recover from COVID-19 and despite being one of the most restrictive states in the country, our numbers only continue to rise. She has always let New Mexicans down. It’s beyond time we changed that - and the first step is making sure YOUR VOICE is heard. I’ll be reviewing responses with my team SOON - will I see yours? Our Democrat opponent is cultivating a voting record that Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders would be proud to claim. | "Experts at POLITICO say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue." (line from a recent Democrat email) Fellow American, Democrats know that their Senate majority rests with their ability to "keep Georgia blue." First off - Georgia isn't a blue state. However, our Democrat opponent is cultivating a voting record that Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders would be proud to claim. The Democrats are pulling out all the stops to win in Georgia. Our opponent is sending fundraising solicitations from national Democrats, Georgia Democrats, and Democrat Senators from New Hampshire, Minnesota, Nevada, and Arizona! Each of these emails raises tens of thousands of dollars - which tells us a few things: 1. National Democrats know our opponent is in trouble. 2. Our Democrat opponent knows he's in trouble. 3. Open this email if you think that it's unacceptable for a member of Congress to call a veteran foul names The only thing I’m guilty of is making my opponent and national Democrats spend money to defend a congressional seat they think belongs to them | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5bb9c35a8f7740a0ac3f893c980de21d&_e=Z8cs5cxjF58xeP1EOWRFZCWXFNL1THFfG54of1BNIhYmMIt4NmOzYFVYsyus9WZjTyeJC6t2BOUdKROF4jeO6YNartVB1R4xeVb-uNU9FpATG-dDX9b6OlOR8426uA67RHQaXotmQzhDYupMvcpaea8PHSV5p-UMCXG2s2fhjcx7SYTkSbA0XLb9luGO_iCzYqgv6nGzXM-jPsVeFi__QA-HWyk6uCDB0uObAKSaNyknolgL9g2BTOfjaP3ScSzOyDRXbO22jLvHT3qt3C26oCs4dkBtJTHqOtLt7uWdqqWK6qzE3x8YEQSUI7mBKFgUkbKzUNJ99IW9_LgDQIsFJx1hJvZhcMF20cBESVsZHXn-3jo7E8c40Ma9RlyDZB_cG7tNRny7bM4gMzIIxBQg7Y0motqjIPlnHt9BP69SBPaUr-zGw_afJv5hECZ34Ecm1JZKWfcJXQMExC7umJinCtUaqpZVaXU0LQZGpuGgB-g%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’m writing today because I want to show you – in his truest form – the man I’m running against for Congress.

Peter DeFazio, the failed Chairman of the House Transportation Committee, refers to a fellow congressman, Brian Mast, a veteran who lost both legs in an IED explosion in Afghanistan as a **“F***ing A*****e”** simply because Rep. Mast attempted to introduce several amendments to a piece of legislation that my opponent didn’t agree with.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5bb9c35a8f7740a0ac3f893c980de21d&_e=Z8cs5cxjF58xeP1EOWRFZCWXFNL1THFfG54of1BNIhYmMIt4NmOzYFVYsyus9WZjTyeJC6t2BOUdKROF4jeO6YNartVB1R4xeVb-uNU9FpATG-dDX9b6OlOR8426uA67RHQaXotmQzhDYupMvcpaea8PHSV5p-UMCXG2s2fhjcx7SYTkSbA0XLb9luGO_iCzYqgv6nGzXM-jPsVeFi__QA-HWyk6uCDB0uObAKSaNyknolgL9g2BTOfjaP3ScSzOwwLPQCwkaQ4KQdNy9QfU1dqIoUasyqjNCH-HkM4hFpurl2tb9dmtS0ung5L-AM5aFOJpwGJeZAbwQsTgZBT_AQMQMy8nhYRVX6iMJIYugMYboMY4OujaDPdQBneZH_OvTLqO07ya-i5_0PrJ28enknSF2CviMfuQyA6GpQgjsYxcWJbeobkPyRzEIuiqLv9puMwRsOwi7wR9cFeloQa2OfdefLY81RC1vDCgDxLfSxI%3D)

So much for bipartisanship, eh?

I can tell you this: if I’m elected to Congress, whether I agree with an opponent or not, I’m certainly never going to be caught on a hot mic calling them derogatory names.

Sadly, Mr. Defazio’s treatment of a combat veteran wounded in the line of duty is emblematic of how Democrat’s feel not only about our veteran community, but Republicans in general.

**Tuesday night’s victory proved to everyone in America that Republicans have every chance to win back the House next November.**

**In fact, one prominent political prognosticator predicts that if Republicans were to outperform our 2020 numbers at the same level that we did in Virginia, we’d pick up more than 51 house seats. It’s time to retire this veteran-hating career politician.**

**[Will you help me get the job done?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5bb9c35a8f7740a0ac3f893c980de21d&_e=Z8cs5cxjF58xeP1EOWRFZCWXFNL1THFfG54of1BNIhYmMIt4NmOzYFVYsyus9WZjTyeJC6t2BOUdKROF4jeO6YNartVB1R4xeVb-uNU9FpATG-dDX9b6OlOR8426uA67RHQaXotmQzhDYupMvcpaea8PHSV5p-UMCXG2s2fhjcx7SYTkSbA0XLb9luGO_iCzYqgv6nGzXM-jPsVeFi__QA-HWyk6uCDB0uObAKSaNyknolgL9g2BTOfjaP3ScSzOcLx_nWF3XrAR4RCJ23Ywm1w4QmPfaiP5IfH_0fCCOLgrZiGTMhhvYo8ML5oBG3zFiG2aIEiu8fhBMZfrr4VpC_IIAhov7lYwseP6qquZBfGicd-ZdMNehvL0YNqu7bWpha0hwuoOHPbzSBJpQfe4OgUBc-ZxEwHnWVy8HotINlqUBo8wWs7X0CyhoDxhBd-JcE6I8Q2ke_Y77dszRo2V2QpF4AC3YNA7Echb2nGL-dw%3D)**

Respectfully,

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Cori, Jamaal, Ayanna, Alexandria, Ilhan, and Rashida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last week, the Democratic caucus joined Republicans to pass an
infrastructure bill AND risk the future of comprehensive climate action,
universal pre-K, paid leave, and Medicare expansion. Cori Bush, Jamaal
Bowman, and the Squad refused to cave and stayed true to their commitment
to protecting investments for working people.

Corporate Democrats spent months negotiating with the President and House
leadership on the framework of the Build Back Better reconciliation bill,
and then cut out popular, progressive policy proposals. Democrats just
lost their one real bargaining chip, by succumbing to Republicans and
passing the infrastructure bill without the Build Back Better Act.

Cori, Jamaal, Ayanna, AOC, Ilhan, and Rashida know this — which is why
they courageously voted against House leadership and the rest of the
Democratic caucus. Now, we need to show the establishment that we have
Jamaal, Cori, and the Squad’s back.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83318?refcode=em20211110-20432&t=1021&akid=20432%2E1203867%2EPWMPho ]We know corporate Democrats will target the Squad this election cycle
for their courageous vote against the corporate-backed infrastructure
bill. Can you rush a contribution to show the Squad that we have their
back?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83318?refcode=em20211110-20432&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=20432%2E1203867%2EPWMPho ]Contribute $3

Vote after vote, the Squad has shown that they won’t play political games
and cave to corporate Democrats or obstructionists like Joe Manchin and
Kyrsten Sinema.

Cori, Jamaal, and the Squad took a risk by taking a stand, and now risk
being primaried by corporate Democrats backed by Republicans. We’ve seen
this happen before to AOC, Ilhan, and Rashida — and need to make sure that
their courage doesn’t come at a cost.

We must step up to show that we support Cori, Jamaal, and the Squad’s
votes, and their continued fight for the people. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83318?refcode=em20211110-20432&t=1023&akid=20432%2E1203867%2EPWMPho ]Can you chip in
$3 so we have the resources to protect the Squad? We need
to ensure we keep Cori, Jamaal, and the Squad in Congress AND expand our
JD coalition.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83318?refcode=em20211110-20432&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=20432%2E1203867%2EPWMPho ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=20432%2E1203867%2EPWMPho ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=20432%2E1203867%2EPWMPho ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211110-20432-footer&t=1027&refcode2=20432_1203867_PWMPho&akid=20432%2E1203867%2EPWMPho

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=20432%2E1203867%2EPWMPho

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
